1#include "stm32f10x.h" // STM32F10x �豸ͷ�ļ�
2#include "HCSR04.h" // HC-SR04 ģ������ͷ�ļ�
3#include "TIME.h" // ʱ�����ͷ�ļ�����ʱ�ȣ�
4#include "delay.h" // ΢�롢���뼶��ʱͷ�ļ�
5
6uint16_t Time; // ��ʱ���������������ڼ�¼ Echo Ϊ�ߵ�ƽ��ʱ��������
7
8/**
9 * @brief ��ʼ�� TIM4 ��ʱ�������ڼ�ʱ Echo ���Ÿߵ�ƽ����ʱ��
10 * @note ��ʱ��ʱ����ԴΪ����ʱ�ӣ��������ڣ�ARR=7199��PSC=0 �ɵ�ÿ�θ����жϼ�� 0.0001s
11 */
12void TIM4_Init(void)
13{
14 // ʹ�� TIM4 ʱ��
15 RCC_APB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB1Periph_TIM4, ENABLE);
16
17 // ����Ϊ�ڲ�ʱ��ģʽ
18 TIM_InternalClockConfig(TIM4);
19
20 // ��ʱ��������������
21 TIM_TimeBaseInitTypeDef TIM_TimeBaseInitStructure;
22 TIM_TimeBaseInitStructure.TIM_ClockDivision = TIM_CKD_DIV1; // ����Ƶ
23 TIM_TimeBaseInitStructure.TIM_CounterMode = TIM_CounterMode_Up; // ���ϼ���ģʽ
24 TIM_TimeBaseInitStructure.TIM_Period = 7199; // �Զ���װ�ؼĴ��� (ARR)����Ӧ�����¼���� 0.0001s
25 TIM_TimeBaseInitStructure.TIM_Prescaler = 0; // Ԥ��Ƶ�� (PSC)������Ƶ
26 TIM_TimeBaseInitStructure.TIM_RepetitionCounter = 0; // ���ڸ߼���ʱ������Ч����ͨ��ʱ���� 0
27 TIM_TimeBaseInit(TIM4, &TIM_TimeBaseInitStructure);
28
29 // ��������жϱ�־
30 TIM_ClearFlag(TIM4, TIM_FLAG_Update);
31 // ʹ�ܸ����ж�
32 TIM_ITConfig(TIM4, TIM_IT_Update, ENABLE);
33
34 // �ж����ȼ�����
35 NVIC_InitTypeDef NVIC_InitStructure;
36 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannel = TIM4_IRQn; // ��ʱ�� 4 �ж�ͨ��
37 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelCmd = ENABLE; // ʹ���ж�
38 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelPreemptionPriority = 2; // ��ռ���ȼ�
39 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelSubPriority = 1; // ��Ӧ���ȼ�
40 NVIC_Init(&NVIC_InitStructure);
41
42 // ������ʱ��
43 TIM_Cmd(TIM4, ENABLE);
44}
45
46/**
47 * @brief TIM4 �жϷ�������ÿ�θ����жϵ���һ��
48 * @note �� Echo ����Ϊ�ߵ�ƽʱ�ۼ� Time ����
49 */
50void TIM4_IRQHandler(void)
51{
52 // �ж��Ƿ�Ϊ�����ж�
53 if (TIM_GetITStatus(TIM4, TIM_IT_Update) == SET)
54 {
55 // ��ȡ PA5��Echo�����ŵ�ƽ���ߵ�ƽʱ��ʱ������ 1
56 if (GPIO_ReadInputDataBit(GPIOA, GPIO_Pin_5) == 1)
57 {
58 Time++;
59 }
60 // ����жϱ�־
61 TIM_ClearITPendingBit(TIM4, TIM_IT_Update);
62 }
63}
64
65/**
66 * @brief ��ʼ�� HC-SR04 ģ�����õ� GPIO��Trig �����Echo ��������
67 */
68void HCSR04_Init(void)
69{
70 // ʹ�� GPIOA ʱ��
71 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOA, ENABLE);
72 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStruct;
73
74 // Trig (PA4) ������������ڲ�����������
75 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_Out_PP;
76 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_4;
77 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
78 GPIO_Init(GPIOA, &GPIO_InitStruct);
79
80 // Echo (PA5) �������룬���ڽ��ջز��ź�
81 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_IPD; // ��������
82 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_5;
83 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
84 GPIO_Init(GPIOA, &GPIO_InitStruct);
85
86 // ��ʼ�� Trig ����
87 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOA, GPIO_Pin_4);
88}
89
90/**
91 * @brief ���� 45��s �ĸߵ�ƽ�����źţ�����ʼ����ʱ
92 */
93void HCSR04_Start(void)
94{
95 // ���� Trig ����
96 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOA, GPIO_Pin_4); // �ø�
97 Delay_us(45); // �ȴ� 45 ΢��
98 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOA, GPIO_Pin_4);// �õ�
99
100 // ���ü�ʱ����
101 Time = 0;
102 // ������ʱ����ʱ Echo �ź�
103 TIM4_Init();
104}
105
106/**
107 * @brief ��ȡһ�γ��������������λ��cm��
108 * @return ����ֵ����Χ ~2cm�C400cm
109 */
110uint16_t HCSR04_GetValue(void)
111{
112 HCSR04_Start(); // ���䳬����������ʼ��ʱ
113 Delay_ms(100); // �ȴ�һ�β���������; HC-SR04�ٷ����飺���δ���֮�����С���Ϊ60ms��ԭ�򣺱���ز����š�ȷ�����׼ȷ��
114 TIM_Cmd(TIM4, DISABLE);// �����ɺ�رն�ʱ��
115
116 if(Time >235) Time = 0; //��4��Լ�� 23.5ms��Ҫ�Ǵ���4�׾ͷ���0��
117
118 // ������룺
119 // Time * 0.0001s Ϊ Echo �ߵ�ƽ��ʱ�䣨��λ���룩
120 // ����Լ 340m/s �� 34000cm/s
121 // ����ʱ�䣬ʵ�ʾ��� = (time_sec * 34000) / 2
122 return ((Time * 0.0001f) * 34000) / 2;
123}

4void LED_Init(void)
5{
6 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOC, ENABLE);
7
8 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
9 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_Out_PP;
10 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_13;
11 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
12 GPIO_Init(GPIOC, &GPIO_InitStructure);
13
14// GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOC, GPIO_Pin_13);
15 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOC, GPIO_Pin_13);
16}
17
18void LED_Open(void)
19{
20 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOC, GPIO_Pin_13);
21}
22
23void LED_Close(void)
24{
25 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOC, GPIO_Pin_13);
26}
27
28void LED_Flash(void)
29{
30 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOC, GPIO_Pin_13);
31 Delay_ms(100);
32 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOC, GPIO_Pin_13);
33 Delay_ms(100);
34}

5void MOTOR_GPIO_Init(void)
6{
7 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOB, ENABLE);
8
9 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
10 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_Out_PP;
11 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_5|GPIO_Pin_6|GPIO_Pin_7|GPIO_Pin_8; //���ν�L298N IN1,IN2,IN3,IN4
12 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
13 GPIO_Init(GPIOB, &GPIO_InitStructure);
14}

16/*
17 �������ܣ��������������ٶȺ�����ת
18
19 ����˵����
20 * ��Χ��-7200��7200 ��ע�⣺����"����"��ʾ�����ͬ��ת��
21 * ����1��Left_speed ���������ת�ٺͷ���
22 * ����2��Right_speed �����Ҳ���ת�ٺͷ���
23
24*/
25void Set_Car_Speed(int Left_speed ,int Right_speed)
26{
27 //�����
28 if(Left_speed>0)
29 {
30 TIM_SetCompare2(TIM3,Left_speed); //PA7
31 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_7);
32 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_8);
33 }
34 else if(Left_speed<0)
35 {
36 TIM_SetCompare2(TIM3,-Left_speed); //PA7
37 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_7);
38 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_8);
39 }
40 else
41 {
42 TIM_SetCompare2(TIM3,0); //PA7
43 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_7);
44 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_8);
45 }
46
47
48 //�Ҳ���
49 if(Right_speed>0)
50 {
51 TIM_SetCompare1(TIM3,Right_speed); //PA6
52 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_5);
53 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_6);
54 }
55 else if(Right_speed<0)
56 {
57 TIM_SetCompare1(TIM3,-Right_speed); //PA6
58 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_5);
59 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_6);
60 }
61 else
62 {
63 TIM_SetCompare1(TIM3,0); //PA6
64 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_5);
65 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOB, GPIO_Pin_6);
66 }
67
68
69}

10void OLED_Init(void)
11{
12 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
13 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOA, ENABLE); //ʹ��A�˿�ʱ��
14 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_11|GPIO_Pin_12; //PA11->IIC_SCL PA12->IIC_SDA
15 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_Out_OD; //�������
16 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz; //�ٶ�50MHz
17 GPIO_Init(GPIOA, &GPIO_InitStructure); //��ʼ��PA1,PA2
18 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOA,GPIO_Pin_11|GPIO_Pin_12); //PA1,PA2�ø�
19
20 OLED_WR_Byte(0xAE,OLED_CMD);//---�ر�OLED���
21 OLED_WR_Byte(0x00,OLED_CMD);//---�����е͵�ַ
22 OLED_WR_Byte(0x10,OLED_CMD);//---�����иߵ�ַ
23 OLED_WR_Byte(0x40,OLED_CMD);//---������ʼ�е�ַ����ӳ��RAM��ʾ��ʼ�У�0x00~0x3F��
24 OLED_WR_Byte(0x81,OLED_CMD);//---���öԱȿ��ƼĴ���
25 OLED_WR_Byte(0xCF,OLED_CMD);//---��������
26 OLED_WR_Byte(0xA1,OLED_CMD);//---���÷ֶ�/��ӳ�� 0xa0���ҷ��� 0xa1����
27 OLED_WR_Byte(0xC8,OLED_CMD);//---����COM��/��ɨ�跽�� 0xc0���·��� 0xc8����
28 OLED_WR_Byte(0xA6,OLED_CMD);//---����������ʾ
29 OLED_WR_Byte(0xA8,OLED_CMD);//---���ø��ñȣ�1��64��
30 OLED_WR_Byte(0x3f,OLED_CMD);//---1/64����
31 OLED_WR_Byte(0xD3,OLED_CMD);//---������ʾƫ��ӳ��RAM��������0x00~0x3F��
32 OLED_WR_Byte(0x00,OLED_CMD);//---������
33 OLED_WR_Byte(0xd5,OLED_CMD);//---������ʾʱ�ӷ�Ƶ��/����Ƶ��
34 OLED_WR_Byte(0x80,OLED_CMD);//---s���÷�Ƶ�ȣ���ʱ������Ϊ100֡/��
35 OLED_WR_Byte(0xD9,OLED_CMD);//---����Ԥ���ʱ��
36 OLED_WR_Byte(0xF1,OLED_CMD);//---��Ԥ�������Ϊ15��ʱ�ӣ��ŵ�����Ϊ1��ʱ��
37 OLED_WR_Byte(0xDA,OLED_CMD);//---����com����Ӳ������
38 OLED_WR_Byte(0x12,OLED_CMD);//---
39 OLED_WR_Byte(0xDB,OLED_CMD);//---���� vcomh
40 OLED_WR_Byte(0x30,OLED_CMD);//---����VCOMȡ��ѡ�񼶱�
41 OLED_WR_Byte(0x20,OLED_CMD);//---����ҳ��Ѱַģʽ (0x00/0x01/0x02)
42 OLED_WR_Byte(0x02,OLED_CMD);//---
43 OLED_WR_Byte(0x8D,OLED_CMD);//---���õ�ɱ�����/����
44 OLED_WR_Byte(0x14,OLED_CMD);//---���ã�0x10������
45 OLED_Clear();
46 OLED_WR_Byte(0xAF,OLED_CMD);
47}
48
49
50/**************************************************
51��������:����һ���ֽ�
52��ڲ���:mode:����/�����־
53 0��ʾ����
54 1��ʾ����
55**************************************************/
56void OLED_WR_Byte(u8 dat,u8 mode)
57{
58 I2C_Start();
59 Send_Byte(0x78);
60 I2C_WaitAck();
61 if(mode){Send_Byte(0x40);}
62 else{Send_Byte(0x00);}
63 I2C_WaitAck();
64 Send_Byte(dat);
65 I2C_WaitAck();
66 I2C_Stop();
67}
68
69
70/**************************************************
71��������:��ת��Ļ��ʾ
72��ڲ���:i=0:������ʾ;
73 i=1:��ת��ʾ-----����ڣ��ڱ���
74**************************************************/
75void OLED_ColorTurn(u8 i)
76{
77 if(i==0)
78 {
79 OLED_WR_Byte(0xA6,OLED_CMD);//������ʾ
80 }
81 if(i==1)
82 {
83 OLED_WR_Byte(0xA7,OLED_CMD);//��ɫ��ʾ
84 }
85}
86
87
88/**************************************************
89��������:��Ļ��ת180��
90��ڲ���:i=0:������ʾ
91 i=1:��ת��ʾ
92**************************************************/
93void OLED_DisplayTurn(u8 i)
94{
95 if(i==0)
96 {
97 OLED_WR_Byte(0xC8,OLED_CMD);//������ʾ
98 OLED_WR_Byte(0xA1,OLED_CMD);
99 }
100 if(i==1)
101 {
102 OLED_WR_Byte(0xC0,OLED_CMD);//��ת��ʾ
103 OLED_WR_Byte(0xA0,OLED_CMD);
104 }
105}
106

111void OLED_DisPlay_On(void)
112{
113 OLED_WR_Byte(0x8D,OLED_CMD);//��ɱ�ʹ��
114 OLED_WR_Byte(0x14,OLED_CMD);//������ɱ�

120��������:�ر�OLED��ʾ

122void OLED_DisPlay_Off(void)
123{
124 OLED_WR_Byte(0x8D,OLED_CMD);//��ɱ�ʹ��
125 OLED_WR_Byte(0x10,OLED_CMD);//�رյ�ɱ�

129
130/**************************************************
131��������:�����Դ浽OLED(��ˢ�¸�д�������,ˢ����Ļ)
132**************************************************/
133void OLED_Refresh(void)
134{
135 u8 i,n;
136 for(i=0;i<8;i++)
137 {
138 OLED_WR_Byte(0xb0+i,OLED_CMD); //��������ʼ��ַ
139 OLED_WR_Byte(0x00,OLED_CMD); //���õ�����ʼ��ַ
140 OLED_WR_Byte(0x10,OLED_CMD); //���ø�����ʼ��ַ
141 I2C_Start();
142 Send_Byte(0x78);
143 I2C_WaitAck();
144 Send_Byte(0x40);
145 I2C_WaitAck();
146 for(n=0;n<128;n++)
147 {
148 Send_Byte(OLED_GRAM[n][i]);
149 I2C_WaitAck();
150 }
151 I2C_Stop();
152 }
153}
154/***************************************************
155��������:���OLED��Ļ
156***************************************************/
157void OLED_Clear(void)
158{
159 u8 i,n;
160 for(i=0;i<8;i++)
161 {
162 for(n=0;n<128;n++)
163 {
164 OLED_GRAM[n][i]=0;//�����������
165 }
166 }
167 OLED_Refresh();//������ʾ
168}
169
170
171/***************************************************
172��������:��ָ����(x,y)���괦��һ����
173��ڲ���:
174 x:0-127
175 y:0-63
176 t:1:���; 0:���
177***************************************************/
178void OLED_DrawPoint(u8 x,u8 y,u8 t)
179{
180 u8 i,m,n;
181 i=y/8;
182 m=y%8;
183 n=1<<m;
184 if(t){OLED_GRAM[x][i]|=n;}
185 else
186 {
187 OLED_GRAM[x][i]=~OLED_GRAM[x][i];
188 OLED_GRAM[x][i]|=n;
189 OLED_GRAM[x][i]=~OLED_GRAM[x][i];
190 }
191}
192
193
194/****************************************************
195��������:��(x1,y1)��(x2,y2)��һ��ֱ��
196��ڲ���:
197 x1,x2:0-127
198 y1,y2:0-63
199 mode:1:��� 0:���
200*****************************************************/
201void OLED_DrawLine(u8 x1,u8 y1,u8 x2,u8 y2,u8 mode)
202{
203 u16 t;
204 int xerr=0,yerr=0,delta_x,delta_y,distance;
205 int incx,incy,uRow,uCol;
206 delta_x=x2-x1; //������������
207 delta_y=y2-y1;
208 uRow=x1;//�����������
209 uCol=y1;
210 if(delta_x>0)incx=1; //���õ�������
211 else if (delta_x==0)incx=0;//��ֱ��
212 else {incx=-1;delta_x=-delta_x;}
213 if(delta_y>0)incy=1;
214 else if (delta_y==0)incy=0;//ˮƽ��
215 else {incy=-1;delta_y=-delta_x;}
216 if(delta_x>delta_y)distance=delta_x; //ѡȡ��������������
217 else distance=delta_y;
218 for(t=0;t<distance+1;t++)
219 {
220 OLED_DrawPoint(uRow,uCol,mode);//����
221 xerr+=delta_x;
222 yerr+=delta_y;
223 if(xerr>distance)
224 {
225 xerr-=distance;
226 uRow+=incx;
227 }
228 if(yerr>distance)
229 {
230 yerr-=distance;
231 uCol+=incy;
232 }
233 }
234}
235
236
237/****************************************************
238��������:��(x,y)ΪԲ��,rΪ�뾶��һ��Բ
239��ڲ���:
240 x:0-127
241 y:0-63
242*****************************************************/
243void OLED_DrawCircle(u8 x,u8 y,u8 r)
244{
245 int a, b,num;
246 a = 0;
247 b = r;
248 while(2 * b * b >= r * r)
249 {
250 OLED_DrawPoint(x + a, y - b,1);
251 OLED_DrawPoint(x - a, y - b,1);
252 OLED_DrawPoint(x - a, y + b,1);
253 OLED_DrawPoint(x + a, y + b,1);
254
255 OLED_DrawPoint(x + b, y + a,1);
256 OLED_DrawPoint(x + b, y - a,1);
257 OLED_DrawPoint(x - b, y - a,1);
258 OLED_DrawPoint(x - b, y + a,1);
259
260 a++;
261 num = (a * a + b * b) - r*r;//���㻭�ĵ���Բ�ĵľ���
262 if(num > 0)
263 {
264 b--;
265 a--;
266 }
267 }
268}
269
270
271/****************************************************
272��������:��(x,y)����ʾһ���ַ�,���������ַ�
273��ڲ���:
274 x:0-127
275 y:0-63
276 size:ѡ������:6*8 6*12 8*16 12*24
277 mode:0:��ɫ��ʾ 1:������ʾ
278*****************************************************/
279void OLED_ShowChar(u8 x,u8 y,u8 chr,u8 size1,u8 mode)
280{
281 u8 i,m,temp,size2,chr1;
282 u8 x0=x,y0=y;
283 if(size1==8)size2=6;
284 else size2=(size1/8+((size1%8)?1:0))*(size1/2); //�õ�����һ���ַ���Ӧ������ռ���ֽ���
285 chr1=chr-' '; //����ƫ�ƺ��ֵ
286 for(i=0;i<size2;i++)
287 {
288 if(size1==8)
289 {temp=asc2_0806[chr1][i];} //����0806����
290 else if(size1==12)
291 {temp=asc2_1206[chr1][i];} //����1206����
292 else if(size1==16)
293 {temp=asc2_1608[chr1][i];} //����1608����
294 else if(size1==24)
295 {temp=asc2_2412[chr1][i];} //����2412����
296 else return;
297 for(m=0;m<8;m++)
298 {
299 if(temp&0x01)OLED_DrawPoint(x,y,mode);
300 else OLED_DrawPoint(x,y,!mode);
301 temp>>=1;
302 y++;
303 }
304 x++;
305 if((size1!=8)&&((x-x0)==size1/2))
306 {x=x0;y0=y0+8;}
307 y=y0;
308 }
309}
310
311
312/****************************************************
313��������:��(x,y)Ϊ���,��ʾһ���ַ���
314��ڲ���:
315 x:0-127
316 y:0-63
317 size:ѡ������:6*8 6*12 8*16 12*24
318 *chr:�ַ�����ʼ��ַ
319 mode:0:��ɫ��ʾ 1:������ʾ
320*****************************************************/
321void OLED_ShowString(u8 x,u8 y,u8 *chr,u8 size1,u8 mode)
322{
323 while((*chr>=' ')&&(*chr<='~'))//�ж��ǲ��ǷǷ��ַ�!
324 {
325 OLED_ShowChar(x,y,*chr,size1,mode);
326 if(size1==8)x+=6;
327 else x+=size1/2;
328 chr++;
329 }
330}
331
332
333/****************************************************
334��������:����m^n,��m*m*m*m*m*m*m*m*m*m*m*m*m....(n��)
335��ڲ���:
336 m:����
337 n:ָ��
338*****************************************************/
339u32 OLED_Pow(u8 m,u8 n)
340{
341 u32 result=1;
342 while(n--)
343 {
344 result*=m;
345 }
346 return result;
347}
348
349
350/****************************************************
351��������:��(x.y)Ϊ��ʼ������ʾ����
352��ڲ���:
353 x:0-127
354 y:0-63
355 num :Ҫ��ʾ������
356 len :���ֵ�λ��
357 size:�����С
358 mode:0,��ɫ��ʾ;1,������ʾ
359*****************************************************/
360void OLED_ShowNum(u8 x,u8 y,u32 num,u8 len,u8 size1,u8 mode)
361{
362 u8 t,temp,m=0;
363 if(size1==8)m=2;
364 for(t=0;t<len;t++)
365 {
366 temp=(num/OLED_Pow(10,len-t-1))%10;
367 if(temp==0)
368 {
369 OLED_ShowChar(x+(size1/2+m)*t,y,'0',size1,mode);
370 }
371 else
372 {
373 OLED_ShowChar(x+(size1/2+m)*t,y,temp+'0',size1,mode);
374 }
375 }
376}
377
378
379/****************************************************
380��������:��(x.y)Ϊ��ʼ������ʾ����
381��ڲ���:
382 x:0-127
383 y:0-63
384 num :���ֶ�Ӧ�����
385 size:�����С
386 mode:0,��ɫ��ʾ;1,������ʾ
387*****************************************************/
388void OLED_ShowChinese(u8 x,u8 y,u8 num,u8 size1,u8 mode)
389{
390 u8 m,temp;
391 u8 x0=x,y0=y;
392 u16 i,size3=(size1/8+((size1%8)?1:0))*size1; //�õ�����һ���ַ���Ӧ������ռ���ֽ���
393 for(i=0;i<size3;i++)
394 {
395 if(size1==16)
396 {temp=Hzk1[num][i];}//����16*16����
397 else if(size1==24)
398 {temp=Hzk2[num][i];}//����24*24����
399 else if(size1==32)
400 {temp=Hzk3[num][i];}//����32*32����
401 else if(size1==64)
402 {temp=Hzk4[num][i];}//����64*64����
403 else return;
404 for(m=0;m<8;m++)
405 {
406 if(temp&0x01)OLED_DrawPoint(x,y,mode);
407 else OLED_DrawPoint(x,y,!mode);
408 temp>>=1;
409 y++;
410 }
411 x++;
412 if((x-x0)==size1)
413 {x=x0;y0=y0+8;}
414 y=y0;
415 }
416}
417
418
419/****************************************************
420��������:��ʾ���ֵĸ���(������ʾ)
421��ڲ���:
422 num ��ʾ���ֵĸ���
423 space ÿһ����ʾ�ļ��
424 mode:0,��ɫ��ʾ;1,������ʾ
425*****************************************************/
426void OLED_ScrollDisplay(u8 num,u8 space,u8 mode)
427{
428 u8 i,n,t=0,m=0,r;
429 while(1)
430 {
431 if(m==0)
432 {
433 OLED_ShowChinese(128,24,t,16,mode); //д��һ�����ֱ�����OLED_GRAM[][]������
434 t++;
435 }
436 if(t==num)
437 {
438 for(r=0;r<16*space;r++) //��ʾ���
439 {
440 for(i=1;i<144;i++)
441 {
442 for(n=0;n<8;n++)
443 {
444 OLED_GRAM[i-1][n]=OLED_GRAM[i][n];
445 }
446 }
447 OLED_Refresh();
448 }
449 t=0;
450 }
451 m++;
452 if(m==16){m=0;}
453 for(i=1;i<144;i++) //ʵ������
454 {
455 for(n=0;n<8;n++)
456 {
457 OLED_GRAM[i-1][n]=OLED_GRAM[i][n];
458 }
459 }
460 OLED_Refresh();
461 }
462}
463
464
465/****************************************************
466��������:��(x,y)Ϊ���������ʾͼƬ (ͼƬȡ��ģ������bmp.h)
467��ڲ���:
468 x,y���������
469 sizex:ͼƬ�ĳ���
470 sizey:ͼƬ�Ŀ���
471 BMP[]��Ҫд���ͼƬ����
472 mode:0,��ɫ��ʾ;1,������ʾ
473*****************************************************/
474void OLED_ShowPicture(u8 x,u8 y,u8 sizex,u8 sizey,u8 BMP[],u8 mode)
475{
476 u16 j=0;
477 u8 i,n,temp,m;
478 u8 x0=x,y0=y;
479 sizey=sizey/8+((sizey%8)?1:0);
480 for(n=0;n<sizey;n++)
481 {
482 for(i=0;i<sizex;i++)
483 {
484 temp=BMP[j];
485 j++;
486 for(m=0;m<8;m++)
487 {
488 if(temp&0x01)OLED_DrawPoint(x,y,mode);
489 else OLED_DrawPoint(x,y,!mode);
490 temp>>=1;
491 y++;
492 }
493 x++;
494 if((x-x0)==sizex)
495 {
496 x=x0;
497 y0=y0+8;
498 }
499 y=y0;
500 }
501 }
502}
503
504void OLED_ShowFloat(u8 x,u8 y,float num,u8 len,u8 size,u8 mode)
505{
506 float Abs_num;
507 int unit,tens,hundreds,one_decimal,two_decimal;
508 Abs_num = My_abs(num);
509 hundreds = (int)Abs_num/100; //���λ
510 tens = ((int)Abs_num/10) % 10; //��ʮλ
511 unit = Abs_num-hundreds*100 -tens*10; //���λ
512 one_decimal=((Abs_num-(int)Abs_num))*10;
513 two_decimal=(int)((Abs_num-(int)Abs_num)*100)%10;
514 if(num>=0)
515 {
516 OLED_ShowChar(x,y,'+',size,mode);
517 OLED_ShowNum(x+8,y,hundreds,1,size,mode);
518 OLED_ShowNum(x+16,y,tens,1,size,mode);
519 OLED_ShowNum(x+24,y,unit,1,size,mode);
520 OLED_ShowChar(x+32,y,'.',size,mode);
521 OLED_ShowNum(x+40,y,one_decimal,1,size,mode);
522 OLED_ShowNum(x+48,y,two_decimal,1,size,mode);
523 OLED_Refresh();
524 }
525 else if(num<0)
526 {
527 OLED_ShowChar(x,y,'-',size,mode);
528 OLED_ShowNum(x+8,y,hundreds,1,size,mode);
529 OLED_ShowNum(x+16,y,tens,1,size,mode);
530 OLED_ShowNum(x+24,y,unit,1,size,mode);
531 OLED_ShowChar(x+32,y,'.',size,mode);
532 OLED_ShowNum(x+40,y,one_decimal,1,size,mode);
533 OLED_ShowNum(x+48,y,two_decimal,1,size,mode);
534 OLED_Refresh();
535 }
536}
537
538
539float My_abs(float a)
540{
541 if(a>=0) return a;
542 else return(-a);
543}
544

9#define OLED_CMD 0 //д����
10#define OLED_DATA 1 //д����
11
12void OLED_WR_Byte(u8 dat,u8 mode); //����һ���ֽ�
13void OLED_ColorTurn(u8 i); //��ת��ɫ
14void OLED_DisplayTurn(u8 i); //��Ļ��ת180��
15void OLED_DisPlay_On(void); //����oled��ʾ��
16void OLED_DisPlay_Off(void); //�ر�oled��ʾ��
17void OLED_Refresh(void);
18void OLED_Clear(void);
19void OLED_DrawPoint(u8 x,u8 y,u8 t);
20void OLED_DrawLine(u8 x1,u8 y1,u8 x2,u8 y2,u8 mode);
21void OLED_DrawCircle(u8 x,u8 y,u8 r);
22void OLED_ShowChar(u8 x,u8 y,u8 chr,u8 size1,u8 mode);
23void OLED_ShowChar6x8(u8 x,u8 y,u8 chr,u8 mode);
24void OLED_ShowString(u8 x,u8 y,u8 *chr,u8 size1,u8 mode);
25void OLED_ShowNum(u8 x,u8 y,u32 num,u8 len,u8 size1,u8 mode);
26void OLED_ShowChinese(u8 x,u8 y,u8 num,u8 size1,u8 mode);
27void OLED_ScrollDisplay(u8 num,u8 space,u8 mode);
28void OLED_ShowPicture(u8 x,u8 y,u8 sizex,u8 sizey,u8 BMP[],u8 mode);
29void OLED_Init(void);
30void OLED_ShowFloat(u8 x,u8 y,float num,u8 len,u8 size,u8 mode);
31float My_abs(float a);
32
33#endif

1#include "delay.h"
2#include "olediic.h"
3
4void IIC_delay(void)
5{
6 u8 t=3;
7 while(t--);
8}
9
10//��ʼ�ź�
11void I2C_Start(void)
12{
13 OLED_SDA_Set();
14 OLED_SCL_Set();
15 IIC_delay();
16 OLED_SDA_Clr();
17 IIC_delay();
18 OLED_SCL_Clr();
19 IIC_delay();
20}
21
22//�����ź�
23void I2C_Stop(void)
24{
25 OLED_SDA_Clr();
26 OLED_SCL_Set();
27 IIC_delay();
28 OLED_SDA_Set();
29}
30
31//�ȴ��ź���Ӧ
32void I2C_WaitAck(void) //�������źŵĵ�ƽ
33{
34 OLED_SDA_Set();
35 IIC_delay();
36 OLED_SCL_Set();
37 IIC_delay();
38 OLED_SCL_Clr();
39 IIC_delay();
40}
41
42//д��һ���ֽ�
43void Send_Byte(u8 dat)
44{
45 u8 i;
46 for(i=0;i<8;i++)
47 {
48 if(dat&0x80)//��dat��8λ�����λ����д��
49 {
50 OLED_SDA_Set();
51 }
52 else
53 {
54 OLED_SDA_Clr();
55 }
56 IIC_delay();
57 OLED_SCL_Set();
58 IIC_delay();
59 OLED_SCL_Clr();//��ʱ���ź�����Ϊ�͵�ƽ
60 dat<<=1;
61 }
62}
63
64
1#ifndef __IIC_H
2#define __IIC_H
3#include "sys.h"
4
5/****************
6ע�⣺ģ��IICʱ������IO�ڣ���JTAG���⣬��������SDA��SCL��
7****************/
8#define OLED_SCL_Clr() GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOA,GPIO_Pin_11)//SCL
9#define OLED_SCL_Set() GPIO_SetBits(GPIOA,GPIO_Pin_11)
10
11#define OLED_SDA_Clr() GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOA,GPIO_Pin_12)//AIN
12#define OLED_SDA_Set() GPIO_SetBits(GPIOA,GPIO_Pin_12)
13
14void IIC_delay(void);
15void I2C_Start(void);
16void I2C_Stop(void);
17void I2C_WaitAck(void);
18void Send_Byte(u8 dat);
19
20#endif

1#include "Servo.h"
2#include "Delay.h"
3
4/*
5*** TIM2 ���ö�ʱ��2PWM����SG90��� ***
6
7*** PWMƵ�ʣ�50Hz ***
8
9*** �ӿڣ�PA0->���1 ***
10
11*** ���ߣ��¼����� ***
12
13***��ע΢�Ź��ں�ѧϰ���൥Ƭ��֪ʶ��΢���������¼����š� ***
14
15*/
16void myServo_Init(u16 arr,u16 psc)
17{
18 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
19 TIM_TimeBaseInitTypeDef TIM_TimeBaseStructure;
20 TIM_OCInitTypeDef TIM_OCInitStructure;
21
22 RCC_APB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB1Periph_TIM2, ENABLE); //ʹ�ܶ�ʱ��2ʱ��
23 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOA, ENABLE); //ʹ��GPIO����
24
25
26 //��ʼ�����TIM2 ͨ��1 PWM���岨�ε�����CH1->PA0
27 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_0; //CH1
28 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_AF_PP; //�����������
29 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
30 GPIO_Init(GPIOA, &GPIO_InitStructure);//��ʼ��GPIO
31
32 //��ʼ��TIM2
33 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_Period = arr; //��������һ�������¼�װ�����Զ���װ�ؼĴ������ڵ�ֵ
34 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_Prescaler =psc; //����������ΪTIMxʱ��Ƶ�ʳ�����Ԥ��Ƶֵ
35 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_ClockDivision = 0; //����ʱ�ӷָ�:TDTS = Tck_tim
36 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_CounterMode = TIM_CounterMode_Up; //TIM���ϼ���ģʽ
37 TIM_TimeBaseInit(TIM2, &TIM_TimeBaseStructure); //����TIM_TimeBaseInitStruct��ָ���Ĳ�����ʼ��TIMx��ʱ�������λ
38
39 //��ʼ��TIM2 Channe PWMģʽ
40 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OCMode = TIM_OCMode_PWM1; //ѡ��ʱ��ģʽ:TIM������ȵ���ģʽ1
41 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OutputState = TIM_OutputState_Enable; //�Ƚ����ʹ��
42 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OCPolarity = TIM_OCPolarity_High; //�������:TIM����Ƚϼ��Ը�
43
44 TIM_OC1Init(TIM2, &TIM_OCInitStructure); //����Tָ���Ĳ�����ʼ������TIM2 OC1
45
46 TIM_OC1PreloadConfig(TIM2, TIM_OCPreload_Enable); //ʹ��TIM2��CCR1�ϵ�Ԥװ�ؼĴ���
47
48 TIM_Cmd(TIM2, ENABLE); //ʹ��TIM2
49}
50
51
52
53// ������Ӧֵ��ARR=1999, PSC=719 ʱ����Ӧ 20ms ���ڣ�
54// 0�� ��Ӧ 0.5ms -> CCR = 50
55// 180�� ��Ӧ 2.5ms -> CCR = 250
56#define SERVO_MIN_PULSE 50
57#define SERVO_MAX_PULSE 250
58
59/**
60 * @brief ���ö����ָ���Ƕ�
61 * @param angle: Ŀ��Ƕȣ���Χ 0~180��������Χ�ᱻ���Ƶ�����߽硣
62 */
63void Servo_SetAngle(uint8_t angle)
64{
65 // �޷�
66 if (angle > 180) {
67 angle = 180;
68 }
69 // ����ӳ��Ƕȵ� CCR ֵ
70 uint16_t pulse = SERVO_MIN_PULSE +
71 (uint32_t)(angle) * (SERVO_MAX_PULSE - SERVO_MIN_PULSE) / 180;
72 // ���ñȽϼĴ���
73 TIM_SetCompare1(TIM2, pulse);
74 // �����һЩʱ�䶯��
75 Delay_ms(500);
76}
77
78
79
80
81
82

3#include "sys.h"
4
5
6/*
7*** TIM2 ���ö�ʱ��2PWM�����SG90��� ***
8
9*** PWMƵ�ʣ�50Hz ***
10
11*** �ӿڣ�PA0->���1 PA1->���2 PA2->���3 PA3->���4 ***
12
13*** ���ߣ��¼����� ***
14
15***��ע΢�Ź��ں�ѧϰ���൥Ƭ��֪ʶ��΢���������¼����š� ***
16
17*/
18
19void myServo_Init(u16 arr,u16 psc);
20
21void Servo_SetAngle(uint8_t angle);
22
23
24#endif
25
1#include "TIM3_PWM.h"
2#include "MOTOR.h"
3
4
5/**** TIM3 ���ö�ʱ��ͨ��1��2���PWM���� ***
6
7*** ���ܣ�ʵ�ֵ������ ***
8
9*** PWMƵ�ʣ�5KHz ***
10
11*** �޸�ռ�ձȺ�����TIM_SetComparex(TIMx,xxx); ***
12
13*** �ӿڣ�
14 STM32F L298N�������
15 PA6--ENA PA7--ENB
16
17*** ���ߣ��¼����� ***
18
19***��ע΢�Ź��ں�ѧϰ���൥Ƭ��֪ʶ��΢���������¼����š� ***
20
21*/
22void TIM3_PWM_Init(u16 arr,u16 psc)
23{
24 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
25 TIM_TimeBaseInitTypeDef TIM_TimeBaseStructure;
26 TIM_OCInitTypeDef TIM_OCInitStructure;
27
28 RCC_APB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB1Periph_TIM3, ENABLE); //ʹ�ܶ�ʱ��3ʱ��
29 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOA, ENABLE); //ʹ��GPIO����
30
31 //GPIO_PinRemapConfig(GPIO_PartialRemap_TIM3, ENABLE); //Timer3������ӳ�� TIM3_CH2->PB5
32
33 //��ʼ�����TIM3����ͨ��PWM���岨�ε�����(CH1->PA6 CH2->PA7)
34 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_6|GPIO_Pin_7; //TIM3_CH1��CH2
35 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_AF_PP; //�����������
36 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
37 GPIO_Init(GPIOA, &GPIO_InitStructure);//��ʼ��GPIO
38
39 //��ʼ��TIM3
40 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_Period = arr; //��������һ�������¼�װ�����Զ���װ�ؼĴ������ڵ�ֵ
41 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_Prescaler =psc; //����������ΪTIMxʱ��Ƶ�ʳ�����Ԥ��Ƶֵ
42 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_ClockDivision = 0; //����ʱ�ӷָ�:TDTS = Tck_tim
43 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_CounterMode = TIM_CounterMode_Up; //TIM���ϼ���ģʽ
44 TIM_TimeBaseInit(TIM3, &TIM_TimeBaseStructure); //����TIM_TimeBaseInitStruct��ָ���Ĳ�����ʼ��TIMx��ʱ�������λ
45
46 //��ʼ��TIM3 Channe12 PWMģʽ
47 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OCMode = TIM_OCMode_PWM1; //ѡ��ʱ��ģʽ:TIM������ȵ���ģʽ1
48 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OutputState = TIM_OutputState_Enable; //�Ƚ����ʹ��
49 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OCPolarity = TIM_OCPolarity_High; //�������:TIM����Ƚϼ��Ը�
50
51 TIM_OC1Init(TIM3, &TIM_OCInitStructure); //����ָ���Ĳ�����ʼ������TIM3 OC1
52 TIM_OC2Init(TIM3, &TIM_OCInitStructure); //����ָ���Ĳ�����ʼ������TIM3 OC2
53
54 TIM_OC1PreloadConfig(TIM3, TIM_OCPreload_Enable); //ʹ��TIM3��CCR1�ϵ�Ԥװ�ؼĴ���
55 TIM_OC2PreloadConfig(TIM3, TIM_OCPreload_Enable);
56
57 TIM_Cmd(TIM3, ENABLE); //ʹ��TIM3
58}
59

6void Trace_Init(void)
7{
8 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOB, ENABLE);
9
10 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
11
12 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_IPD;
13 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_0|GPIO_Pin_1|GPIO_Pin_10|GPIO_Pin_11; //ѭ��
14 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
15
16 GPIO_Init(GPIOB, &GPIO_InitStructure);
17}

5#define X2 GPIO_ReadInputDataBit(GPIOB,GPIO_Pin_1)

1#include "USART1.h"
2#include "sys.h"
3
4u8 RxData=0x00;
5
6/*
7*** USART1 ���ô���1��JDY-31ͨ�� ***
8
9*** �����ʣ�115200��8λ����λ��1λֹͣλ������żУ��λ ***
10
11*** �ӿڣ�PA9->TX PA10->RX ***
12
13*** ���ߣ��¼����� ***
14
15***��ע΢�Ź��ں�ѧϰ���൥Ƭ��֪ʶ��΢���������¼����š� ***
16
17*/
18void USART1_Init(uint32_t bound)
19{
20 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_Initstructure;
21 NVIC_InitTypeDef NVIC_InitStruct;
22 USART_InitTypeDef USART1_InitStructure;
23
24 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOA, ENABLE);
25 RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_USART1, ENABLE);
26
27 // USART1_TX PA9
28 GPIO_Initstructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_AF_PP; //�����������
29 GPIO_Initstructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_9;
30 GPIO_Initstructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
31 GPIO_Init(GPIOA, &GPIO_Initstructure);
32
33 // USART1_RX PA10
34 GPIO_Initstructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_IN_FLOATING; //��������
35 GPIO_Initstructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_10;
36 GPIO_Initstructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
37 GPIO_Init(GPIOA, &GPIO_Initstructure);
38
39 USART1_InitStructure.USART_BaudRate = bound;
40 USART1_InitStructure.USART_HardwareFlowControl = USART_HardwareFlowControl_None; //��Ӳ������������
41 USART1_InitStructure.USART_Mode = USART_Mode_Rx | USART_Mode_Tx; //��ģʽ
42 USART1_InitStructure.USART_Parity = USART_Parity_No; //����żУ��λ
43 USART1_InitStructure.USART_StopBits = USART_StopBits_1; //һ��ֹͣλ
44 USART1_InitStructure.USART_WordLength = USART_WordLength_8b; //�ֳ�Ϊ8λ���ݸ�ʽ
45 USART_Init(USART1, &USART1_InitStructure);
46 USART_Cmd(USART1, ENABLE); //ʹ��USART1
47
48 NVIC_InitStruct.NVIC_IRQChannel = USART1_IRQn;
49 NVIC_InitStruct.NVIC_IRQChannelCmd = ENABLE;
50 NVIC_InitStruct.NVIC_IRQChannelPreemptionPriority = 1;
51 NVIC_InitStruct.NVIC_IRQChannelSubPriority = 0;
52
53 NVIC_Init(&NVIC_InitStruct);
54// NVIC_PriorityGroupConfig(NVIC_PriorityGroup_2);
55
56 USART_ITConfig(USART1, USART_IT_RXNE, ENABLE);
57 USART_ClearFlag(USART1, USART_FLAG_TC);
58}
59
60void USART1_IRQHandler(void)
61{
62 if (USART_GetFlagStatus(USART1, USART_FLAG_RXNE) == SET)
63 {
64 //USART_ClearFlag(USART1, USART_FLAG_RXNE);
65 RxData = USART_ReceiveData(USART1); //���յ������ݴ浽 RxData
66
67// USART_SendData(USART1, RxData);
68// while (USART_GetFlagStatus(USART1, USART_FLAG_TXE) == RESET) //�ȴ����ݷ���
69// ;
70 }
71}

1#ifndef __SYS_H
2#define __SYS_H
3#include "stm32f10x.h"
4
5//0,��֧��ucos
6//1,֧��ucos
7#define SYSTEM_SUPPORT_UCOS 0 //����ϵͳ�ļ����Ƿ�֧��UCOS
8
9
10//λ������,ʵ��51���Ƶ�GPIO���ƹ���
11//����ʵ��˼��,�ο�<<CM3Ȩ��ָ��>>������(87ҳ~92ҳ).
12//IO�ڲ����궨��
13#define BITBAND(addr, bitnum) ((addr & 0xF0000000)+0x2000000+((addr &0xFFFFF)<<5)+(bitnum<<2))
14#define MEM_ADDR(addr) *((volatile unsigned long *)(addr))
15#define BIT_ADDR(addr, bitnum) MEM_ADDR(BITBAND(addr, bitnum))
16//IO�ڵ�ַӳ��
17#define GPIOA_ODR_Addr (GPIOA_BASE+12) //0x4001080C
18#define GPIOB_ODR_Addr (GPIOB_BASE+12) //0x40010C0C
19#define GPIOC_ODR_Addr (GPIOC_BASE+12) //0x4001100C
20#define GPIOD_ODR_Addr (GPIOD_BASE+12) //0x4001140C
21#define GPIOE_ODR_Addr (GPIOE_BASE+12) //0x4001180C
22#define GPIOF_ODR_Addr (GPIOF_BASE+12) //0x40011A0C
23#define GPIOG_ODR_Addr (GPIOG_BASE+12) //0x40011E0C
24
25#define GPIOA_IDR_Addr (GPIOA_BASE+8) //0x40010808
26#define GPIOB_IDR_Addr (GPIOB_BASE+8) //0x40010C08
27#define GPIOC_IDR_Addr (GPIOC_BASE+8) //0x40011008
28#define GPIOD_IDR_Addr (GPIOD_BASE+8) //0x40011408
29#define GPIOE_IDR_Addr (GPIOE_BASE+8) //0x40011808
30#define GPIOF_IDR_Addr (GPIOF_BASE+8) //0x40011A08
31#define GPIOG_IDR_Addr (GPIOG_BASE+8) //0x40011E08
32
33//IO�ڲ���,ֻ�Ե�һ��IO��!
34//ȷ��n��ֵС��16!
35#define PAout(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOA_ODR_Addr,n) //���
36#define PAin(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOA_IDR_Addr,n) //����
37
38#define PBout(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOB_ODR_Addr,n) //���
39#define PBin(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOB_IDR_Addr,n) //����
40
41#define PCout(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOC_ODR_Addr,n) //���
42#define PCin(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOC_IDR_Addr,n) //����
43
44#define PDout(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOD_ODR_Addr,n) //���
45#define PDin(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOD_IDR_Addr,n) //����
46
47#define PEout(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOE_ODR_Addr,n) //���
48#define PEin(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOE_IDR_Addr,n) //����
49
50#define PFout(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOF_ODR_Addr,n) //���
51#define PFin(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOF_IDR_Addr,n) //����
52
53#define PGout(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOG_ODR_Addr,n) //���
54#define PGin(n) BIT_ADDR(GPIOG_IDR_Addr,n) //����
55

3#include "ui_adddishwidget.h"
4
5#include <QFileDialog>
6#include <QMessageBox>
7#include <QSqlTableModel>
8#include <QSqlRecord>
9#include <QSqlError>
10
11AddDishWidget::AddDishWidget(QWidget *parent) :
12 QWidget(parent),
13 ui(new Ui::AddDishWidget)
14{
15 ui->setupUi(this);
16}
17
18AddDishWidget::~AddDishWidget()
19{
20 delete ui;
21}
22
23void AddDishWidget::on_choose_btn_clicked()
24{
25 //弹出文件选择框选图片
26 QString filepath = QFileDialog::getOpenFileName( this , "选择菜品图片" , "" , "Images (*.png *.jpg *.jpeg)");
27
28 if(!filepath.isEmpty())
29 {
30 //保存路径
31 tmp_path = filepath;
32
33 //显示图片
34 QPixmap pix(filepath);
35 //ui->showlabel->setPixmap(filepath);
36
37 //自适应显示大小
38 ui->showlabel->setPixmap(pix.scaled(ui->showlabel->size(),Qt::KeepAspectRatio,Qt::SmoothTransformation));
39
40 }
41}
42
43void AddDishWidget::on_confirm_btn_clicked()
44{
45 //提取输入框的数据
46 QString name = ui->nameEdit->text();
47 double price = ui->priceEdit->text().toDouble();
48 double zhekou = ui->zhekouEdit->text().toDouble();
49 QString type = ui->type_box->currentText();
50 QString tuijian = ui->tuijian_box->currentText();
51 QString jieshao = ui->jieshaoEdit->toPlainText();
52
53 if(name.isEmpty())
54 {
55 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "菜品不能为空");
56 return ;
57 }
58
59 int flag = (tuijian == "推荐") ? 1 : 0;
60
61 //数据库操作
62 QSqlTableModel model;
63 model.setTable("Menu");
64
65 QSqlRecord record = model.record();
66
67 record.setValue("name" , name);
68 record.setValue("type" , type);
69 record.setValue("price" , price);
70 record.setValue("discount" , zhekou);
71 record.setValue("recommend" , tuijian);
72 record.setValue("description" , jieshao);
73 record.setValue("image_path" , tmp_path);
74 record.setValue("flag" , flag);
75
76 if(model.insertRecord( -1 , record))
77 {
78 QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "成功录入菜品");
79
80 ui->nameEdit->clear();
81 ui->priceEdit->clear();
82 ui->zhekouEdit->clear();
83 ui->showlabel->clear();
84 ui->showlabel->setText("预览图片");
85 tmp_path.clear();
86
87 emit sig_addSuccess();
88 this->close();
89
90 }
91 else{
92 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "录入菜品失败!");
93 }
94}
95
1#ifndef ADDDISHWIDGET_H
2#define ADDDISHWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5
6namespace Ui {
7class AddDishWidget;
8}
9
10class AddDishWidget : public QWidget
11{
12 Q_OBJECT
13
14public:
15 explicit AddDishWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
16 ~AddDishWidget();
17
18signals:
19 void sig_addSuccess();
20
21private slots:
22 void on_choose_btn_clicked();
23
24 void on_confirm_btn_clicked();
25
26private:
27 Ui::AddDishWidget *ui;
28
29 QString tmp_path;
30};
31
32#endif // ADDDISHWIDGET_H
33
1<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>AddDishWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="AddDishWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>488</width>
10 <height>377</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* ==================================
18 1. 窗口底色：高端炭灰色 (类似高级餐厅的石板桌面)
19 ================================== */
20QWidget {
21 background-color: #2b2b2b;
22}
23
24/* ==================================
25 2. 文本标签：奶油香草白
26 ================================== */
27QLabel {
28 color: #f3e5ab; /* 柔和的香草奶油色，比纯白更护眼且温馨 */
29 font-size: 15px;
30 font-weight: bold;
31 background-color: transparent;
32}
33
34/* ==================================
35 3. 输入框 (左侧表单)：黑巧克力底色 + 琥珀金光泽
36 ================================== */
37QLineEdit {
38 background-color: #383838; /* 稍亮的黑灰色 */
39 border: 1px solid #555555;
40 border-radius: 6px;
41 color: #ffffff;
42 font-size: 14px;
43 padding: 8px;
44 min-width: 150px;
45}
46QLineEdit:focus {
47 border: 1px solid #f39c12; /* 🌟 聚焦时亮起温暖的琥珀金边框！ */
48 background-color: #404040;
49}
50
51/* ==================================
52 4. 下拉选择框 (类型/推荐)
53 ================================== */
54QComboBox {
55 background-color: #383838;
56 border: 1px solid #555555;
57 border-radius: 6px;
58 color: #ffffff;
59 padding: 6px 10px;
60 font-size: 14px;
61 min-height: 25px;
62}
63QComboBox:focus {
64 border: 1px solid #f39c12;
65}
66QComboBox::drop-down {
67 border: none;
68 width: 30px;
69}
70QComboBox QAbstractItemView {
71 background-color: #383838;
72 color: white;
73 border: 1px solid #555555;
74 selection-background-color: #f39c12; /* 划过选项时显示琥珀金 */
75 selection-color: black;
76}
77
78/* ==================================
79 5. 图片预览区：高级菜谱占位框
80 ================================== */
81QLabel#showlabel {
82 background-color: #383838;
83 border: 2px dashed #888888; /* 柔和的虚线 */
84 border-radius: 8px;
85 color: #aaaaaa;
86 min-width: 160px;
87 min-height: 160px;
88 qproperty-alignment: AlignCenter;
89}
90
91/* ==================================
92 6. 按钮组：让人充满食欲的暖色引导
93 ================================== */
94/* 次要按钮：选择图片 (琥珀金描边) */
95QPushButton#choose_btn {
96 background-color: transparent;
97 border: 1px solid #f39c12;
98 color: #f39c12;
99 border-radius: 6px;
100 padding: 8px 15px;
101 font-size: 14px;
102 font-weight: bold;
103}
104QPushButton#choose_btn:hover {
105 background-color: rgba(243, 156, 18, 40); /* 微微透出温暖的金光 */
106}
107
108/* 🌟 核心大按钮：确定录入 (活力甜橙色/烤肉色) */
109QPushButton#confirm_btn {
110 background-color: #e67e22; /* 充满食欲的甜橙色 */
111 border: none;
112 color: #ffffff; /* 纯白文字更清晰 */
113 font-size: 16px;
114 font-weight: bold;
115 border-radius: 8px;
116 min-height: 40px;
117}
118QPushButton#confirm_btn:hover {
119 background-color: #d35400; /* 鼠标放上去变成更深的焦糖橙色 */
120}
121QPushButton#confirm_btn:pressed {
122 background-color: #c0392b; /* 按下去有真实的物理反馈感 */
123}</string>
124 </property>

244 <string notr="true">/* 专属介绍框的样式 */
245QTextEdit#jieshaoEdit {
246 color: #ffb142; /* 🌟 把文字变成你主题的高亮橙色，或者换成纯白 #ffffff */

248 line-height: 1.5; /* 增加行高，多行文字看着不累 */

1QT += core gui network
2
3greaterThan(QT_MAJOR_VERSION, 4): QT += widgets
4
5CONFIG += c++11
6
7# The following define makes your compiler emit warnings if you use
8# any Qt feature that has been marked deprecated (the exact warnings
9# depend on your compiler). Please consult the documentation of the
10# deprecated API in order to know how to port your code away from it.
11DEFINES += QT_DEPRECATED_WARNINGS
12
13# You can also make your code fail to compile if it uses deprecated APIs.
14# In order to do so, uncomment the following line.
15# You can also select to disable deprecated APIs only up to a certain version of Qt.
16#DEFINES += QT_DISABLE_DEPRECATED_BEFORE=0x060000 # disables all the APIs deprecated before Qt 6.0.0
17
18SOURCES += \
19 dishitem.cpp \
20 main.cpp \
21 loginwidget.cpp \
22 menuwidget.cpp \
23 orderwidget.cpp \
24 peonumwidget.cpp \
25 registerwidget.cpp \
26 tablewidget.cpp
27
28HEADERS += \
29 dishitem.h \
30 loginwidget.h \
31 menuwidget.h \
32 orderwidget.h \
33 peonumwidget.h \
34 registerwidget.h \
35 tablewidget.h
36
37FORMS += \
38 dishitem.ui \
39 loginwidget.ui \
40 menuwidget.ui \
41 orderwidget.ui \
42 peonumwidget.ui \
43 registerwidget.ui \
44 tablewidget.ui
45
46# Default rules for deployment.
47qnx: target.path = /tmp/$${TARGET}/bin
48else: unix:!android: target.path = /opt/$${TARGET}/bin
49!isEmpty(target.path): INSTALLS += target
50
51RESOURCES += \
52 res.qrc

1#include "dishitem.h"
2#include "ui_dishitem.h"
3#include <QDebug>
4
5DishItem::DishItem(QWidget *parent) :
6 QWidget(parent),
7 ui(new Ui::DishItem)
8{
9 ui->setupUi(this);
10 ui->recommendLabel->hide();
11
12 connect(ui->addBtn , &QPushButton::clicked , [&](){
13
14 //发送信号
15 emit sig_addDish(this->q_name , this->q_price);
16 });
17}
18
19DishItem::~DishItem()
20{
21 delete ui;
22}
23
24
25
26void DishItem::setDishData(QString name , double price , QString path , int flag , double discount , QString description)
27{
28 ui->nameLabel->setText(name);
29 this->q_name = name;
30 //ui->priceLabel->setText(QString("$%1").arg(price));
31
32 if(discount > 0 && discount < 1.0)
33 {
34 double finalPrice = price * discount; // 计算折后价
35
36 this->q_price = finalPrice;
37
38 // 使用 HTML 富文本：灰色删除线画掉原价，红色加粗显示现价！
39 QString priceHtml = QString("<html><body><span style='text-decoration: line-through; color: #888888; font-size: 12px;'>$%1</span> <span style='color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px;'>$%2</span></body></html>")
40 .arg(price, 0, 'f', 2)
41 .arg(finalPrice, 0, 'f', 2);
42 ui->priceLabel->setText(priceHtml);
43
44 }
45 else
46 {
47 this->q_price = price;
48 // 没有折扣，原价原色显示
49 ui->priceLabel->setText(QString("$%1").arg(price, 0, 'f', 2));
50 }
51
52 if(flag == 1)
53 {
54 ui->recommendLabel->show();
55 }
56 else
57 {
58 ui->recommendLabel->hide();
59 }
60
61
62 //显示图片
63 QPixmap pix(path);
64
65 if(pix.isNull())
66 {
67 qDebug() << "图片路径不对，没找着：" << path;
68 }
69
70 ui->imgLable->setPixmap(pix);
71 ui->descLabel->setText(description);
72
73}
74
1#ifndef DISHITEM_H
2#define DISHITEM_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5
6namespace Ui {
7class DishItem;
8}
9
10class DishItem : public QWidget
11{
12 Q_OBJECT
13
14public:
15 explicit DishItem(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
16 ~DishItem();
17
18 void setDishData( QString name , double price , QString path , int flag , double discount , QString description );
19
20signals:
21 void sig_addDish(QString name, double price);
22
23private:
24 Ui::DishItem *ui;
25
26 QString q_name;
27 double q_price;
28};
29
30#endif // DISHITEM_H
31
1<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>DishItem</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="DishItem">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>267</width>
10 <height>332</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* =========================================================
18 DishItem 终极精修样式表 (面试验收版)
19 解决问题：图片缩水、圆角不裁切、留白过多、控件偏位
20========================================================= */
21
22/* 1. 最外层透明，露出主界面背景，产生卡片间距 */
23QWidget#DishItem {
24 background-color: transparent;
25 border: none;
26}
27
28/* 2. 真正的卡片本体：纯白、大圆角、淡淡的描边 */
29QFrame#carFrame {
30 background-color: #FFFFFF;
31 border-radius: 16px; /* 商业级大圆角 */
32 border: 1px solid #EBEEF5; /* 极细的浅灰色边框 */
33 /* 关键修正：确保背景颜色不溢出 */
34 background-clip: padding-box;
35}
36
37/* 鼠标悬停特效：面试加分点 */
38QFrame#carFrame:hover {
39 border: 1px solid #FF9F1A; /* 悬停时边框变亮橙色 */
40}
41
42/* =========================================================
43 3. 图片 Label：这是之前的最大病灶！
44 核心修正：强制图片占满卡片上半部分，裁剪多余 Margin。
45========================================================= */
46QLabel#imgLable {
47 /* 核心代码：裁切超出圆角的部分，这样图片上方也会变圆！
48 这是 Qt 裁切图片圆角的唯一保底方案。 */
49 border-top-left-radius: 16px;
50 border-top-right-radius: 16px;
51 border-bottom-left-radius: 0px;
52 border-bottom-right-radius: 0px;
53
54 /* 强制背景色，如果图片加载失败也能看出圆角 */
55 background-color: #F5F7FA;
56
57 /* 移除所有 padding 和 margin，防止布局强行把图片缩小 */
58 padding: 0px;
59 margin: 0px;
60 border: none;
61
62 /* 强制图片 Label 本身居中显示，双重保险 */
63 qproperty-alignment: 'AlignCenter';
64}
65
66/* 4. 菜名：增加顶部间距，和图片拉开距离，增加 padding-left 更有层次感 */
67QLabel#nameLabel {
68 color: #303133;
69 font-size: 16px;
70 font-weight: bold;
71 font-family: &quot;Microsoft YaHei&quot;;
72
73 /* 关键修正：移除 margin-top，改用 spacing 调控，
74 防止布局错乱。如果还要拉开距离，可以轻微启用下方 padding */
75 padding-top: 8px;
76 padding-left: 10px;
77 padding-bottom: 2px;
78}
79
80/* 5. 价格：品牌橙色，加大加粗，Arial 字体更洋气 */
81QLabel#priceLabel {
82 color: #FF9F1A;
83 font-size: 18px;
84 font-weight: 900;
85 font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;;
86 padding-left: 10px;
87 padding-bottom: 8px; /* 给底部留出呼吸空间 */
88}
89
90/* 6. 橙色圆形加号按钮：极其醒目！ */
91QPushButton#addBtn {
92 background-color: #FF9F1A;
93 color: #FFFFFF;
94 border: none;
95 font-size: 24px;
96 font-weight: bold;
97
98 /* 重点：宽高一致，圆角设为一半，就是完美的圆形！ */
99 min-width: 32px;
100 max-width: 32px;
101 min-height: 32px;
102 max-height: 32px;
103 border-radius: 16px;
104
105 /* 修正边距，防止挤压文字布局 */
106 margin-right: 12px;
107 margin-bottom: 12px;
108}
109QPushButton#addBtn:hover {
110 background-color: #FFAA33;
111}
112QPushButton#addBtn:pressed {
113 background-color: #E68A00;
114}</string>
115 </property>

122 </property>
123 <property name="rightMargin">
124 <number>12</number>
125 </property>
126 <property name="bottomMargin">
127 <number>12</number>
128 </property>

213 </property>
214 </widget>
215 <widget class="QLabel" name="priceLabel">
216 <property name="geometry">
217 <rect>
218 <x>10</x>
219 <y>260</y>
220 <width>191</width>
221 <height>34</height>
222 </rect>
223 </property>
224 <property name="sizePolicy">
225 <sizepolicy hsizetype="Preferred" vsizetype="Preferred">
226 <horstretch>0</horstretch>
227 <verstretch>0</verstretch>
228 </sizepolicy>
229 </property>
230 <property name="text">
231 <string>$35.00</string>
232 </property>
233 </widget>
234 <widget class="QLabel" name="recommendLabel">
235 <property name="enabled">
236 <bool>true</bool>
237 </property>
238 <property name="geometry">
239 <rect>
240 <x>190</x>
241 <y>0</y>
242 <width>58</width>
243 <height>24</height>
244 </rect>
245 </property>
246 <property name="styleSheet">
247 <string notr="true">/* ==================================
248 🌟 核心美化：餐厅推荐标签 (QLabel#recommendLabel)
249 ================================== */
250QLabel#recommendLabel {
251 /* 1. 色彩：鲜艳的爆款红，极具视觉冲击力 */
252 background-color: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0 #e74c3c, stop:1 #c0392b);
253 color: white; /* 白色文字，对比鲜明 */
254
255 /* 2. 形状：精致的圆角切片标签 */
256 border-radius: 4px; /* 轻微圆角 */
257 /* 如果你把它放在右上角，可以用这种不规则圆角更有设计感 */
258 border-top-right-radius: 8px;
259 border-bottom-left-radius: 8px;
260 border-top-left-radius: 0px;
261 border-bottom-right-radius: 0px;
262
263 /* 3. 字体与间距 */
264 font-family: &quot;Microsoft YaHei&quot;, sans-serif;
265 font-size: 11px; /* 字体不用太大，精致为主 */
266 font-weight: bold; /* 加粗突出 */
267 padding: 3px 8px; /* 增加内边距，让标签更饱满 */
268
269 /* 4. 定义最小尺寸，防止文字很少时缩成一团 */
270 min-width: 40px;
271 min-height: 16px;
272
273 /* 5. 添加淡淡的阴影，使其更具悬浮感 */
274 border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 20);
275}</string>
276 </property>
277 <property name="text">
278 <string>★ 推荐</string>
279 </property>
280 </widget>
281 <widget class="QLabel" name="descLabel">
282 <property name="geometry">
283 <rect>
284 <x>30</x>
285 <y>220</y>
286 <width>131</width>
287 <height>31</height>
288 </rect>
289 </property>
290 <property name="styleSheet">
291 <string notr="true">color: #888888; font-size: 10pt;</string>
292 </property>
293 <property name="text">
294 <string>菜品介绍</string>
295 </property>
296 <property name="wordWrap">
297 <bool>true</bool>
298 </property>
299 </widget>
300 </widget>
301 </item>
302 </layout>
303 </widget>
304 <resources/>
305 <connections/>
306</ui>

1#include "loginwidget.h"
2#include "registerwidget.h"
3#include "serverwidget.h"
4#include "ui_loginwidget.h"
5#include <QMessageBox>
6#include <QFile>
7#include <QJsonDocument>
8#include <array>
9#include <QJsonArray>
10#include <QJsonObject>
11#include <QGraphicsDropShadowEffect>
12
13QString name = "1";
14QString passwd = "1";
15
16loginWidget::loginWidget(QWidget *parent) :
17 QWidget(parent),
18 ui(new Ui::loginWidget)
19{
20 ui->setupUi(this);
21 ui->userEdit->setFocus();
22
23 QLabel *bgLabel = new QLabel(this);
24
25 // 2. 加载你的背景图片 (注意替换成你实际的路径，比如 ":/bg.jpg")
26 bgLabel->setPixmap(QPixmap(":/fwdl.jpeg"));
27
28 // 3. 让图片自动缩放填满窗口
29 bgLabel->setScaledContents(true);
30 bgLabel->setGeometry(this->rect());
31
32 // 4. 【核心点】：把这个标签“沉底”，放到最下层，这样就不会挡住你的登录框
33 bgLabel->lower();
34
35 // 5. 召唤 Qt 的模糊魔法特效
36 QGraphicsBlurEffect *blurEffect = new QGraphicsBlurEffect(this);
37
38 // 6. 设置模糊程度 (数值越大越模糊，10~20 之间比较合适)
39 blurEffect->setBlurRadius(2);
40
41 // 7. 将模糊魔法只施加给底层背景标签
42 bgLabel->setGraphicsEffect(blurEffect);
43}
44
45loginWidget::~loginWidget()
46{
47 delete ui;
48}
49
50void loginWidget::on_loginBtn_clicked()
51{
52 QString username = ui->userEdit->text();
53 QString password = ui->passwdEdit->text();
54
55 QFile file("root.json");
56 if(!file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly))
57 {
58 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "文件打开失败");
59 }
60
61 QByteArray data = file.readAll();
62 file.close();
63
64 //将原始的json数据一次性解析为QJsonArray对象
65 QJsonArray Array = QJsonDocument::fromJson(data).array();
66
67 bool flag = false;
68 for ( int i = 0; i < Array.size() ; i++ )
69 {
70 QJsonObject obj = Array[i].toObject();
71
72 QString saveuser = obj.value("account").toString();
73 QString savepasswd = obj.value("password").toString();
74
75 if(saveuser == username && savepasswd == password)
76 {
77 flag = true;
78 break;
79 }
80 }
81 if(flag == false)
82 {
83 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "登录失败");
84 }
85 else
86 {
87 QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "登录成功");
88
89 ServerWidget * ser = new ServerWidget();
90 ser->show();
91 this->hide();
92 }
93
94}
95
96void loginWidget::on_regAdminBtn_clicked()
97{
98 RegisterWidget * reg = new RegisterWidget();
99 reg->show();
100
101 this->hide();
102}
103
1#include "loginwidget.h"
2#include "registerwidget.h"
3#include "serverwidget.h"
4#include "ui_loginwidget.h"
5#include <QMessageBox>
6#include <QFile>
7#include <QJsonDocument>
8#include <array>
9#include <QJsonArray>
10#include <QJsonObject>
11#include <QGraphicsDropShadowEffect>
12
13QString name = "1";
14QString passwd = "1";
15
16loginWidget::loginWidget(QWidget *parent) :
17 QWidget(parent),
18 ui(new Ui::loginWidget)
19{
20 ui->setupUi(this);
21 ui->userEdit->setFocus();
22
23 QLabel *bgLabel = new QLabel(this);
24
25 // 2. 加载你的背景图片 (注意替换成你实际的路径，比如 ":/bg.jpg")
26 bgLabel->setPixmap(QPixmap(":/fwdl.jpeg"));
27
28 // 3. 让图片自动缩放填满窗口
29 bgLabel->setScaledContents(true);
30 bgLabel->setGeometry(this->rect());
31
32 // 4. 【核心点】：把这个标签“沉底”，放到最下层，这样就不会挡住你的登录框
33 bgLabel->lower();
34
35 // 5. 召唤 Qt 的模糊魔法特效
36 QGraphicsBlurEffect *blurEffect = new QGraphicsBlurEffect(this);
37
38 // 6. 设置模糊程度 (数值越大越模糊，10~20 之间比较合适)
39 blurEffect->setBlurRadius(2);
40
41 // 7. 将模糊魔法只施加给底层背景标签
42 bgLabel->setGraphicsEffect(blurEffect);
43}
44
45loginWidget::~loginWidget()
46{
47 delete ui;
48}
49
50void loginWidget::on_loginBtn_clicked()
51{
52 QString username = ui->userEdit->text();
53 QString password = ui->passwdEdit->text();
54
55 QFile file("root.json");
56 if(!file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly))
57 {
58 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "文件打开失败");
59 }
60
61 QByteArray data = file.readAll();
62 file.close();
63
64 //将原始的json数据一次性解析为QJsonArray对象
65 QJsonArray Array = QJsonDocument::fromJson(data).array();
66
67 bool flag = false;
68 for ( int i = 0; i < Array.size() ; i++ )
69 {
70 QJsonObject obj = Array[i].toObject();
71
72 QString saveuser = obj.value("account").toString();
73 QString savepasswd = obj.value("password").toString();
74
75 if(saveuser == username && savepasswd == password)
76 {
77 flag = true;
78 break;
79 }
80 }
81 if(flag == false)
82 {
83 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "登录失败");
84 }
85 else
86 {
87 QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "登录成功");
88
89 ServerWidget * ser = new ServerWidget();
90 ser->show();
91 this->hide();
92 }
93
94}
95
96void loginWidget::on_regAdminBtn_clicked()
97{
98 RegisterWidget * reg = new RegisterWidget();
99 reg->show();
100
101 this->hide();
102}
103
1#ifndef LOGINWIDGET_H
2#define LOGINWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5
6namespace Ui {
7class loginWidget;
8}
9
10class loginWidget : public QWidget
11{
12 Q_OBJECT
13
14public:
15 explicit loginWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
16 ~loginWidget();
17
18private slots:
19
20 void on_loginBtn_clicked();
21
22 void on_regAdminBtn_clicked();
23
24private:
25 Ui::loginWidget *ui;
26};
27
28#endif // LOGINWIDGET_H
29
1#ifndef LOGINWIDGET_H
2#define LOGINWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5
6namespace Ui {
7class loginWidget;
8}
9
10class loginWidget : public QWidget
11{
12 Q_OBJECT
13
14public:
15 explicit loginWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
16 ~loginWidget();
17
18private slots:
19
20 void on_loginBtn_clicked();
21
22 void on_regAdminBtn_clicked();
23
24private:
25 Ui::loginWidget *ui;
26};
27
28#endif // LOGINWIDGET_H

1<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>loginWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="loginWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>622</width>
10 <height>500</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* ==================================
18 1. 核心悬浮卡片 (产生高级毛玻璃质感)
19 ================================== */
20QFrame#loginCard {
21 background-color: rgba(20, 15, 10, 200); /* 极深的黑咖啡色，带透光感 */
22 border: 1px solid #3a2518; /* 边缘微光 */
23 border-radius: 15px; /* 圆润的倒角 */
24}
25
26/* ==================================
27 2. 基础文字标签 (账号、密码)
28 ================================== */
29QLabel {
30 color: #f3e5ab; /* 柔和的香草白金 */
31 font-size: 16px;
32 font-weight: bold;
33 background: transparent;
34}
35
36/* ==================================
37 3. 输入框 (废弃下划线，改用高级实体框)
38 ================================== */
39QLineEdit {
40 background-color: rgba(60, 35, 20, 150); /* 红木色半透明底 */
41 color: #ffffff;
42 border: 1px solid #8d4925; /* 焦糖色边框 */
43 border-radius: 6px;
44 padding: 8px 12px;
45 font-size: 14px;
46}
47
48QLineEdit:focus {
49 border: 2px solid #d4af37; /* 聚焦时亮起尊贵的琥珀金边框 */
50 background-color: rgba(30, 15, 5, 220);
51}
52
53/* ==================================
54 4. 主按钮：登录 (尊贵渐变金)
55 ================================== */
56QPushButton#loginBtn {
57 background-color: qlineargradient(spread:pad, x1:0, y1:1, x2:0, y2:0, stop:0 #8d4925, stop:1 #b85e2a);
58 color: #ffffff;
59 font-size: 16px;
60 font-weight: bold;
61 border: 1px solid #5c2d15;
62 border-radius: 8px;
63 padding: 10px 0px;
64}
65
66QPushButton#loginBtn:hover {
67 background-color: qlineargradient(spread:pad, x1:0, y1:1, x2:0, y2:0, stop:0 #a0522d, stop:1 #cc6a30);
68}
69
70QPushButton#loginBtn:pressed {
71 background-color: #5c2d15;
72 padding-top: 12px;
73 padding-bottom: 8px;
74}
75
76/* ==================================
77 5. 副按钮：注册新管理员 (黑底金边，低调奢华)
78 ================================== */
79QPushButton#regAdminBtn {
80 background-color: transparent;
81 color: #d4af37;
82 font-size: 14px;
83 font-weight: bold;
84 border: 1px solid #d4af37;
85 border-radius: 8px;
86 padding: 8px 0px;
87}
88
89QPushButton#regAdminBtn:hover {
90 background-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 30); /* 微微透出温暖的金光 */
91}
92
93QPushButton#regAdminBtn:pressed {
94 background-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 60);
95 padding-top: 10px;
96 padding-bottom: 6px;
97}</string>
98 </property>

17 <string notr="true">/* ==================================
18 1. 核心悬浮卡片 (产生高级毛玻璃质感)
19 ================================== */
20QFrame#loginCard {
21 background-color: rgba(20, 15, 10, 200); /* 极深的黑咖啡色，带透光感 */
22 border: 1px solid #3a2518; /* 边缘微光 */
23 border-radius: 15px; /* 圆润的倒角 */
24}
25
26/* ==================================
27 2. 基础文字标签 (账号、密码)
28 ================================== */
29QLabel {
30 color: #f3e5ab; /* 柔和的香草白金 */
31 font-size: 16px;
32 font-weight: bold;
33 background: transparent;
34}
35
36/* ==================================
37 3. 输入框 (废弃下划线，改用高级实体框)
38 ================================== */
39QLineEdit {
40 background-color: rgba(60, 35, 20, 150); /* 红木色半透明底 */
41 color: #ffffff;
42 border: 1px solid #8d4925; /* 焦糖色边框 */
43 border-radius: 6px;
44 padding: 8px 12px;
45 font-size: 14px;
46}
47
48QLineEdit:focus {
49 border: 2px solid #d4af37; /* 聚焦时亮起尊贵的琥珀金边框 */
50 background-color: rgba(30, 15, 5, 220);
51}
52
53/* ==================================
54 4. 主按钮：登录 (尊贵渐变金)
55 ================================== */
56QPushButton#loginBtn {
57 background-color: qlineargradient(spread:pad, x1:0, y1:1, x2:0, y2:0, stop:0 #8d4925, stop:1 #b85e2a);
58 color: #ffffff;
59 font-size: 16px;
60 font-weight: bold;
61 border: 1px solid #5c2d15;
62 border-radius: 8px;
63 padding: 10px 0px;
64}
65
66QPushButton#loginBtn:hover {
67 background-color: qlineargradient(spread:pad, x1:0, y1:1, x2:0, y2:0, stop:0 #a0522d, stop:1 #cc6a30);
68}
69
70QPushButton#loginBtn:pressed {
71 background-color: #5c2d15;
72 padding-top: 12px;
73 padding-bottom: 8px;
74}
75
76/* ==================================
77 5. 副按钮：注册新管理员 (黑底金边，低调奢华)
78 ================================== */
79QPushButton#regAdminBtn {
80 background-color: transparent;
81 color: #d4af37;
82 font-size: 14px;
83 font-weight: bold;
84 border: 1px solid #d4af37;
85 border-radius: 8px;
86 padding: 8px 0px;
87}
88
89QPushButton#regAdminBtn:hover {
90 background-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 30); /* 微微透出温暖的金光 */
91}
92
93QPushButton#regAdminBtn:pressed {
94 background-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 60);
95 padding-top: 10px;
96 padding-bottom: 6px;
97}</string>

1#include "menuwidget.h"
2#include "ui_menuwidget.h"
3#include "dishitem.h"
4#include "orderwidget.h"
5
6#include <QMessageBox>
7#include <QJsonObject>
8#include <QJsonArray>
9#include <QJsonDocument>
10#include <QGraphicsDropShadowEffect> //渲染
11
12#include <QDir>
13#include <QFile>
14#include <QFileInfo>
15#include <QJsonDocument>
16#include <qjsondocument.h>
17
18MenuWidget::MenuWidget(QWidget *parent) :
19 QWidget(parent),
20 ui(new Ui::MenuWidget)
21{
22 ui->setupUi(this);
23
24 // 1. 动态创建一个专门放背景图的标签
25 QLabel *bgLabel = new QLabel(this);
26
27 // 2. 加载你的背景图片 (注意替换成你实际的路径，比如 ":/bg.jpg")
28 bgLabel->setPixmap(QPixmap(":/99.png"));
29
30 // 3. 让图片自动缩放填满窗口
31 bgLabel->setScaledContents(true);
32 bgLabel->setGeometry(this->rect());
33
34 // 4. 【核心点】：把这个标签“沉底”，放到最下层，这样就不会挡住你的登录框
35 bgLabel->lower();
36
37 // 5. 召唤 Qt 的模糊魔法特效
38 QGraphicsBlurEffect *blurEffect = new QGraphicsBlurEffect(this);
39
40 // 6. 设置模糊程度 (数值越大越模糊，10~20 之间比较合适)
41 blurEffect->setBlurRadius(3);
42
43 // 7. 将模糊魔法只施加给底层背景标签
44 bgLabel->setGraphicsEffect(blurEffect);
45
46 //测试
47// dishList.append({"凉拌", 35.0, "凉菜" , ":/lb.jpg"});
48// dishList.append({"紫菜牛肉丸", 42.0 , "热菜" , ":/2.jpg"});
49// dishList.append({"可乐", 25.0 , "饮料" , ":/kl.jpg"});
50// dishList.append({"生腌", 45.0 , "其它" , ":/sy.jpg"});
51// dishList.append({"苦瓜酿肉汤", 68.0 , "汤" , ":/kgnr.jpg"});
52
53// dishList.append({"凉拌", 35.0, "凉菜" , ":/lb.jpg"});
54// dishList.append({"紫菜牛肉丸", 42.0 , "热菜" , ":/2.jpg"});
55// dishList.append({"可乐", 25.0 , "饮料" , ":/kl.jpg"});
56// dishList.append({"生腌", 45.0 , "其它" , ":/sy.jpg"});
57// dishList.append({"苦瓜酿肉汤", 68.0 , "汤" , ":/kgnr.jpg"});
58
59// dishList.append({"凉拌", 35.0, "凉菜" , ":/lb.jpg"});
60// dishList.append({"紫菜牛肉丸", 42.0 , "热菜" , ":/2.jpg"});
61// dishList.append({"可乐", 25.0 , "饮料" , ":/kl.jpg"});
62// dishList.append({"生腌", 45.0 , "其它" , ":/sy.jpg"});
63// dishList.append({"苦瓜酿肉汤", 68.0 , "汤" , ":/kgnr.jpg"});
64
65// dishList.append({"凉拌", 35.0, "凉菜" , ":/lb.jpg"});
66// dishList.append({"紫菜牛肉丸", 42.0 , "热菜" , ":/2.jpg"});
67// dishList.append({"可乐", 25.0 , "饮料" , ":/kl.jpg"});
68// dishList.append({"生腌", 45.0 , "其它" , ":/sy.jpg"});
69// dishList.append({"苦瓜酿肉汤", 68.0 , "汤" , ":/kgnr.jpg"});
70
71 showDish("热菜");
72
73 socket = new QTcpSocket();
74 connect( socket , &QTcpSocket::connected , [&](){
75
76 //测试
77 //QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "连接成功");
78
79 QJsonObject obj;
80 obj.insert("type" , "GetMenu");
81
82 QJsonDocument doc(obj);
83 QByteArray data = doc.toJson();
84
85 socket->write(data);
86 });
87
88
89 connect( socket , &QTcpSocket::readyRead , this , [=](){
90
91 //处理粘包：先把所有收到的数据装进水桶---ai优化
92 m_buffer.append(socket->readAll());
93
94 // 只要水桶里有数据，就循环拆解包裹
95 while (!m_buffer.isEmpty()) {
96 QJsonParseError error;
97 QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(m_buffer , &error);
98 QJsonDocument currentDoc;
99
100 // 拆解逻辑判定
101 if (error.error == QJsonParseError::NoError) {
102 // 正好是一个完整包
103 currentDoc = doc;
104 m_buffer.clear();
105 } else if (error.error == QJsonParseError::GarbageAtEnd) {
106 // 粘包了！把第一个包切下来
107 QByteArray onePacket = m_buffer.left(error.offset);
108 currentDoc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(onePacket);
109 // 剩下的留给下一次循环切
110 m_buffer = m_buffer.mid(error.offset);
111 } else {
112 // 半包，不够凑成一个完整的json，直接退出循环，等下一次readyRead继续收
113 break;
114 }
115
116 //数据正确：使用拆解出来的 currentDoc 进行解析
117 if(currentDoc.isObject())
118 {
119 QJsonObject root = currentDoc.object();
120 QString type = root.value("type").toString();
121
122 if(type == "MenuData")
123 {
124 QJsonArray array = root.value("dishes").toArray();
125
126 dishList.clear();
127
128 for(int i = 0 ; i < array.size() ; i++)
129 {
130 QJsonObject obj = array[i].toObject();
131
132 QString name = obj.value("name").toString();
133 double price = obj.value("price").toDouble();
134 QString vegtype = obj.value("type").toString();
135 QString imagepath = obj.value("image_path").toString();
136 QString desc = obj.value("description").toString();
137
138 int flag = obj.value("flag").toInt();
139 double discount = obj.value("discount").toDouble();
140
141 //把服务器的数据存入到本地的结构体列表
142 dishList.append({name , price , vegtype , imagepath , flag , discount , desc});
143 }
144 showDish("热菜");
145 }
146 else if(type == "ImageData")//处理服务器发来的 Base64 图片数据---ai优化
147 {
148 //拿到原始路径和图片数据
149 QString imagepath = root.value("image_path").toString();
150 QString base64Data = root.value("data").toString();
151
152 //提取文件名
153 QFileInfo info(imagepath);
154 QString filename = info.fileName();
155
156 //检查本地有没有cache文件夹
157 QDir dir;
158 if(!dir.exists("cache"))
159 {
160 dir.mkpath("cache");
161 }
162
163 //拼接路径
164 QString localpath = "cache/" + filename;
165
166 //还原成二进制图片数据
167 QByteArray imgdata = QByteArray::fromBase64(base64Data.toUtf8());
168
169 //存入本地
170 QFile file(localpath);
171 if(file.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly))
172 {
173 file.write(imgdata);
174 file.close();
175
176 showDish(this->m_currentCategory);
177 }
178 }
179 }
180 }
181 });
182
183 socket->connectToHost("127.0.0.1" , 8888);
184 //socket->connectToHost("192.168.172.68", 8888);
185 qDebug() << "连接服务器成功";
186
187}
188
189MenuWidget::~MenuWidget()
190{
191 delete ui;
192}
193
194
195void MenuWidget::showDish(QString vegtype)
196{
197 ui->tableWidget_dishes->clearContents();
198 ui->tableWidget_dishes->setRowCount(0);
199
200 QVector<Dish> TmpList;
201 for(int i = 0; i < dishList.size();i++)
202 {
203 if(dishList[i].type == vegtype)
204 {
205 TmpList.append(dishList[i]);
206 }
207 }
208
209 // 3列
210 int colCount = 3;
211
212 // 根据菜品的总数，计算需要多少行
213 int rowCount = ( TmpList.size() + colCount - 1) / colCount;
214 ui->tableWidget_dishes->setRowCount(rowCount);
215
216 // 遍历 QVector
217 for (int i = 0; i < TmpList.size(); i++) {
218
219 DishItem *item = new DishItem();
220 //item->setDishData( TmpList[i].name, TmpList[i].price, TmpList[i].imgPath);
221
222
223 //提取文件名(比如 "D:/images/meat.jpg" 提取出 "meat.jpg")---ai优化
224 QFileInfo info(TmpList[i].imgPath);
225 QString fileName = info.fileName();
226
227 //拼接本地缓冲路径
228 QString localpath = "cache/" + fileName;
229
230 //判断本地有没有这张图片
231 if(QFile::exists(localpath))
232 {
233 //有图
234 item->setDishData(TmpList[i].name , TmpList[i].price , localpath , TmpList[i].flag , TmpList[i].discount , TmpList[i].description);
235 }
236 else
237 {
238 // 先给卡片塞个空路径或者默认加载图 (防止没图时报错)
239 item->setDishData(TmpList[i].name , TmpList[i].price , "" , TmpList[i].flag , TmpList[i].discount , TmpList[i].description);
240
241 QJsonObject reqobj;
242 reqobj.insert("type" , "GetImage");
243 reqobj.insert("image_path" , TmpList[i].imgPath);
244
245 QJsonDocument doc(reqobj);
246 socket->write(doc.toJson());
247
248 //防止粘包
249 socket->waitForBytesWritten(50);
250 }
251
252 connect(item , &DishItem::sig_addDish , [&](QString name , double price){
253 bool found = false;
254
255 for(int j = 0 ; j < OrderList.size(); j++)
256 {
257 if(OrderList[j].name == name)
258 {
259 OrderList[j].count++;
260 found = true;
261 break;
262 }
263 }
264 if(!found)
265 {
266 OrderList.append({name , price , 1});
267 }
268 QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "已加入购物车");
269 });
270
271 // 计算它应该放在第几行第几列
272 int row = i / colCount;
273 int col = i % colCount;
274
275 ui->tableWidget_dishes->setCellWidget(row, col, item);
276
277 ui->tableWidget_dishes->setRowHeight(row, 320);
278 ui->tableWidget_dishes->setColumnWidth(col, 280);
279 }
280}
281
282void MenuWidget::initTableInfo(QString serverId, QString tableId, QString peopleNum, QString orderId)
283{
284 q_serverId = serverId;
285 q_tableId = tableId;
286 q_peopleNum = peopleNum;
287 q_orderId = orderId;
288
289 ui->serlabel->setText("服务工号：" + q_serverId);
290 ui->tablelabel->setText("台号：" + q_tableId);
291 ui->peonumlabel->setText("人数：" + q_peopleNum);
292 ui->orderlabel->setText("订单号：" + q_orderId);
293
294 QString htmlWaiter = QString("<span style='color:#ffffff;'>服务工号：</span><span style='color:#ffb142;'><b>%1</b></span>").arg(q_serverId);
295 ui->serlabel->setText(htmlWaiter);
296
297 QString htmlTable = QString("<span style='color:#ffffff;'>台号：</span><span style='color:#ffb142;'><b>%1</b></span>").arg(q_tableId);
298 ui->tablelabel->setText(htmlTable);
299
300 QString htmlPeople = QString("<span style='color:#ffffff;'>人数：</span><span style='color:#ffb142;'><b>%1</b></span>").arg(q_peopleNum);
301 ui->peonumlabel->setText(htmlPeople);
302
303 QString htmlOrder = QString("<span style='color:#ffffff;'>订单号：</span><span style='color:#ffb142;'><b>%1</b></span>").arg(q_orderId);
304 ui->orderlabel->setText(htmlOrder);
305}
306
307void MenuWidget::on_hotBtn_clicked()
308{
309 showDish("热菜");
310}
311
312void MenuWidget::on_coldBtn_clicked()
313{
314 showDish("凉菜");
315}
316
317void MenuWidget::on_soupBtn_clicked()
318{
319 showDish("汤");
320}
321
322void MenuWidget::on_drinkBtn_clicked()
323{
324 showDish("饮料");
325}
326
327void MenuWidget::on_otherBtn_clicked()
328{
329 showDish("其它");
330}
331
332void MenuWidget::on_ddBtn_clicked()
333{
334 OrderWidget * order = new OrderWidget();
335
336 order->initOrderTable(this->OrderList);
337
338 connect(order , &OrderWidget::sig_confirmOrder , [&](){
339
340 //创建Json封包
341 QJsonObject root;
342 root.insert("type" , "Order");
343 root.insert("tabelID" , q_tableId );
344
345 //创建数组
346 QJsonArray array;
347
348 //遍历购物车
349 for ( int i = 0 ; i < OrderList.size() ; i++)
350 {
351 //a.定义obj对象
352 QJsonObject obj;
353
354 //b.添加
355 obj.insert("name" , OrderList[i].name);
356 obj.insert("count" , OrderList[i].count);
357 obj.insert("price" , OrderList[i].price);
358
359 //c.加入数组
360 array.append(obj);
361 }
362
363 //数组加入json
364 root.insert("dishes" , array);
365
366 //转换
367 QJsonDocument doc(root);
368 QByteArray data = doc.toJson();
369
370 //测试
371 //QMessageBox::information(this, "发送前检查", "准备发送的JSON:\n" + QString(data));
372
373 //发送
374 socket->write(data);
375
376 });
377
378 connect(order, &OrderWidget::sig_cancelOrder, [=](){
379
380 this->OrderList.clear(); //清空主界面里的购物车数据！
381
382 });
383
384 //设置模态
385 order->setWindowModality(Qt::ApplicationModal);
386
387 order->show();
388
389}
390
391void MenuWidget::on_payBtn_clicked()
392{
393 //结账
394 QJsonObject reqObj;
395 reqObj.insert("type", "CheckoutRequest");
396 reqObj.insert("tableID", q_tableId);
397
398 QJsonDocument doc(reqObj);
399 socket->write(doc.toJson());
400
401 QMessageBox::information(this, "呼叫成功", "已呼叫服务员结账，请稍候...");
402}
403
404void MenuWidget::on_serverBtn_clicked()
405{
406 QJsonObject obj;
407 obj.insert("type" , "CallService");
408 obj.insert("tableID", q_tableId);
409
410 QJsonDocument doc(obj);
411 socket->write(doc.toJson());
412
413 QMessageBox::information( this , "成功呼叫服务员" , "请稍后");
414}
415
1#ifndef MENUWIDGET_H
2#define MENUWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5#include <QVector>
6#include <QTcpSocket>
7
8struct Dish
9{
10 QString name;
11 double price;
12 QString type;
13 QString imgPath;
14 int flag;
15 double discount;
16 QString description;
17};
18
19struct OrderDish
20{
21 QString name;
22 double price;
23 int count;
24};
25
26namespace Ui {
27class MenuWidget;
28}
29
30class MenuWidget : public QWidget
31{
32 Q_OBJECT
33
34public:
35 explicit MenuWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
36 ~MenuWidget();
37
38 void showDish(QString vegtype);
39
40 void initTableInfo(QString serverId, QString tableId, QString peopleNum, QString orderId);
41
42private slots:
43 void on_hotBtn_clicked();
44
45 void on_coldBtn_clicked();
46
47 void on_soupBtn_clicked();
48
49 void on_drinkBtn_clicked();
50
51 void on_otherBtn_clicked();
52
53 void on_ddBtn_clicked();
54
55 void on_payBtn_clicked();
56
57 void on_serverBtn_clicked();
58private:
59 QString m_currentCategory = "热菜"; // 用来记住当前所在的标签
60
61private:
62 Ui::MenuWidget *ui;
63
64 QVector<Dish> dishList;
65 QVector<OrderDish> OrderList;
66
67 QTcpSocket *socket;
68
69 //用于处理tcp粘包问题
70 QByteArray m_buffer;
71
72
73 QString q_serverId; // 服务工号
74 QString q_tableId; // 台号
75 QString q_peopleNum; // 人数
76 QString q_orderId; // 订单号
77};
78
79#endif // MENUWIDGET_H
80
1<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>MenuWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="MenuWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>831</width>
10 <height>578</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* ================= 顶部分类区：完全融入背景 ================= */
18
19/* 1. 确保分类条的背景是透明的 */
20#widget_category {
21 background-color: transparent;
22}
23
24/* 2. 按钮本体：去掉白底和边框，文字设为白色 */
25#widget_category QPushButton {
26 background-color: transparent; /* 核心：背景透明，同化到模糊背景 */
27 color: #FFFFFF; /* 字体改成白色，在暗色背景上极其醒目 */
28 border: none; /* 扒掉原本的实线边框 */
29 font-size: 16px;
30 font-weight: bold;
31 padding: 8px 20px;
32 margin: 10px 5px;
33}
34
35/* 3. 按钮悬停/选中时的效果：文字变橙色，或者加一个极其微弱的透明底色 */
36#widget_category QPushButton:hover {
37 color: #f39c12; /* 鼠标放上去，文字变成品牌橙色 */
38 background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); /* 给一点点 10% 的泛白效果，手感更好 */
39 border-radius: 8px; /* 轻微的圆角反馈 */
40}
41
42/* ================= 菜品展示区：半透明高级面板 ================= */
43
44/* 1. 菜品大容器：换成 85% 不透明度的白色（毛玻璃质感） */
45#tableWidget_dishes {
46 /* 核心：用 rgba 来调色，255,255,255 是白色，0.85 是透明度 */
47 /* 这样它既是个白板能衬托菜品，又能隐约透出后面的模糊图片，高级感拉满！ */
48 background-color: rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.85);
49 border-radius: 12px; /* 给整个大白板加一个圆角，不那么锋利 */
50 border: none;
51 margin-top: 5px; /* 稍微往下挪一点，和顶部按钮拉开距离 */
52}
53
54/* 2. 扒掉 Qt 表格视口顽固的内层白底，确保上面的 rgba 半透明能生效 */
55#tableWidget_dishes QWidget {
56 background-color: transparent;
57}</string>
58 </property>
59 <layout class="QHBoxLayout" name="horizontalLayout" stretch="0,4">
60 <item>
61 <widget class="QWidget" name="widget_sidebar" native="true">
62 <property name="styleSheet">
63 <string notr="true">/* ================= 左侧侧边栏专属样式 ================= */
64
65/* 1. 左侧大背景：还原参考图的深咖啡色 */
66QWidget#wiget_sidebar {
67 background-color: #3B2E26; /* 经典的深咖啡/黑巧克力色 */
68 border-right: 2px solid #2A201A; /* 右侧加一道深色阴影线 */
69}
70
71/* 2. 订单信息文字：浅灰白，弱化次要信息 */
72#leftWidget QLabel {
73 color: #D3C9C1;
74 font-size: 13px;
75 font-family: &quot;Microsoft YaHei&quot;;
76 margin-top: 5px;
77 padding-left: 5px;
78}
79
80/* 3. 分割线：调暗一点，不要太刺眼 */
81#leftFrame QFrame[frameShape=&quot;4&quot;] {
82 color: #5C4A3D;
83}
84
85/* 4. 导航工具按钮：核心交互区 */
86#leftWidget QToolButton {
87 background-color: transparent; /* 默认背景透明 */
88 color: #FFFFFF; /* 默认文字纯白 */
89 font-size: 16px;
90 font-weight: bold;
91 border: none;
92 padding-top: 15px;
93 padding-bottom: 15px;
94 min-height: 80px; /* 让按钮足够高，方便触控 */
95}
96
97/* 悬停状态：微微变亮 */
98#leftWidget QToolButton:hover {
99 background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 10);
100}
101
102/* 选中状态 (checked)：参考图的灵魂所在！ */
103#leftWidget QToolButton:checked, #leftWidget QToolButton:pressed {
104 color: #FF9F1A; /* 文字变成品牌橙色 */
105 background-color: #2F241E; /* 背景比周围更深一点，形成凹陷感 */
106 /* 在左边加一条粗粗的橙色高亮线！ */
107 border-left: 5px solid #FF9F1A;
108}
109/* 让所有导航按钮背景变透明，文字变白 */
110QToolButton {
111 background-color: transparent;
112 color: #ffffff; /* 默认文字纯白 */
113 font-size: 16px;
114 font-weight: bold;
115 border: none; /* 去掉丑陋的边框 */
116 border-radius: 0px;
117 padding-top: 15px;
118 padding-bottom: 15px;
119}
120
121/* 鼠标悬停时：微微泛起一点亮光 */
122QToolButton:hover {
123 background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 10);
124}
125
126/* 选中状态（勾选了 checkable 的按钮被点击后）：左侧亮起橙色条！ */
127QToolButton:checked, QToolButton:pressed {
128 color: #FF9F1A; /* 文字变成品牌橙色 */
129 background-color: #2F241E; /* 背景比周围更深一点，形成按压凹陷感 */
130 border-left: 5px solid #FF9F1A; /* 灵魂操作：左侧粗橙色边框 */
131}</string>
132 </property>
133 <layout class="QVBoxLayout" name="verticalLayout">
134 <item>
135 <widget class="QLabel" name="serlabel">
136 <property name="text">
137 <string>服务工号：</string>
138 </property>
139 </widget>
140 </item>
141 <item>
142 <widget class="QLabel" name="tablelabel">
143 <property name="text">
144 <string>台号：</string>
145 </property>
146 </widget>
147 </item>
148 <item>
149 <widget class="QLabel" name="peonumlabel">
150 <property name="text">
151 <string>人数：</string>
152 </property>
153 </widget>
154 </item>
155 <item>
156 <widget class="QLabel" name="orderlabel">
157 <property name="text">
158 <string>订单号：</string>
159 </property>
160 </widget>
161 </item>
162 <item>
163 <widget class="Line" name="line">
164 <property name="orientation">
165 <enum>Qt::Horizontal</enum>
166 </property>
167 </widget>
168 </item>
169 <item>
170 <widget class="QToolButton" name="vegBtn">
171 <property name="sizePolicy">
172 <sizepolicy hsizetype="Expanding" vsizetype="Fixed">
173 <horstretch>0</horstretch>
174 <verstretch>0</verstretch>
175 </sizepolicy>
176 </property>
177 <property name="text">
178 <string>菜品</string>
179 </property>
180 <property name="icon">
181 <iconset resource="res.qrc">
182 <normaloff>:/vegetable.png</normaloff>:/vegetable.png</iconset>
183 </property>
184 <property name="iconSize">
185 <size>
186 <width>40</width>
187 <height>40</height>
188 </size>
189 </property>
190 <property name="toolButtonStyle">
191 <enum>Qt::ToolButtonTextBesideIcon</enum>
192 </property>
193 </widget>
194 </item>
195 <item>
196 <widget class="QToolButton" name="ddBtn">

3 <class>OrderManageWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="OrderManageWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>685</width>
10 <height>490</height>

1#include "orderwidget.h"
2#include "ui_orderwidget.h"
3#include <QMessageBox>
4#include <qdatetime.h>
5
6#include "serverwidget.h"
7
8OrderWidget::OrderWidget(QWidget *parent) :
9 QWidget(parent),
10 ui(new Ui::OrderWidget)
11{
12 ui->setupUi(this);
13
14 // 1. 去掉自带的系统边框和标题栏
15 this->setWindowFlags(Qt::FramelessWindowHint | Qt::Dialog);
16
17 // 2. 让窗口背景透明（配合后面的 QSS 实现圆角和半透明效果）
18 //this->setAttribute(Qt::WA_TranslucentBackground);
19
20 this->setWindowTitle("确认订单 - 购物车");
21
22 // 3. 优化表格的基础设置（去掉侧边自带的数字列，按比例拉伸）
23 ui->orderWidget->verticalHeader()->setVisible(false); // 隐藏最左侧的 1,2,3 行号
24 ui->orderWidget->horizontalHeader()->setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView::Stretch); // 列宽自动撑满
25 ui->orderWidget->setFocusPolicy(Qt::NoFocus); // 去掉点击单元格时的虚线框
26
27 // 开启表格的斑马线（交替行变色）功能，用于优雅地填补下方的空白
28 ui->orderWidget->setAlternatingRowColors(true);
29
30 // ================= 订单表格高级视图设置 =================
31
32 // 1. 隐藏左侧自带的行号 (1, 2, 3...)
33 ui->orderWidget->verticalHeader()->setVisible(false);
34
35 // 2. 隐藏难看的十字网格线（后面用 QSS 画高贵的单横线）
36 ui->orderWidget->setShowGrid(false);
37
38 // 3. 取消点击单元格时出现的虚线框
39 ui->orderWidget->setFocusPolicy(Qt::NoFocus);
40
41 // 4. 让列自动拉伸，填满整个表格宽度，不要留白！
42 ui->orderWidget->horizontalHeader()->setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView::Stretch);
43
44 // 5. 设置每一行的高度大一点，显得不拥挤（呼吸感）
45 ui->orderWidget->verticalHeader()->setDefaultSectionSize(50);
46}
47
48OrderWidget::~OrderWidget()
49{
50 delete ui;
51}
52
53void OrderWidget::initOrderTable(QVector<OrderDish> list)
54{
55 //根据点了几种菜设置行数
56 ui->orderWidget->setRowCount(list.size());
57
58 //计算总金额
59 double total = 0.0;
60
61 for( int i = 0 ; i < list.size() ; i++)
62 {
63 ui->orderWidget->setItem(i , 0 , new QTableWidgetItem(list[i].name));
64 ui->orderWidget->setItem(i , 1 , new QTableWidgetItem(QString::number(list[i].price)));
65 ui->orderWidget->setItem(i , 2 , new QTableWidgetItem(QString::number(list[i].count)));
66
67 total += list[i].price * list[i].count;
68 }
69 ui->totalLabel->setText(QString("合计：$%1").arg(total));
70}
71
72
73
74void OrderWidget::on_cancelBtn_clicked()
75{
76// MenuWidget * menu = new MenuWidget();
77// menu->show();
78 emit sig_cancelOrder();
79
80 this->close();
81}
82
83void OrderWidget::on_confirmBtn_clicked()
84{
85 emit sig_confirmOrder();
86
87 QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "订单已发送至服务台厨房！");
88
89 this->close();
90}
91
1#ifndef ORDERWIDGET_H
2#define ORDERWIDGET_H
3
4#include "menuwidget.h"
5
6#include <QWidget>
7
8
9namespace Ui {
10class OrderWidget;
11}
12
13class OrderWidget : public QWidget
14{
15 Q_OBJECT
16
17public:
18 explicit OrderWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
19 ~OrderWidget();
20
21public:
22 void initOrderTable(QVector<OrderDish> list);
23
24private slots:
25 void on_cancelBtn_clicked();
26
27 void on_confirmBtn_clicked();
28
29signals:
30void sig_confirmOrder(); // 确认下单信号
31void sig_cancelOrder(); //取消订单信号
32
33
34private:
35 Ui::OrderWidget *ui;
36};
37
38#endif // ORDERWIDGET_H

2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>OrderWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="OrderWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>330</width>
10 <height>371</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* ==================================
18 1. 菜品表格区域美化
19 ================================== */
20QTableWidget {
21 background-color: transparent;
22 color: #333333;
23 font-size: 15px;
24 font-weight: bold;
25}
26
27QHeaderView::section {
28 background-color: transparent;
29 color: #8d4925;
30 font-size: 16px;
31 font-weight: bold;
32 border: none;
33 border-bottom: 2px solid #d4af37;
34 padding: 10px 0px;
35}
36
37QTableWidget::item {
38 border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 15);
39 padding: 5px;
40}
41
42/* ==================================
43 2. 合计金额标签 (🌟 字体调小，防止显示不全)
44 ================================== */
45QLabel#totalLabel {
46 color: #e67e22;
47 font-size: 20px; /* 从 26px 调小到了 20px，更加精致且省空间 */
48 font-weight: bold;
49 font-family: &quot;Microsoft YaHei&quot;;
50}
51
52/* ==================================
53 3. 主按钮：下单 (渐变食欲橙)
54 ================================== */
55QPushButton#confirmBtn {
56 background-color: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0 #e67e22, stop:1 #d35400);
57 color: white;
58 font-size: 16px; /* 按钮字体也微调小一点，显得更秀气 */
59 font-weight: bold;
60 border: none;
61 border-radius: 8px;
62 padding: 10px 0px;
63}
64
65QPushButton#confirmBtn:hover {
66 background-color: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0 #f1c40f, stop:1 #e67e22);
67}
68
69QPushButton#confirmBtn:pressed {
70 background-color: #a04000;
71 padding-top: 12px;
72 padding-bottom: 8px;
73}
74
75/* ==================================
76 4. 副按钮：取消 (镂空焦糖色)
77 ================================== */
78QPushButton#cancelBtn {
79 background-color: transparent;
80 color: #8d4925;
81 font-size: 15px;
82 font-weight: bold;
83 border: 2px solid #8d4925;
84 border-radius: 8px;
85 padding: 8px 0px;
86}
87
88QPushButton#cancelBtn:hover {
89 background-color: rgba(141, 73, 37, 20);
90}
91
92QPushButton#cancelBtn:pressed {
93 background-color: rgba(141, 73, 37, 50);
94 padding-top: 10px;
95 padding-bottom: 6px;
96}</string>
97 </property>

105 </rect>
