1#include "menuwidget.h"
2#include "peonumwidget.h"
3#include "tablewidget.h"
4#include "ui_peonumwidget.h"
5#include <QMessageBox>
6
7#include <QGraphicsDropShadowEffect>
8
9PeoNumWidget::PeoNumWidget(QWidget *parent) :
10 QWidget(parent),
11 ui(new Ui::PeoNumWidget)
12{
13 ui->setupUi(this);
14
15 // 去掉系统自带的窗口边框和标题栏
16 this->setWindowFlags(Qt::FramelessWindowHint);
17 // 让背景（也就是那圈20px的边距）彻底变透明
18 this->setAttribute(Qt::WA_TranslucentBackground);
19
20 // 给中间的白卡片加上高级的悬浮阴影
21 QGraphicsDropShadowEffect *shadow = new QGraphicsDropShadowEffect(this);
22 shadow->setOffset(0, 8); // 阴影向下偏移 8 像素
23 shadow->setColor(QColor(0, 0, 0, 30)); // 非常淡的纯黑色阴影 (透明度30)
24 shadow->setBlurRadius(25); // 阴影模糊半径，越大越柔和
25 ui->centerFrame->setGraphicsEffect(shadow); // 应用给你的中心卡片
26
27 QList<QPushButton*> btnList = {
28 ui->Btn1,ui->Btn2 ,ui->Btn3,
29 ui->Btn4,ui->Btn5 ,ui->Btn6,
30 ui->Btn7,ui->Btn8 ,ui->Btn9,
31 };
32
33 int i = 0;
34
35 while (i < btnList.size())
36 {
37 QPushButton * btn = btnList[i];
38
39 connect(btn, &QPushButton::clicked, this, [=](){
40 QString numText = btn->text();
41
42 // 【极简完美版】：直接继承 QSS 的大小，去掉了换行符 <br/>，只给数字上个橙色
43 QString htmlText = QString("就餐人数：<span style='color:#ffb142;'>%1</span>").arg(numText);
44
45 ui->peonumLabel->setText(htmlText);
46 });
47
48// connect( btn , &QPushButton::clicked , this , [=](){
49// QString numtext = btn->text();
50
51// ui->peonumLabel->setText("就餐人数：" + numtext);
52// });
53
54 i++;
55 }
56}
57
58PeoNumWidget::~PeoNumWidget()
59{
60 delete ui;
61}
62
63void PeoNumWidget::on_StartBtn_clicked()
64{
65 QString fullText = ui->peonumLabel->text();
66
67 QString num = fullText.split(("：")).last();
68 int peonum = num.toInt();
69
70 if(num.isEmpty())
71 {
72 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "请选择就餐人数");
73 return ;
74 }
75
76// MenuWidget * menu = new MenuWidget();
77
78// menu->show();
79
80
81
82 tableWidget * table = new tableWidget();
83 table->q_peonum = num;
84
85 table->show();
86
87 this->hide();
88}
89
1#ifndef PEONUMWIDGET_H
2#define PEONUMWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5
6namespace Ui {
7class PeoNumWidget;
8}
9
10class PeoNumWidget : public QWidget
11{
12 Q_OBJECT
13
14public:
15 explicit PeoNumWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
16 ~PeoNumWidget();
17
18private slots:
19 void on_StartBtn_clicked();
20
21private:
22 Ui::PeoNumWidget *ui;
23};
24
25#endif // PEONUMWIDGET_H
26
1<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>PeoNumWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="PeoNumWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>351</width>
10 <height>346</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <widget class="QFrame" name="centerFrame">
17 <property name="geometry">
18 <rect>
19 <x>0</x>
20 <y>0</y>
21 <width>350</width>
22 <height>350</height>
23 </rect>
24 </property>
25 <property name="minimumSize">
26 <size>
27 <width>350</width>
28 <height>350</height>
29 </size>
30 </property>
31 <property name="maximumSize">
32 <size>
33 <width>350</width>
34 <height>350</height>
35 </size>
36 </property>
37 <property name="styleSheet">
38 <string notr="true">/* 1. 底层背景：稍微加深一点点灰，为了衬托白卡片的阴影 */
39QWidget#PeoNumWidget {
40 background-color: #E8ECEF;
41}
42
43/* 2. 核心大卡片：纯白，圆角稍微收敛一点，显得更硬朗专业 */
44QFrame#centerFrame {
45 background-color: #ffffff;
46 border-radius: 16px;
47 border: none; /* 去掉边框，全靠我们上面写的 C++ 阴影撑起立体感！ */
48}
49
50/* 3. 顶部展示标签：次级信息颜色变淡 */
51QLabel#peonumLabel {
52 color: #7F8C8D; /* 高级灰 */
53 font-size: 18px;
54 font-weight: bold;
55 qproperty-alignment: AlignCenter;
56 margin-bottom: 10px;
57}
58
59/* 4. 数字键盘：纯白底色，浅色精致边框，清脆感 */
60QPushButton {
61 background-color: #FFFFFF;
62 border: 1px solid #E4E7ED; /* 极细的边框线 */
63 color: #2C3E50;
64 font-size: 28px;
65 font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;, sans-serif; /* 数字用 Arial 更好看 */
66 border-radius: 12px; /* 和主卡片呼应的圆角 */
67 min-width: 70px;
68 min-height: 70px;
69}
70/* 鼠标悬停：边框亮起品牌色 */
71QPushButton:hover {
72 background-color: #FDFEFE;
73 border: 2px solid #ffb142;
74 color: #ffb142;
75}
76/* 点击瞬间 */
77QPushButton:pressed {
78 background-color: #ffb142;
79 color: white;
80 border: none;
81}
82
83/* 5. 开始点餐按钮：圆角统一为 12px！消灭形状冲突！ */
84QPushButton#StartBtn {
85 background-color: #ffb142;
86 color: white;
87 font-size: 20px;
88 font-weight: bold;
89 border-radius: 12px; /* 重点：改成和数字按钮一样的 12px 圆角 */
90 border: none;
91 min-height: 55px;
92 margin-top: 15px;
93}
94QPushButton#StartBtn:hover {
95 background-color: #FFA01A;
96}
97QPushButton#StartBtn:pressed {
98 background-color: #E68A00;
99}</string>
100 </property>
101 <property name="frameShape">
102 <enum>QFrame::StyledPanel</enum>
103 </property>
104 <property name="frameShadow">
105 <enum>QFrame::Raised</enum>
106 </property>

1#include "loginwidget.h"
2#include "registerwidget.h"
3#include "ui_registerwidget.h"
4
5#include <QJsonObject>
6#include <QJsonDocument>
7#include <QFile>
8#include <QJsonArray>
9#include <QMessageBox>
10#include <QDebug>
11#include <QGraphicsBlurEffect>
12
13RegisterWidget::RegisterWidget(QWidget *parent) :
14 QWidget(parent),
15 ui(new Ui::RegisterWidget)
16{
17 ui->setupUi(this);
18
19 QLabel *bgLabel = new QLabel(this);
20
21 // 2. 加载你的背景图片 (注意替换成你实际的路径，比如 ":/bg.jpg")
22 bgLabel->setPixmap(QPixmap(":/fwzc.jpg"));
23
24 // 3. 让图片自动缩放填满窗口
25 bgLabel->setScaledContents(true);
26 bgLabel->setGeometry(this->rect());
27
28 // 4. 【核心点】：把这个标签“沉底”，放到最下层，这样就不会挡住你的登录框
29 bgLabel->lower();
30
31 // 5. 召唤 Qt 的模糊魔法特效
32 QGraphicsBlurEffect *blurEffect = new QGraphicsBlurEffect(this);
33
34 // 6. 设置模糊程度 (数值越大越模糊，10~20 之间比较合适)
35 blurEffect->setBlurRadius(2);
36
37 // 7. 将模糊魔法只施加给底层背景标签
38 bgLabel->setGraphicsEffect(blurEffect);
39}
40
41RegisterWidget::~RegisterWidget()
42{
43 delete ui;
44}
45
46void RegisterWidget::on_addBtn_clicked()
47{
48 QString name = ui->userEdit->text();
49 QString passwd = ui->passwdEdit->text();
50
51 if(name.isEmpty() || passwd.isEmpty())
52 {
53 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "账号或密码为空");
54 return ;
55 }
56
57 //定义json数组
58 QJsonArray array;
59
60 QFile file("root.json");
61 if(file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly))
62 {
63 QByteArray data = file.readAll();
64 file.close();
65
66 QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(data);
67 //qDebug() << data;
68 if(doc.isArray())
69 {
70 array = doc.array();
71 }
72 if(doc.isNull())
73 {
74 qDebug() << "JSON解析失败：数据格式错误或为空";
75 }
76
77 }
78
79 //打包json数据
80 QJsonObject obj;
81 obj.insert("account" , name);
82 obj.insert("password" , passwd);
83
84 array.append(obj);
85
86 if(file.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly))
87 {
88 //封装数组对象
89 QJsonDocument newDoc(array);
90
91 file.write(newDoc.toJson());
92 file.close();
93
94 QMessageBox::information( nullptr , "提示" , "注册成功");
95
96 loginWidget * login = new loginWidget();
97 login->show();
98
99 this->hide();
100 }
101 else
102 {
103 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "注册失败");
104 }
105}
106
1#include "loginwidget.h"
2#include "registerwidget.h"
3#include "ui_registerwidget.h"
4
5#include <QJsonObject>
6#include <QJsonDocument>
7#include <QFile>
8#include <QJsonArray>
9#include <QMessageBox>
10#include <QDebug>
11#include <QGraphicsBlurEffect>
12
13RegisterWidget::RegisterWidget(QWidget *parent) :
14 QWidget(parent),
15 ui(new Ui::RegisterWidget)
16{
17 ui->setupUi(this);
18
19 QLabel *bgLabel = new QLabel(this);
20
21 // 2. 加载你的背景图片 (注意替换成你实际的路径，比如 ":/bg.jpg")
22 bgLabel->setPixmap(QPixmap(":/fwzc.jpg"));
23
24 // 3. 让图片自动缩放填满窗口
25 bgLabel->setScaledContents(true);
26 bgLabel->setGeometry(this->rect());
27
28 // 4. 【核心点】：把这个标签“沉底”，放到最下层，这样就不会挡住你的登录框
29 bgLabel->lower();
30
31 // 5. 召唤 Qt 的模糊魔法特效
32 QGraphicsBlurEffect *blurEffect = new QGraphicsBlurEffect(this);
33
34 // 6. 设置模糊程度 (数值越大越模糊，10~20 之间比较合适)
35 blurEffect->setBlurRadius(2);
36
37 // 7. 将模糊魔法只施加给底层背景标签
38 bgLabel->setGraphicsEffect(blurEffect);
39}
40
41RegisterWidget::~RegisterWidget()
42{
43 delete ui;
44}
45
46void RegisterWidget::on_addBtn_clicked()
47{
48 QString name = ui->userEdit->text();
49 QString passwd = ui->passwdEdit->text();
50
51 if(name.isEmpty() || passwd.isEmpty())
52 {
53 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "账号或密码为空");
54 return ;
55 }
56
57 //定义json数组
58 QJsonArray array;
59
60 QFile file("root.json");
61 if(file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly))
62 {
63 QByteArray data = file.readAll();
64 file.close();
65
66 QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(data);
67 //qDebug() << data;
68 if(doc.isArray())
69 {
70 array = doc.array();
71 }
72 if(doc.isNull())
73 {
74 qDebug() << "JSON解析失败：数据格式错误或为空";
75 }
76
77 }
78
79 //打包json数据
80 QJsonObject obj;
81 obj.insert("account" , name);
82 obj.insert("password" , passwd);
83
84 array.append(obj);
85
86 if(file.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly))
87 {
88 //封装数组对象
89 QJsonDocument newDoc(array);
90
91 file.write(newDoc.toJson());
92 file.close();
93
94 QMessageBox::information( nullptr , "提示" , "注册成功");
95
96 loginWidget * login = new loginWidget();
97 login->show();
98
99 this->hide();
100 }
101 else
102 {
103 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "注册失败");
104 }
105}

1#ifndef REGISTERWIDGET_H
2#define REGISTERWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5
6namespace Ui {
7class RegisterWidget;
8}
9
10class RegisterWidget : public QWidget
11{
12 Q_OBJECT
13
14public:
15 explicit RegisterWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
16 ~RegisterWidget();
17
18private slots:
19 void on_addBtn_clicked();
20
21private:
22 Ui::RegisterWidget *ui;
23};
24
25#endif // REGISTERWIDGET_H

1#ifndef REGISTERWIDGET_H
2#define REGISTERWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5
6namespace Ui {
7class RegisterWidget;
8}
9
10class RegisterWidget : public QWidget
11{
12 Q_OBJECT
13
14public:

1<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>RegisterWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="RegisterWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>651</width>
10 <height>510</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* ==================================
18 1. 基础文字标签 (账号、密码)
19 ================================== */
20QLabel {
21 color: #f3e5ab; /* 柔和的香草白金，在暗背景上非常清晰 */
22 font-size: 16px;
23 font-weight: bold;
24 background: transparent;
25}
26
27/* ==================================
28 2. 输入框美化 (高级木质透光感)
29 ================================== */
30QLineEdit {
31 background-color: rgba(40, 25, 15, 180); /* 深咖啡/红木色半透明底，贴合餐厅装潢 */
32 color: #ffffff;
33 border: 1px solid #8d4925; /* 焦糖色边框 */
34 border-radius: 6px;
35 padding: 8px 12px;
36 font-size: 14px;
37}
38
39QLineEdit:focus {
40 border: 2px solid #d4af37; /* 聚焦时亮起尊贵的琥珀金边框 */
41 background-color: rgba(20, 10, 5, 220); /* 聚焦时背景变深，突出输入的文字 */
42}
43
44/* ==================================
45 3. 核心按钮：管理员注册
46 ================================== */
47QPushButton {
48 /* 采用红木/深焦糖色渐变，彰显管理员的稳重感与权限感 */
49 background-color: qlineargradient(spread:pad, x1:0, y1:1, x2:0, y2:0, stop:0 #8d4925, stop:1 #b85e2a);
50 color: #ffffff;
51 font-size: 16px;
52 font-weight: bold;
53 border: 1px solid #5c2d15;
54 border-radius: 8px;
55 padding: 10px 0px;
56}
57
58QPushButton:hover {
59 /* 鼠标悬浮时颜色提亮，像火炉旁温暖的色调 */
60 background-color: qlineargradient(spread:pad, x1:0, y1:1, x2:0, y2:0, stop:0 #a0522d, stop:1 #cc6a30);
61}
62
63QPushButton:pressed {
64 background-color: #5c2d15; /* 按下变成深咖啡色 */
65 padding-top: 12px; /* 增加真实的按压凹陷感 */
66 padding-bottom: 8px;
67}
68background-color: rgba(20, 20, 20, 160); border-radius: 15px;
69/* ==================================
70 4. 拦截样式污染：重置 QMessageBox
71 ================================== */
72QMessageBox {
73 background-color: #fcfcfc; /* 干净的珍珠白底色 */
74}
75
76QMessageBox QLabel {
77 color: #2c3e50; /* 深空灰文字，在白底上极其清晰 */
78 font-size: 14px;
79 font-weight: bold;
80 background-color: transparent;
81}
82
83QMessageBox QPushButton {
84 background-color: #8d4925; /* 按钮保留一点餐厅的焦糖红木色呼应主题 */
85 color: #ffffff;
86 border: none;
87 border-radius: 4px;
88 padding: 6px 20px;
89 font-size: 13px;
90 min-width: 60px;
91 font-weight: normal;
92}
93
94QMessageBox QPushButton:hover {
95 background-color: #a0522d; /* 悬浮提亮 */
96}
97
98QMessageBox QPushButton:pressed {
99 background-color: #5c2d15;
100 padding-top: 8px; /* 微弱的下沉感 */
101 padding-bottom: 4px;
102}</string>
103 </property>
104 <widget class="QFrame" name="frame">
105 <property name="geometry">
106 <rect>
107 <x>200</x>
108 <y>150</y>
109 <width>231</width>
110 <height>201</height>
111 </rect>
112 </property>
113 <property name="frameShape">
114 <enum>QFrame::StyledPanel</enum>
115 </property>
116 <property name="frameShadow">
117 <enum>QFrame::Raised</enum>
118 </property>
119 <layout class="QVBoxLayout" name="verticalLayout">
120 <item>
121 <layout class="QGridLayout" name="gridLayout">
122 <item row="0" column="0">
123 <layout class="QHBoxLayout" name="horizontalLayout">
124 <item>
125 <widget class="QLabel" name="label">
126 <property name="text">
127 <string>账号：</string>
128 </property>
129 </widget>
130 </item>
131 <item>
132 <widget class="QLineEdit" name="userEdit"/>
133 </item>
134 </layout>
135 </item>
136 <item row="2" column="0">
137 <widget class="QPushButton" name="addBtn">
138 <property name="text">
139 <string>注册</string>
140 </property>
141 </widget>
142 </item>
143 <item row="1" column="0">
144 <layout class="QHBoxLayout" name="horizontalLayout_2">
145 <item>
146 <widget class="QLabel" name="label_2">
147 <property name="text">
148 <string>密码：</string>
149 </property>
150 </widget>
151 </item>
152 <item>
153 <widget class="QLineEdit" name="passwdEdit">
154 <property name="contextMenuPolicy">
155 <enum>Qt::ActionsContextMenu</enum>
156 </property>
157 </widget>
158 </item>
159 </layout>
160 </item>
161 </layout>
162 </item>
163 </layout>
164 </widget>
165 </widget>
166 <resources/>
167 <connections/>
168</ui>
169
1<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>RegisterWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="RegisterWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>651</width>
10 <height>510</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* ==================================
18 1. 基础文字标签 (账号、密码)
19 ================================== */
20QLabel {
21 color: #f3e5ab; /* 柔和的香草白金，在暗背景上非常清晰 */
22 font-size: 16px;
23 font-weight: bold;
24 background: transparent;
25}
26
27/* ==================================
28 2. 输入框美化 (高级木质透光感)
29 ================================== */
30QLineEdit {
31 background-color: rgba(40, 25, 15, 180); /* 深咖啡/红木色半透明底，贴合餐厅装潢 */
32 color: #ffffff;
33 border: 1px solid #8d4925; /* 焦糖色边框 */
34 border-radius: 6px;
35 padding: 8px 12px;
36 font-size: 14px;
37}
38
39QLineEdit:focus {
40 border: 2px solid #d4af37; /* 聚焦时亮起尊贵的琥珀金边框 */
41 background-color: rgba(20, 10, 5, 220); /* 聚焦时背景变深，突出输入的文字 */
42}
43
44/* ==================================
45 3. 核心按钮：管理员注册
46 ================================== */
47QPushButton {
48 /* 采用红木/深焦糖色渐变，彰显管理员的稳重感与权限感 */
49 background-color: qlineargradient(spread:pad, x1:0, y1:1, x2:0, y2:0, stop:0 #8d4925, stop:1 #b85e2a);
50 color: #ffffff;
51 font-size: 16px;
52 font-weight: bold;
53 border: 1px solid #5c2d15;
54 border-radius: 8px;
55 padding: 10px 0px;
56}
57
58QPushButton:hover {
59 /* 鼠标悬浮时颜色提亮，像火炉旁温暖的色调 */
60 background-color: qlineargradient(spread:pad, x1:0, y1:1, x2:0, y2:0, stop:0 #a0522d, stop:1 #cc6a30);
61}
62
63QPushButton:pressed {
64 background-color: #5c2d15; /* 按下变成深咖啡色 */
65 padding-top: 12px; /* 增加真实的按压凹陷感 */
66 padding-bottom: 8px;
67}
68background-color: rgba(20, 20, 20, 160); border-radius: 15px;
69/* ==================================
70 4. 拦截样式污染：重置 QMessageBox
71 ================================== */
72QMessageBox {
73 background-color: #fcfcfc; /* 干净的珍珠白底色 */
74}
75
76QMessageBox QLabel {
77 color: #2c3e50; /* 深空灰文字，在白底上极其清晰 */
78 font-size: 14px;
79 font-weight: bold;
80 background-color: transparent;
81}
82
83QMessageBox QPushButton {
84 background-color: #8d4925; /* 按钮保留一点餐厅的焦糖红木色呼应主题 */
85 color: #ffffff;
86 border: none;
87 border-radius: 4px;
88 padding: 6px 20px;
89 font-size: 13px;
90 min-width: 60px;
91 font-weight: normal;
92}
93
94QMessageBox QPushButton:hover {
95 background-color: #a0522d; /* 悬浮提亮 */
96}
97
98QMessageBox QPushButton:pressed {
99 background-color: #5c2d15;
100 padding-top: 8px; /* 微弱的下沉感 */
101 padding-bottom: 4px;
102}</string>
103 </property>

5CONFIG += c++11
6
7# The following define makes your compiler emit warnings if you use
8# any Qt feature that has been marked deprecated (the exact warnings
9# depend on your compiler). Please consult the documentation of the
10# deprecated API in order to know how to port your code away from it.
11DEFINES += QT_DEPRECATED_WARNINGS
12
13# You can also make your code fail to compile if it uses deprecated APIs.
14# In order to do so, uncomment the following line.
15# You can also select to disable deprecated APIs only up to a certain version of Qt.
16#DEFINES += QT_DISABLE_DEPRECATED_BEFORE=0x060000 # disables all the APIs deprecated before Qt 6.0.0
17

262 <value type="QString" key="Analyzer.Valgrind.KCachegrindExecutable">kcachegrind</value>
263 <value type="int" key="Analyzer.Valgrind.LeakCheckOnFinish">1</value>
264 <value type="int" key="Analyzer.Valgrind.NumCallers">25</value>

266 <value type="int" key="Analyzer.Valgrind.SelfModifyingCodeDetection">1</value>
267 <value type="bool" key="Analyzer.Valgrind.Settings.UseGlobalSettings">true</value>
268 <value type="bool" key="Analyzer.Valgrind.ShowReachable">false</value>
269 <value type="bool" key="Analyzer.Valgrind.TrackOrigins">true</value>
270 <value type="QString" key="Analyzer.Valgrind.ValgrindExecutable">valgrind</value>

1#include "adddishwidget.h"
2#include "serverwidget.h"
3#include "ui_serverwidget.h"
4
5#include <QJsonDocument>
6#include <QJsonObject>
7#include <QJsonArray>
8#include <QTableWidgetItem>
9#include <QDateTime>
10#include <QSqlDatabase>
11#include <QSqlQuery>
12#include <QSqlTableModel>
13#include <QSqlRecord>
14#include <QFile>
15
16#include <QMessageBox>
17#include <QTimer>
18
19ServerWidget::ServerWidget(QWidget *parent)
20 : QWidget(parent)
21 , ui(new Ui::ServerWidget)
22{
23 ui->setupUi(this);
24 // ================= 🌟 严格按照架构图初始化 3 张数据表 =================
25 QSqlDatabase db = QSqlDatabase::addDatabase("QSQLITE");
26 db.setDatabaseName("restaurant_pos.db"); // 生成本地数据库文件
27
28 if (!db.open()) {
29 qDebug() << "数据库打开失败";
30 } else {
31 qDebug() << "数据库打开成功";
32
33 QSqlQuery query;
34
35 //菜品表 (完全对应图纸：ID, 菜名, 类型, 介绍, 价格, 推荐, 折扣, 图片路径, 标志)
36 query.exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Menu ("
37 "dish_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, " // ID (自动生成)
38 "name TEXT UNIQUE, " // 菜名
39 "type TEXT, " // 类型 (热菜/凉菜)
40 "description TEXT, " // 介绍
41 "price REAL, " // 价格
42 "recommend INTEGER, " // 推荐 (1为推荐，0为普通)
43 "discount REAL, " // 折扣
44 "image_path TEXT, " // 图片(路径)
45 "flag INTEGER)"); // 标志 (比如 1代表在售，0代表售罄)
46
47 //订单表 (完全对应图纸：ID, 桌号, 时间, 状态)
48 query.exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Orders ("
49 "order_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, " // 订单ID (例如: 20260304_01)
50 "table_id TEXT, " // 桌号
51 "order_time TEXT, " // 时间
52 "status TEXT)"); // 状态 (待处理/已结账)
53
54 //(完全对应图纸：ID, 订单ID, 菜品ID/菜名, 标志)
55 // 巧妙桥接：这里我们用 dish_name 替代 菜品ID，完美对接你不改客户端的需求！
56 query.exec("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS OrderDetails ("
57 "detail_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, " // ID (自动生成)
58 "order_id TEXT, " // 订单ID (和第2张表关联)
59 "dish_name TEXT, " // 菜品ID/菜名 (直接存客户端发来的菜名)
60 "count INTEGER, " // 数量 (补充客户端发来的数量)
61 "flag INTEGER)"); // 标志
62
63 qDebug() << "表创建成功";
64 }
65 // =====================================================================
66 server = new QTcpServer();
67
68 if(server->listen(QHostAddress::Any , 8888))
69 {
70 ui->logEdit->append("服务器开始监听8888端口");
71 }
72 else
73 {
74 ui->logEdit->append("服务器启动失败");
75 }
76
77 //新桌台连接
78 connect(server , &QTcpServer::newConnection , [=](){
79
80 //获取该桌台的套接字
81 QTcpSocket * socket = server->nextPendingConnection();
82
83 //把套接字加入到链表中
84 clientList.append(socket);
85
86 //日志打印
87// QString ip = socket->peerAddress().toString();
88// ui->logEdit->append("新桌台已连接, IP地址：" + ip);
89
90 //绑定接收数据的信号
91 connect(socket , &QTcpSocket::readyRead , this , [=](){
92
93 QByteArray data = socket->readAll();
94 //测试
95 //ui->logEdit->append("收到数据：" + QString(data));
96
97 //解包json数据
98 QJsonParseError error;
99
100 QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(data , &error);
101
102 if(error.error != QJsonParseError::NoError)
103 {
104 ui->logEdit->append("收到非json数据" + QString(data));
105 return ;
106 }
107
108 //
109 if(doc.isObject())
110 {
111 QJsonObject root = doc.object();
112
113 QString type = root.value("type").toString();
114
115 // 判断类型指令
116 if(type == "Order")
117 {
118 QString tableID = root.value("tabelID").toString();
119
120 //生成唯一的订单号和当前时间
121 QString currentTime = QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
122 QString orderID = QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString("yyyyMMddHHmmss") + "_" + tableID;
123
124 // 测试
125 //qDebug() << tableID;
126
127 // 提取菜品数组
128 QJsonArray array = root.value("dishes").toArray();
129 double money = 0.0;
130
131 // 准备操作订单清单表
132 QSqlTableModel detailsModel;
133 detailsModel.setTable("OrderDetails");
134
135 //遍历这桌点的每一道菜
136 for( int i = 0; i < array.size() ; i++)
137 {
138 QJsonObject obj = array[i].toObject();
139
140 QString name = obj.value("name").toString();
141 int count = obj.value("count").toInt();
142 double price = obj.value("price").toDouble();
143
144 money += count * price; // 累加总金额
145
146 // 将具体菜品信息填入中间表格(获取当前列)
147 int row = ui->orderWidget->rowCount();
148 ui->orderWidget->insertRow(row);
149
150 ui->orderWidget->setItem(row , 0 , new QTableWidgetItem(name));
151 ui->orderWidget->setItem(row , 1 , new QTableWidgetItem(QString::number(price)));
152 ui->orderWidget->setItem(row , 2 , new QTableWidgetItem(QString::number(count)));
153
154 // 让表格里的文字居中显示
155 ui->orderWidget->item(row , 0)->setTextAlignment(Qt::AlignCenter);
156 ui->orderWidget->item(row , 1)->setTextAlignment(Qt::AlignCenter);
157 ui->orderWidget->item(row , 2)->setTextAlignment(Qt::AlignCenter);
158
159 // 数据库操作
160 QSqlRecord detailRecord = detailsModel.record();
161 detailRecord.setValue("order_id", orderID);
162 detailRecord.setValue("dish_name", name);
163 detailRecord.setValue("count", count);
164 detailRecord.setValue("flag", 1);
165 detailsModel.insertRecord(-1, detailRecord);
166 }
167
168 int statusrow = ui->statusWidget->rowCount();
169 ui->statusWidget->insertRow(statusrow);
170
171 ui->statusWidget->setItem(statusrow , 0 , new QTableWidgetItem(tableID));
172 ui->statusWidget->setItem(statusrow , 1 , new QTableWidgetItem("待处理"));
173 ui->statusWidget->setItem(statusrow , 2 , new QTableWidgetItem(QString::number(money)));
174
175 ui->statusWidget->item(statusrow , 0)->setTextAlignment(Qt::AlignCenter);
176 ui->statusWidget->item(statusrow , 1)->setTextAlignment(Qt::AlignCenter);
177 ui->statusWidget->item(statusrow , 2)->setTextAlignment(Qt::AlignCenter);
178
179 //订单表
180 QSqlTableModel ordersModel; //数据库模型
181 ordersModel.setTable("Orders"); //指定数据库里的表格
182
183 QSqlRecord mainRecord = ordersModel.record(); //创建表格里面的一行数据
184 mainRecord.setValue("order_id" , orderID);
185 mainRecord.setValue("table_id" , tableID);
186 mainRecord.setValue("order_time" , currentTime);
187 mainRecord.setValue("status" , "待处理");
188
189 ordersModel.insertRecord( -1 , mainRecord); //编号自行添加
190
191 // 测试
192 //qDebug() << "总金额:" << money;
193 //ui->logEdit->append("订单处理并成功入库！");
194
195 //打印带有时间、桌号和金额的蓝色加粗日志
196 QString logMsg = QString("<font color='blue' size='4'><b>🛒 新订单：[%1] 号桌在 %2 成功下单！(订单总额：$%3)</b></font>")
197 .arg(tableID)
198 .arg(currentTime)
199 .arg(money, 0, 'f', 2); // 0表示不限宽度，'f'表示浮点数，2表示保留两位小数
200
201 ui->logEdit->append(logMsg);
202 }
203 else if(type == "GetMenu") //ai优化
204 {
205 //qDebug() << "收到客户端请求,准备下发菜单";
206
207 QJsonObject root;
208 root.insert("type" , "MenuData");
209
210 //用于装菜品的数组
211 QJsonArray array;
212
213 QSqlQuery query;
214 query.exec("SELECT * FROM Menu");
215
216 while(query.next())
217 {
218 QJsonObject dish;
219
220 dish.insert("name" , query.value("name").toString());
221 dish.insert("price" , query.value("price").toDouble());
222 dish.insert("type" , query.value("type").toString());
223 dish.insert("description" , query.value("description").toString());
224
225 dish.insert("image_path" , query.value("image_path").toString());
226 dish.insert("flag" , query.value("flag").toInt());
227 dish.insert("discount", query.value("discount").toDouble());
228
229 //添加到数组
230 array.append(dish);
231 }
232 //把数组添加到根节点
233 root.insert("dishes" , array);
234
235 QJsonDocument doc(root);
236 QByteArray data = doc.toJson();
237
238 socket->write(data);
239
240 //qDebug()<<"成功发送数据";
241 }
242 else if( type == "GetImage")
243 {
244 QString imagePath = root.value("image_path").toString();
245 //qDebug()<<"收到客户端请求下载图片";
246
247 //从服务器找图片
248 QFile file(imagePath);
249
250 if(file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly))
251 {
252 QByteArray data = file.readAll();
253 file.close();
254
255 QString base64 = QString(data.toBase64());
256
257 //打包
258 QJsonObject obj;
259 obj.insert("type" , "ImageData");
260 obj.insert("image_path" , imagePath);
261 obj.insert("data" , base64);
262
263 //发送
264 QJsonDocument reply(obj);
265 socket->write(reply.toJson());
266
267 qDebug()<<"成功发送";
268 }
269 else{
270 qDebug()<<"发送失败！";
271 }
272 }
273 else if(type == "CheckoutRequest")
274 {
275 QString tableId = root.value("tableID").toString();
276
277 for( int i = 0 ; i < ui->statusWidget->rowCount(); i++)
278 {
279 QString currentTableId = ui->statusWidget->item(i, 0)->text();
280 QString currentStatus = ui->statusWidget->item(i, 1)->text();
281
282 if(currentTableId == tableId && currentStatus != "已结账")
283 {
284 ui->statusWidget->item(i , 1)->setText("请求结账");
285 ui->statusWidget->item(i , 1)->setForeground(QBrush(Qt::red));
286 }
287 }
288
289 //更新数据库
290 QSqlQuery query;
291 QString sql = QString("UPDATE Orders SET status = '请求结账' WHERE table_id = '%1' AND status != '已结账'").arg(tableId);
292 query.exec(sql);
293
294 ui->logEdit->append("呼叫结账：" + tableId + " 号桌顾客请求结账，请查收！");
295 }
296 else if (type == "CallService")
297 {
298 QString tableId = root.value("tableID").toString();
299
300 //遍历左侧订单表，把这桌的未结账订单变成“需要服务”
301 for (int i = 0; i < ui->statusWidget->rowCount(); i++)
302 {
303 QString currentTableId = ui->statusWidget->item(i, 0)->text();
304 QString currentStatus = ui->statusWidget->item(i, 1)->text();
305
306 if (currentTableId == tableId && currentStatus != "已结账")
307 {
308 ui->statusWidget->item(i, 1)->setText("需要服务");
309
310 ui->statusWidget->item(i, 1)->setForeground(QBrush(Qt::magenta));
311 }
312 }
313
314 //更新数据库
315 QSqlQuery query;
316 QString sql = QString("UPDATE Orders SET status = '需要服务' WHERE table_id = '%1' AND status != '已结账'").arg(tableId);
317 query.exec(sql);
318
319 //打印紫色加粗日志
320 QString alertMsg = QString("<font color='purple' size='4'><b>🛎️ 紧急呼叫：[%1] 号桌顾客需要人工服务，请立刻前往！</b></font>").arg(tableId);
321 ui->logEdit->append(alertMsg);
322 }
323 }
324
325 });
326 });
327}
328
329ServerWidget::~ServerWidget()
330{
331 delete ui;
332}
333
334
335void ServerWidget::on_addBtn_clicked()
336{
337 AddDishWidget * add = new AddDishWidget();
338
339 // 监听录入界面的信号
340 connect(add, &AddDishWidget::sig_addSuccess, this, [=](){
341
342 this->show();
343
344 //准备打包最新的菜单
345 QJsonObject root;
346 root.insert("type" , "MenuData");
347 QJsonArray array;
348 QSqlQuery query;
349 query.exec("SELECT * FROM Menu");
350
351 while(query.next())
352 {
353 QJsonObject dish;
354 dish.insert("name" , query.value("name").toString());
355 dish.insert("price" , query.value("price").toDouble());
356 dish.insert("type" , query.value("type").toString());
357 dish.insert("description" , query.value("description").toString());
358 dish.insert("image_path" , query.value("image_path").toString());
359 dish.insert("flag" , query.value("flag").toInt());
360 dish.insert("discount", query.value("discount").toDouble());
361 array.append(dish);
362 }
363 root.insert("dishes" , array);
364 QByteArray data = QJsonDocument(root).toJson();
365
366 //遍历所有点餐机(实时显示添加菜品)
367 for(int i = 0; i < clientList.size(); i++)
368 {
369 // 确保客户端没离线
370 if(clientList[i]->state() == QAbstractSocket::ConnectedState)
371 {
372 clientList[i]->write(data);
373 }
374 }
375
376 //ui->logEdit->append("已添加新菜品！");
377 });
378
379 add->show();
380 this->hide();
381}
382
383void ServerWidget::on_payBtn_clicked()
384{
385 //获取当前选中的行
386 int row = ui->statusWidget->currentRow();
387 if(row < 0)
388 {
389 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "请选择要结账的订单");
390 return ;
391 }
392
393 //提前桌号和当前状态
394 QString tableId = ui->statusWidget->item(row , 0)->text();
395 QString status = ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->text();
396
397 if(status == "已结账")
398 {
399 QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "这桌已经买过单啦");
400 return ;
401 }
402
403 //更新数据库
404 QSqlQuery query;
405 QString sql = QString("UPDATE Orders SET status = '已结账' WHERE table_id = '%1'").arg(tableId);
406
407 if (query.exec(sql))
408 {
409 // 4. 界面大刷新：状态变回黑色“已结账”
410 ui->statusWidget->item(row, 1)->setText("已结账");
411 ui->statusWidget->item(row, 1)->setForeground(QBrush(Qt::black));
412
413 QMessageBox::information(this, "收银成功", tableId + " 号桌结账成功，老板发大财！");
414
415 // 清空右侧详情
416 ui->orderWidget->clearContents();
417 ui->orderWidget->setRowCount(0);
418
419 ui->logEdit->append("收银完毕：" + tableId + " 号桌已完成结账！");
420 }
421 else
422 {
423 QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "数据库出错,支付未成功" );
424 }
425}
426
427void ServerWidget::on_serBtn_clicked()
428{
429 int row = ui->statusWidget->currentRow();
430 if( row < 0 )
431 {
432 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "请选择要服务的桌号");
433 return ;
434 }
435
436 QString tableID = ui->statusWidget->item(row , 0)->text();
437 QString status = ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->text();
438
439 if(status != "需要服务")
440 {
441 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "不需要服务");
442 return ;
443 }
444 else if(status == "需要服务")
445 {
446 QSqlQuery query;
447 QString sql = QString("UPDATE Orders SET status = '就餐中' WHERE table_id = '%1' AND status = '需要服务'").arg(tableID);
448
449 if(query.exec(sql))
450 {
451 ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->setText("已处理");
452 ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->setForeground(QBrush(Qt::green));
453 //ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->setText("就餐中");
454
455 ui->logEdit->append("服务完成：" + tableID + " 号桌的呼叫已处理完毕！");
456
457// QTimer::singleShot(1500 , this , [=](){
458// ui->statusWidget->item( row , 1)->setText("就餐中");
459// ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->setForeground(QBrush(Qt::darkBlue));
460// });
461 }
462 }
463 else
464 {
465 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "服务出错");
466 }
467
468}
469
470void ServerWidget::on_outBtn_clicked()
471{
472 int row = ui->statusWidget->currentRow();
473 if(row < 0)
474 {
475 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "请选择要出餐的桌号");
476 return ;
477 }
478
479 QString tableID = ui->statusWidget->item(row , 0)->text();
480 QString status = ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->text();
481
482 if(status != "待处理")
483 {
484 QMessageBox::warning( this, "提示" , "已出餐或已结账");
485 return ;
486 }
487 else if(status == "待处理")
488 {
489 QSqlQuery query;
490 QString sql = QString("UPDATE Orders SET status = '已出餐' WHERE table_id = '%1' AND status = '待处理'").arg(tableID);
491
492 if(query.exec(sql))
493 {
494 ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->setText("已出餐");
495 ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->setForeground(QBrush(Qt::blue));
496 ui->logEdit->append( tableID + "已出餐");
497
498 QTimer::singleShot(1500 , this , [=](){
499 ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->setText("就餐中");
500 ui->statusWidget->item(row , 1)->setForeground(QBrush(Qt::darkMagenta));
501 });
502 }
503 else
504 {
505 QMessageBox::warning( this , "提示" , "未成功出餐");
506 }
507 }
508}
509
1#ifndef SERVERWIDGET_H
2#define SERVERWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5#include <QTcpServer>
6#include <QTcpSocket>
7#include <QVector>
8
9
10QT_BEGIN_NAMESPACE
11namespace Ui { class ServerWidget; }
12QT_END_NAMESPACE
13
14class ServerWidget : public QWidget
15{
16 Q_OBJECT
17
18public:
19 ServerWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
20 ~ServerWidget();
21
22private slots:
23 void on_addBtn_clicked();
24
25 void on_payBtn_clicked();
26
27 void on_serBtn_clicked();
28
29 void on_outBtn_clicked();
30
31private:
32 Ui::ServerWidget *ui;
33
34 QTcpServer * server;
35
36 //用于存客户端桌台的链表
37 QVector<QTcpSocket*> clientList;
38
39};
40#endif // SERVERWIDGET_H
41
1#ifndef SERVERWIDGET_H
2#define SERVERWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5#include <QTcpServer>
6#include <QTcpSocket>
7#include <QVector>
8
9
10QT_BEGIN_NAMESPACE
11namespace Ui { class ServerWidget; }
12QT_END_NAMESPACE
13
14class ServerWidget : public QWidget
15{
16 Q_OBJECT
17
18public:
19 ServerWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
20 ~ServerWidget();
21
22private slots:
23 void on_addBtn_clicked();
24
25 void on_payBtn_clicked();
26
27 void on_serBtn_clicked();
28
29 void on_outBtn_clicked();
30
31private:
32 Ui::ServerWidget *ui;
33
34 QTcpServer * server;
35
36 //用于存客户端桌台的链表
37 QVector<QTcpSocket*> clientList;
38
39};
40#endif // SERVERWIDGET_H
41
1<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2<ui version="4.0">
3 <class>ServerWidget</class>
4 <widget class="QWidget" name="ServerWidget">
5 <property name="geometry">
6 <rect>
7 <x>0</x>
8 <y>0</y>
9 <width>793</width>
10 <height>441</height>
11 </rect>
12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>ServerWidget</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* ==================================
18 1. 全局背景：高端炭灰色 (石板桌面质感)
19 ================================== */
20QWidget#ServerWidget {
21 background-color: #2b2b2b;
22}
23
24/* ==================================
25 2. 数据表格核心美化：黑金防白底版
26 ================================== */
27QTableWidget, QTableView, QAbstractScrollArea {
28 background-color: #383838; /* 稍微亮一点的深炭色 */
29 border: none;
30 border-radius: 12px;
31 gridline-color: #4a4a4a;
32 color: #f3e5ab; /* 柔和的香草奶油色文字 */
33 font-size: 14px;
34 selection-background-color: #f39c12; /* 选中行：高贵的琥珀金 */
35 selection-color: #000000; /* 选中后文字变黑，对比更强烈 */
36 outline: none;
37}
38
39/* 强制涂黑底层视口 */
40QTableWidget::viewport, QTableView::viewport, QAbstractScrollArea::viewport {
41 background-color: #383838;
42}
43
44/* ==================================
45 3. 表头美化：金色招牌感
46 ================================== */
47QHeaderView::section {
48 background-color: #383838;
49 color: #f39c12; /* 表头用琥珀金，非常有档次 */
50 font-weight: bold;
51 font-size: 15px;
52 border: none;
53 border-bottom: 2px solid #f39c12; /* 金色底线 */
54 padding: 10px;
55}
56
57/* 隐藏左侧默认行号 */
58QHeaderView::section:vertical {
59 border: none;
60 background-color: #383838;
61 color: #383838;
62}
63
64/* ==================================
65 4. 右侧操作按钮：暖色调交互引导
66 ================================== */
67/* 常规按钮 (录入菜品 &amp; 处理服务) */
68QPushButton {
69 background-color: #454545;
70 border: none;
71 color: #f3e5ab;
72 border-radius: 10px;
73 padding: 12px;
74 font-size: 15px;
75 font-weight: bold;
76 min-height: 45px;
77}
78QPushButton:hover {
79 background-color: #555555;
80 color: #ffffff;
81}
82
83/* 🌟 特权按钮：出餐 (琥珀金 - 提示准备就绪) */
84QPushButton#outBtn {
85 background-color: #f39c12;
86 color: #000000;
87}
88QPushButton#outBtn:hover {
89 background-color: #e67e22; /* 悬浮变成焦糖色 */
90}
91
92/* 🌟 特权按钮：确定结账 (焦糖橙 - 温馨的收尾) */
93QPushButton#payBtn {
94 background-color: #d35400;
95 color: #ffffff;
96}
97QPushButton#payBtn:hover {
98 background-color: #c0392b; /* 悬浮变成深红橙 */
99}
100
101/* ==================================
102 5. 右下角日志框：温馨提示风
103 ================================== */
104QTextEdit#logEdit {
105 background-color: #1a1a1a; /* 极暗底色 */
106 border: 1px solid #f39c12; /* 金色边框 */
107 border-radius: 12px;
108 color: #f3e5ab; /* 奶油白文字 */
109 font-size: 14px;
110 padding: 10px;
111}
112
113/* ==================================
114 6. 弹窗修复 (保持一致)
115 ================================== */
116QMessageBox {
117 background-color: #ffffff;
118}
119QMessageBox QLabel {
120 color: #000000;
121 font-size: 14px;
122}
123QMessageBox QPushButton {
124 color: #000000;
125 background-color: #f0f0f0;
126 min-width: 70px;
127 min-height: 30px;
128 border-radius: 5px;
129}</string>

1#include "menuwidget.h"
2#include "tablewidget.h"
3#include "ui_tablewidget.h"
4
5#include <QGraphicsDropShadowEffect>
6#include <QDateTime>
7#include <QMessageBox>
8
9#include <QCoreApplication>
10#include <QRandomGenerator>
11#include <QDebug>
12
13tableWidget::tableWidget(QWidget *parent) :
14 QWidget(parent),
15 ui(new Ui::tableWidget)
16{
17 ui->setupUi(this);
18
19 // 去掉系统自带的窗口边框和标题栏
20 this->setWindowFlags(Qt::FramelessWindowHint);
21 // 让背景（也就是那圈20px的边距）彻底变透明
22 this->setAttribute(Qt::WA_TranslucentBackground);
23
24 // 给中间的白卡片加上高级的悬浮阴影
25 QGraphicsDropShadowEffect *shadow = new QGraphicsDropShadowEffect(this);
26 shadow->setOffset(0, 8); // 阴影向下偏移 8 像素
27 shadow->setColor(QColor(0, 0, 0, 30)); // 非常淡的纯黑色阴影 (透明度30)
28 shadow->setBlurRadius(25); // 阴影模糊半径，越大越柔和
29 ui->centerFrame->setGraphicsEffect(shadow); // 应用给你的中心卡片
30
31 QList<QPushButton*> btnList = {
32 ui->Btn1,ui->Btn2 ,ui->Btn3,
33 ui->Btn4,ui->Btn5 ,ui->Btn6,
34 ui->Btn7,ui->Btn8 ,ui->Btn9,
35 };
36
37 int i = 0;
38
39 while (i < btnList.size())
40 {
41 QPushButton * btn = btnList[i];
42
43 connect(btn, &QPushButton::clicked, this, [=](){
44 QString tableText = btn->text();
45
46 QString htmlText = QString("桌台：<span style='color:#ffb142;'>%1</span>").arg(tableText);
47 ui->tablelabel->setText(htmlText);
48
49 q_table = tableText;
50
51 });
52
53 i++;
54 }
55}
56
57tableWidget::~tableWidget()
58{
59 delete ui;
60}
61
62void tableWidget::on_StartBtn_clicked()
63{
64 if(q_table.isEmpty())
65 {
66 QMessageBox::information( this , "提示" , "请选择哪一桌就坐");
67 return ;
68 }
69
70 QString ordID = QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString("yyyyMMddhhmm");
71
72 int randomNum = QRandomGenerator::global()->bounded(1000, 10000);
73 QString randserID = "K" + QString::number(randomNum);
74
75 MenuWidget * menu = new MenuWidget();
76 menu->initTableInfo(randserID , q_table , q_peonum , ordID);
77 menu->show();
78
79 this->hide();
80}
81
1#ifndef TABLEWIDGET_H
2#define TABLEWIDGET_H
3
4#include <QWidget>
5
6namespace Ui {
7class tableWidget;
8}
9
10class tableWidget : public QWidget
11{
12 Q_OBJECT
13
14public:
15 explicit tableWidget(QWidget *parent = nullptr);
16 ~tableWidget();
17
18 QString q_peonum;
19
20private slots:
21 void on_StartBtn_clicked();
22
23private:
24 Ui::tableWidget *ui;
25
26 QString q_table;
27};
28
29#endif // TABLEWIDGET_H

12 </property>
13 <property name="windowTitle">
14 <string>Form</string>
15 </property>
16 <property name="styleSheet">
17 <string notr="true">/* 1. 底层背景：稍微加深一点点灰，为了衬托白卡片的阴影 */
18QWidget#PeoNumWidget {
19 background-color: #E8ECEF;
20}
21
22/* 2. 核心大卡片：纯白，圆角稍微收敛一点，显得更硬朗专业 */
23QFrame#centerFrame {
24 background-color: #ffffff;
25 border-radius: 16px;
26 border: none; /* 去掉边框，全靠我们上面写的 C++ 阴影撑起立体感！ */
27}
28
29/* 3. 顶部展示标签：次级信息颜色变淡 */
30QLabel#peonumLabel {
31 color: #7F8C8D; /* 高级灰 */
32 font-size: 18px;
33 font-weight: bold;
34 qproperty-alignment: AlignCenter;
35 margin-bottom: 10px;
36}
37
38/* 4. 数字键盘：纯白底色，浅色精致边框，清脆感 */
39QPushButton {
40 background-color: #FFFFFF;
41 border: 1px solid #E4E7ED; /* 极细的边框线 */
42 color: #2C3E50;
43 font-size: 28px;
44 font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;, sans-serif; /* 数字用 Arial 更好看 */
45 border-radius: 12px; /* 和主卡片呼应的圆角 */
46 min-width: 70px;
47 min-height: 70px;
48}
49/* 鼠标悬停：边框亮起品牌色 */
50QPushButton:hover {
51 background-color: #FDFEFE;
52 border: 2px solid #ffb142;
53 color: #ffb142;
54}
55/* 点击瞬间 */
56QPushButton:pressed {
57 background-color: #ffb142;
58 color: white;
59 border: none;
60}
61
62/* 5. 开始点餐按钮：圆角统一为 12px！消灭形状冲突！ */
63QPushButton#StartBtn {
64 background-color: #ffb142;
65 color: white;
66 font-size: 20px;
67 font-weight: bold;
68 border-radius: 12px; /* 重点：改成和数字按钮一样的 12px 圆角 */
69 border: none;
70 min-height: 55px;
71 margin-top: 15px;
72}
73QPushButton#StartBtn:hover {
74 background-color: #FFA01A;
75}
76QPushButton#StartBtn:pressed {
77 background-color: #E68A00;
78}</string>

← 返回项目列表

智能家居

项目描述

用LVGL以及MQTT巴法云实现的远端控制的智能家居系统

项目文件 13 个文件

📝Dev.cc
📝Ser.cc
📝cJSON.cc
📁cJSON.hc
📝client_app.cc
📁demo⬇
📁dev⬇
📋devices.jsonjson
📁server⬇
📝server.cc
📄smart_log.txtplaintext
📝smart_protocol.cc
📁smart_protocol.hc
选择文件查看
📂

从左侧选择文件以查看代码

1#include <stdio.h>
2#include <stdlib.h>
3#include <string.h>
4#include <unistd.h>
5#include <pthread.h>
6#include <time.h>
7#include <arpa/inet.h>
8#include <sys/socket.h>
9#include <netdb.h>
10#include "../inc/cJSON.h"
11#include "../inc/smart_protocol.h"
12
13// 服务器配置
14#define SERVER_IP "127.0.0.1"
15#define SERVER_PORT 8888
16
17// 设备信息结构体
18typedef struct
19{
20 int id;
21 char name[64];
22} DeviceInfo;
23
24#define MAX_DEVICES 20 //数组最大下标
25DeviceInfo devices[MAX_DEVICES]; //设备数组
26int device_count = 0; //设备数
27
28// 存储天气信息
29char weather_text[64] = "Loading...";
30char city_text[64] = "Loading...";
31
32// 读取配置文件
33void load_device_config()
34{
35 FILE *f = fopen("devices.json", "rb");
36 if(!f)
37 {
38 printf("⚠️ No config found\n");
39 return;
40 }
41
42 fseek(f, 0, SEEK_END);
43 long len = ftell(f);
44 fseek(f, 0, SEEK_SET);
45
46 char *data = malloc(len+1);
47 fread(data, 1, len, f);
48 data[len] = 0;
49 fclose(f);
50
51 cJSON *root = cJSON_Parse(data);
52 cJSON *list = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "list");
53
54 if(list)
55 {
56 device_count = 0;
57 int count = cJSON_GetArraySize(list);
58 for(int i=0; i<count; i++)
59 {
60 cJSON *item = cJSON_GetArrayItem(list, i);
61 devices[i].id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "id")->valueint;
62 strcpy(devices[i].name, cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "name")->valuestring);
63 device_count++;
64 }
65 }
66 cJSON_Delete(root); free(data);
67 printf("✅ [Sim] Loaded %d devices\n", device_count);
68}
69
70// 接收线程
71void *recv_thread(void *arg)
72{
73 int fd = (int)(long)arg;
74 char buf[1024];
75 while(recv(fd, buf, 1023, 0) > 0)
76 {
77 cJSON *root = cJSON_Parse(buf);
78 if(root)
79 {
80 cJSON *type = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "type");
81 if(type && type->valueint == MSG_CONTROL)
82 {
83 int tid = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "target_id")->valueint;
84 int val = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "val")->valueint;
85 // 查找设备名
86 char *name = "未知设备";
87 for(int i=0; i<device_count; i++)
88 {
89 if(devices[i].id == tid)
90 {
91 name = devices[i].name;
92 printf("⚡️ ACTION: [%s] -> %d\n", name, val);
93 }
94 }
95 }
96 cJSON_Delete(root);
97 }
98 }
99 return NULL;
100}
101
102// 启动单个模拟设备
103void start_sim_device(int id)
104{
105 int fd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
106 struct sockaddr_in a;
107 a.sin_family = AF_INET;
108 a.sin_port = htons(SERVER_PORT);
109 a.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr(SERVER_IP);
110
111 if(connect(fd, (struct sockaddr*)&a, sizeof(a)) == 0)
112 {
113 char *reg = protocol_pack_register(id, 1);
114 send(fd, reg, strlen(reg), 0);
115 free(reg);
116
117 pthread_t t;
118 pthread_create(&t, NULL, recv_thread, (void*)(long)fd);
119 pthread_detach(t);
120 }
121}
122
123// 获取天气
124void get_weather()
125{
126 int sockfd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
127 if (sockfd < 0) return;
128
129 struct sockaddr_in saddr; //服务器地址
130 memset(&saddr,0, sizeof(saddr));//清空
131 saddr.sin_family = AF_INET;
132 saddr.sin_port = htons(80);
133 saddr.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr("116.62.81.138");
134
135 // 2. 连接
136 if(connect(sockfd, (struct sockaddr *)&saddr, sizeof(saddr)) < 0)
137 {
138 close(sockfd); return;
139 }
140
141 // 3. 发送请求
142 const char *request = "GET /v3/weather/now.json?key=SbslwZ6X47ih3u-bX&location=GuangZhou&language=en&unit=c HTTP/1.1\r\nhost:api.seniverse.com\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n";
143 send(sockfd, request, strlen(request), 0);
144
145 // 4. 接收数据
146 char buf[4096] = {0};
147 int len, total = 0;
148 while((len = recv(sockfd, buf + total, 4095 - total, 0)) > 0)
149 {
150 total += len;
151 }
152 close(sockfd);
153
154 // 5. 解析 JSON
155 char *json_start = strstr(buf, "\r\n\r\n"); // 跳过 HTTP 头
156 if(json_start)
157 {
158 json_start += 4;
159 cJSON *root = cJSON_Parse(json_start);
160 if(root)
161 {
162 cJSON *results = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "results");
163 if(results)
164 {
165 cJSON *item = cJSON_GetArrayItem(results, 0);
166 // 提取城市
167 cJSON *location = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "location");
168 if(location)
169 {
170 cJSON *name = cJSON_GetObjectItem(location, "name");
171 if(name)
172 {
173 strcpy(city_text, name->valuestring);
174 }
175 }
176 // 提取天气
177 cJSON *now = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "now");
178 if(now)
179 {
180 cJSON *text = cJSON_GetObjectItem(now, "text");
181 if(text)
182 {
183 strcpy(weather_text, text->valuestring);
184 }
185 }
186 printf(" [真实天气] City:%s Weather:%s\n", city_text, weather_text);
187 }
188 cJSON_Delete(root);
189 }
190 }
191}
192
193// 温度传感器模拟线程
194void *sensor_thread(void *arg)
195{
196 int fd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
197 struct sockaddr_in a;
198 a.sin_family = AF_INET;
199 a.sin_port = htons(SERVER_PORT);
200 a.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr(SERVER_IP);
201
202 if(connect(fd, (struct sockaddr*)&a, sizeof(a)) == 0)
203 {
204 // 注册设备 ID 102
205 char *reg = protocol_pack_register(102, 1);
206 send(fd, reg, strlen(reg), 0); free(reg);
207
208 srand(time(NULL));
209 int loop_count = 0; // 定义计数器
210
211 while(1)
212 {
213 // 1. 生成随机温度
214 double t = 28.0 + (rand()%50)/10.0;
215
216 // 2. 联网更新天气文字
217 if(loop_count % 10 == 0)
218 {
219 get_weather();
220 }
221 loop_count++;
222
223 // 3. 拼接 JSON
224 char json_msg[512];
225 sprintf(json_msg,
226 "{\"type\":2, \"id\":102, \"temp\":%.1f, \"weather\":\"%s\", \"city\":\"%s\"}",
227 t, weather_text, city_text);
228
229 send(fd, json_msg, strlen(json_msg), 0);
230
231 printf("Temp=%.1f(AI用), Weather=%s\n", t, weather_text);
232 sleep(3);
233 }
234 }
235 return NULL;
236}
237
238
239int main()
240{
241 printf("=== 🛠 IoT Simulator Started ===\n");
242 load_device_config();
243 if(device_count == 0)
244 {
245 start_sim_device(101);
246 }
247 else for(int i=0; i<device_count; i++)
248 {
249 start_sim_device(devices[i].id);
250 usleep(50000);
251 }
252
253 pthread_t t;
254 pthread_create(&t, NULL, sensor_thread, NULL);
255 pthread_detach(t);
256
257 while(1)
258 {
259 //sleep(10);
260 }
261 return 0;
262}
1#include <stdio.h>
2#include <stdlib.h>
3#include <string.h>
4#include <unistd.h>
5#include <pthread.h>
6#include <arpa/inet.h>
7#include <sys/socket.h>
8#include <sys/time.h>
9#include <errno.h>
10#include "../inc/cJSON.h"
11#include "../inc/smart_protocol.h"
12
13#define SERVER_PORT 8888
14
15//设备结构体
16typedef struct DeviceNode
17{
18 int fd;
19 int id;
20 struct DeviceNode *next;
21} DeviceNode;
22
23DeviceNode *head = NULL;
24
25//链表锁
26pthread_mutex_t list_mutex = PTHREAD_MUTEX_INITIALIZER;
27//云锁
28pthread_mutex_t bemfa_mutex = PTHREAD_MUTEX_INITIALIZER;
29
30int cloudfd = -1; //巴法云套接字
31int fan_state = 0; //风扇的状态(默认关闭)
32int chuan_state = 0; //窗帘的状态
33
34#define TOPIC_LAMP "JeNJIYAxM002"
35#define TOPIC_FAN "O0BlzFcLq003"
36#define TOPIC_CURTAIN "qJWya82jj009"
37#define TOPIC_AIRCON "pkY9VAFZ5005"
38#define TOPIC_HUMI "NZWOEmCOk011"
39#define TOPIC_TV "WrE3qalg1012"
40
41#define BEMFA_UID "d3494acad6424a54bf8142d7a3e60cb9"
42#define BEMFA_IP "119.91.109.180"
43#define BEMFA_PORT 8344
44
45void send_cloud(char * msg);
46void sync_to_cloud(int target_id, int val);
47void add_device(int fd, int id);
48int find_fd_by_id(int id);
49void remove_device(int fd);
50void parse_bemfa_cmd(char * recv_str);
51
52//发送连接云
53void send_cloud( char * msg)
54{
55 pthread_mutex_lock(&bemfa_mutex);
56 if (cloudfd > 0)
57 {
58 if (send( cloudfd , msg , strlen(msg) , 0) < 0)
59 {
60 printf("云连接失败...\n");
61 close(cloudfd);
62 cloudfd = -1;
63 }
64 }
65 pthread_mutex_unlock(&bemfa_mutex);
66}
67
68//发送消息给云
69void sync_to_cloud(int target_id, int val)
70{
71 char buffer[256];
72 char * topic = NULL;
73 char msg[32];
74
75 if (target_id == ROLE_LAMP)
76 {
77 topic = TOPIC_LAMP;
78 sprintf(msg, "%s", val ? "on" : "off");
79 }
80 else if (target_id == ROLE_FAN)
81 {
82 //发送数字
83 topic = TOPIC_FAN;
84 fan_state = val;
85 sprintf(msg, "%d", val);// 发送真实档位 (0, 1, 2, 3)
86 }
87 else if( target_id == ROLE_CURTAIN) //窗帘
88 {
89 //发送数字
90 topic = TOPIC_CURTAIN;
91 chuan_state = val;
92 sprintf(msg , "%d" , val);
93 }
94 else if( target_id == ROLE_AIRCON)
95 {
96 topic = TOPIC_AIRCON;
97 sprintf(msg , "%s" , val ? "on" : "off");
98 }
99 else if( target_id == ROLE_HUMIDIFIER)
100 {
101 topic = TOPIC_HUMI;
102 sprintf(msg , "%s" , val ? "on" : "off");
103 }
104 else if ( target_id == ROLE_TV)
105 {
106 topic = TOPIC_TV;
107 sprintf(msg , "%s" , val ? "on" : "off");
108 }
109
110 if (topic != NULL)
111 {
112 snprintf( buffer , sizeof(buffer) , "cmd=2&uid=%s&topic=%s&msg=%s\r\n" , BEMFA_UID , topic , msg );
113 printf("云上传 ID:%d (Val:%d) -> Msg:%s\n", target_id, val, msg);
114
115 //发送cmd=2&uid=%s&topic=%s&msg=%s\r\n格式到云
116 send_cloud(buffer);
117 }
118
119}
120
121//云指令解析(进行信息转换)：topic设备 msg消息
122void parse_bemfa_cmd( char * recv_str)
123{
124 //cmd=2&uid=%s&topic=%s&msg=%s\r\n
125 char *p_topic = strstr(recv_str , "&topic=");
126 char *p_msg = strstr(recv_str , "&msg=");
127
128 if (p_topic && p_msg)
129 {
130 //跳过标签头
131 p_topic += 7;
132 p_msg += 5;
133
134 //复制内容
135 char topic[64] = {0};
136 int i = 0;
137 while (p_topic[i] != '&' && p_topic[i] != '\0' && i< 63) //消息过滤
138 {
139 topic[i] = p_topic[i];
140 i++;
141 }
142 char msg[64] = {0};
143 i = 0;
144 while (p_msg[i] != '\r' && p_msg[i] != '\n' && p_msg[i] != '\0' && p_msg[i] != '&' && i < 63)
145 {
146 msg[i] = p_msg[i];
147 i++;
148 }
149 printf("收到云端指令: TOPC:%s Msg:%s\n" , topic , msg);
150
151 int target_id = -1; //目标设备id
152 int val = 0; //控制开关的值
153 char *cmd_type = "";//用于更新设备图标(开发板)
154 int update = 1; //特殊标记(用于风扇，窗帘)
155
156 if (strcmp(topic , TOPIC_LAMP) == 0 )
157 {
158 target_id = ROLE_LAMP ;
159 val = (strcmp (msg , "on") == 0);
160 cmd_type = "lamp_sync";//发送更新设备消息
161 }
162 else if(strcmp(topic , TOPIC_FAN) == 0)
163 {
164 target_id = ROLE_FAN;
165 cmd_type = "fan_sync";
166 if (strcmp(msg , "on") == 0) //开着
167 {
168 if (fan_state > 0) // 1 2 3档
169 {
170 //后续循环中禁止更新(实现1 2 3档不回档)
171 update = 0;
172 }
173 else // 收到fan_state == 0(关闭)
174 {
175 //默认开1档
176 val = 1;
177 }
178 }
179 else if (strcmp(msg , "off") == 0)
180 {
181 val = 0;
182 }
183 else
184 {
185 //发送挡位的数字( 1 2 3档)
186 val = atoi(msg);
187 }
188 if (update)
189 {
190 //更新状态
191 fan_state = val;
192 }
193
194 }
195 else if (strcmp(topic , TOPIC_CURTAIN) == 0)
196 {
197 target_id = ROLE_CURTAIN;
198 cmd_type = "curtain_sync";
199 if (strcmp(msg , "on") == 0)
200 {
201 if (chuan_state > 0)
202 {
203 update = 0;
204 }
205 else
206 {
207 val = 100; // 只有在全关状态下收到 on，才全开
208 }
209 }
210 else if (strcmp(msg , "off") == 0)
211 {
212 val = 0;
213 }
214 else
215 {
216 val = atoi(msg);
217 }
218 if (update)
219 {
220 chuan_state = val;
221 }
222 }
223 else if ( strcmp(topic , TOPIC_AIRCON) == 0 )
224 {
225 target_id = ROLE_AIRCON;
226 val = (strcmp(msg , "on") == 0);
227 cmd_type = "aircon_sync";
228 }
229 else if ( strcmp(topic , TOPIC_HUMI) == 0)
230 {
231 target_id = ROLE_HUMIDIFIER;
232 val = (strcmp(msg , "on") == 0);
233 cmd_type = "humi_sync";
234 }
235 else if ( strcmp(topic , TOPIC_TV) == 0)
236 {
237 target_id = ROLE_TV;
238 val = (strcmp(msg , "on") == 0);
239 cmd_type = "tv_sync";
240 }
241
242 if (target_id != -1 && update) //有设备要更新
243 {
244 int sim_fd = find_fd_by_id(target_id);
245 if (sim_fd > 0)
246 {
247 //// 打包JSON：{"target_id": 105, "cmd": "speed", "val": 3}
248 char *ctrl_cmd = "power";
249 if (target_id == ROLE_FAN)
250 {
251 ctrl_cmd = "speed";
252 }
253 if (target_id == ROLE_CURTAIN)
254 {
255 ctrl_cmd = "pos";
256 }
257 if (target_id == ROLE_AIRCON)
258 {
259 ctrl_cmd = "mode";
260 }
261
262 //调用json控制格式:
263 //{"type": 1, "target_id": 101, "cmd": "power", "val": 1}
264 char * json = protocol_pack_control(target_id, ctrl_cmd, val);
265 send( sim_fd , json , strlen(json) ,0 );
266 free(json);
267 }
268 //开发板显示
269 int board_fd = find_fd_by_id(0);
270 if (board_fd > 0)
271 {
272 char *json = protocol_pack_control(0, cmd_type, val);
273 send(board_fd , json , strlen(json) , 0);
274 free(json);
275 }
276 }
277 }
278}
279//云线程
280void *bemfa_thread_func(void *arg)
281{
282 while (1)
283 {
284 printf("巴法云连接中 %s:%d ...\n" , BEMFA_IP , BEMFA_PORT);
285
286 //创建套接字
287 int sockfd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
288
289 struct sockaddr_in addr;
290 addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
291 addr.sin_port = htons( BEMFA_PORT);
292 addr.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr( BEMFA_IP);
293
294 //连接
295 if (connect(sockfd , (struct sockaddr *)&addr , sizeof(addr)) < 0)
296 {
297 close(sockfd);
298 sleep(5);
299 continue;
300 }
301
302 pthread_mutex_lock(&bemfa_mutex);
303 cloudfd = sockfd;
304 pthread_mutex_unlock(&bemfa_mutex);
305 printf("巴法云连接成功,成功订阅设备...\n");
306
307 char msg[256];
308 char * topic[] = {TOPIC_LAMP, TOPIC_FAN, TOPIC_CURTAIN, TOPIC_AIRCON, TOPIC_HUMI, TOPIC_TV};
309 for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
310 {
311 snprintf(msg , sizeof(msg) , "cmd=1&uid=%s&topic=%s\r\n" , BEMFA_UID , topic[i] );
312 send_cloud( msg );
313 usleep(50000);
314 }
315
316 //发送心跳包
317 struct timeval tv = {30, 0};
318 setsockopt(sockfd, SOL_SOCKET, SO_RCVTIMEO, (const char*)&tv, sizeof tv);
319 char buf[1024];
320 while (cloudfd > 0)
321 {
322 int len = recv(sockfd, buf, sizeof(buf)-1, 0);
323 if (len > 0)
324 {
325 buf[len] = 0;
326 parse_bemfa_cmd(buf);
327 }
328 else if (len == 0) break;
329 else if (errno == EAGAIN || errno == EWOULDBLOCK)
330 send_cloud("cmd=0&msg=ping\r\n");
331 else break;
332 }
333 close(sockfd);
334 pthread_mutex_lock(&bemfa_mutex);
335 cloudfd = -1;
336 pthread_mutex_unlock(&bemfa_mutex);
337 sleep(5);
338
339 }
340 return NULL;
341}
342
343//添加设备
344void add_device( int fd , int id )
345{
346 pthread_mutex_lock(&list_mutex);
347 DeviceNode * newnode = malloc(sizeof(DeviceNode));
348 if (newnode)
349 {
350 newnode->fd = fd;
351 newnode->id = id;
352 newnode->next = head;
353 head = newnode;
354 }
355 pthread_mutex_unlock(&list_mutex);
356 printf(">>> ✅ 设备上线: ID %d\n", id);
357}
358
359//查找
360int find_fd_by_id( int id)
361{
362 pthread_mutex_lock(&list_mutex);
363 DeviceNode *p = head;
364 while (p)
365 {
366 if (p->id == id)
367 {
368 int fd = p->fd;
369 pthread_mutex_unlock(&list_mutex);
370 return fd;
371 }
372 p = p->next;
373 }
374}
375
376//删除
377void remove_device(int fd)
378{
379 pthread_mutex_lock(&list_mutex);
380 DeviceNode *p = head;
381 DeviceNode *prev = NULL;
382
383 while (p != NULL)
384 {
385 if (p->fd == fd)
386 {
387 // 找到了要删除的节点
388 if (prev == NULL)
389 {
390 // 要删除的是头节点
391 head = p->next;
392 }
393 else
394 {
395 // 要删除的是中间节点
396 prev->next = p->next;
397 }
398 printf("<<< ❌ 设备下线: ID %d\n", p->id);
399 free(p); // 释放内存
400 break; // 删完就退出循环
401 }
402 // 继续找下一个
403 prev = p;
404 p = p->next;
405 }
406 pthread_mutex_unlock(&list_mutex);
407}
408
409//线程处理数据
410void * handle_client( void * arg)
411{
412 int connfd = (int)(long)arg;
413 char buffer[4096]; //存储json数据
414 int len; //存储字节
415
416 while ((len = recv(connfd, buffer, sizeof(buffer), 0)) > 0)
417 {
418 //网络数据没有\0，得手动添加
419 buffer[len] = '\0';
420
421 //解析json数据
422 cJSON *root = cJSON_Parse(buffer);
423 if (!root)
424 {
425 continue;
426 }
427
428 cJSON *type = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "type");
429 if (!type)
430 {
431 cJSON_Delete(root);
432 continue;
433 }
434
435 switch (type->valueint)
436 {
437 case MSG_REGISTER: //注册
438 {
439 cJSON *id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "id");
440 if(id)
441 {
442 add_device(connfd, id->valueint);
443 }
444 break;
445 }
446 case MSG_CONTROL: //控制
447 {
448 cJSON *target = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "target_id");
449 cJSON *val = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "val");
450 if (target && val)
451 {
452 // int target_fd = find_fd_by_id(target->valueint);
453 // if (target_fd > 0)
454 // {
455 // send(target_fd, buffer, len, 0);
456 // printf("🔄 转发 -> ID:%d Val:%d\n", target->valueint, val->valueint);
457 // }
458 //发送给云
459 sync_to_cloud(target->valueint, val->valueint);
460 }
461 break;
462 }
463 case MSG_REPORT: //上传数据
464 {
465 int phone_fd = find_fd_by_id(0);
466 if (phone_fd > 0)
467 {
468 send(phone_fd, buffer, len, 0);
469 }
470 break;
471 }
472 }
473 cJSON_Delete(root);
474 }
475 close(connfd);
476 remove_device(connfd);
477 return NULL;
478}
479
480
481int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
482{
483 int sfd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
484 if (sfd == -1) {
485 perror("socket");
486 return -1;
487 }
488
489 // 端口复用（防止服务器重启时端口被占用）
490 int opt = 1;
491 setsockopt(sfd, SOL_SOCKET, SO_REUSEADDR, &opt, sizeof(opt));
492
493 struct sockaddr_in saddr;
494 saddr.sin_family = AF_INET;
495 saddr.sin_port = htons(SERVER_PORT);
496 saddr.sin_addr.s_addr = htonl(INADDR_ANY); // 自动获取本机IP
497
498 if (bind(sfd, (struct sockaddr *)&saddr, sizeof(saddr)) == -1) {
499 perror("bind");
500 return -1;
501 }
502
503 if (listen(sfd, 10) == -1) {
504 perror("listen");
505 return -1;
506 }
507
508 printf("=== 🏠 全屋智能网关 (Port: %d) ===\n", SERVER_PORT);
509
510 //云线程
511 pthread_t bemfa_tid;
512 pthread_create(&bemfa_tid, NULL, bemfa_thread_func, NULL);
513 pthread_detach(bemfa_tid);
514
515 struct sockaddr_in caddr;
516 socklen_t len = sizeof(caddr);
517
518 while (1)
519 {
520 int cfd = accept(sfd, (struct sockaddr *)&caddr, &len);
521 if (cfd == -1) {
522 perror("accept");
523 continue;
524 }
525
526 printf("新连接成功: %d\n", cfd);
527
528 pthread_t tid;
529 pthread_create(&tid, NULL,handle_client, (void *)(long)cfd);
530 pthread_detach(tid);
531 }
532
533 return 0;
534}
535
1/*
2 Copyright (c) 2009-2017 Dave Gamble and cJSON contributors
3
4 Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
5 of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal
6 in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights
7 to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell
8 copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the Software is
9 furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:
10
11 The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in
12 all copies or substantial portions of the Software.
13
14 THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR
15 IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY,
16 FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE
17 AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER
18 LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM,
19 OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN
20 THE SOFTWARE.
21*/
22
23/* cJSON */
24/* JSON parser in C. */
25
26/* disable warnings about old C89 functions in MSVC */
27#if !defined(_CRT_SECURE_NO_DEPRECATE) && defined(_MSC_VER)
28#define _CRT_SECURE_NO_DEPRECATE
29#endif
30
31#ifdef __GNUC__
32#pragma GCC visibility push(default)
33#endif
34#if defined(_MSC_VER)
35#pragma warning (push)
36/* disable warning about single line comments in system headers */
37#pragma warning (disable : 4001)
38#endif
39
40#include <string.h>
41#include <stdio.h>
42#include <math.h>
43#include <stdlib.h>
44#include <limits.h>
45#include <ctype.h>
46#include <float.h>
47
48#ifdef ENABLE_LOCALES
49#include <locale.h>
50#endif
51
52#if defined(_MSC_VER)
53#pragma warning (pop)
54#endif
55#ifdef __GNUC__
56#pragma GCC visibility pop
57#endif
58
59#include "cJSON.h"
60
61/* define our own boolean type */
62#ifdef true
63#undef true
64#endif
65#define true ((cJSON_bool)1)
66
67#ifdef false
68#undef false
69#endif
70#define false ((cJSON_bool)0)
71
72/* define isnan and isinf for ANSI C, if in C99 or above, isnan and isinf has been defined in math.h */
73#ifndef isinf
74#define isinf(d) (isnan((d - d)) && !isnan(d))
75#endif
76#ifndef isnan
77#define isnan(d) (d != d)
78#endif
79
80#ifndef NAN
81#ifdef _WIN32
82#define NAN sqrt(-1.0)
83#else
84#define NAN 0.0/0.0
85#endif
86#endif
87
88typedef struct {
89 const unsigned char *json;
90 size_t position;
91} error;
92static error global_error = { NULL, 0 };
93
94CJSON_PUBLIC(const char *) cJSON_GetErrorPtr(void)
95{
96 return (const char*) (global_error.json + global_error.position);
97}
98
99CJSON_PUBLIC(char *) cJSON_GetStringValue(const cJSON * const item)
100{
101 if (!cJSON_IsString(item))
102 {
103 return NULL;
104 }
105
106 return item->valuestring;
107}
108
109CJSON_PUBLIC(double) cJSON_GetNumberValue(const cJSON * const item)
110{
111 if (!cJSON_IsNumber(item))
112 {
113 return (double) NAN;
114 }
115
116 return item->valuedouble;
117}
118
119/* This is a safeguard to prevent copy-pasters from using incompatible C and header files */
120#if (CJSON_VERSION_MAJOR != 1) || (CJSON_VERSION_MINOR != 7) || (CJSON_VERSION_PATCH != 19)
121 #error cJSON.h and cJSON.c have different versions. Make sure that both have the same.
122#endif
123
124CJSON_PUBLIC(const char*) cJSON_Version(void)
125{
126 static char version[15];
127 sprintf(version, "%i.%i.%i", CJSON_VERSION_MAJOR, CJSON_VERSION_MINOR, CJSON_VERSION_PATCH);
128
129 return version;
130}
131
132/* Case insensitive string comparison, doesn't consider two NULL pointers equal though */
133static int case_insensitive_strcmp(const unsigned char *string1, const unsigned char *string2)
134{
135 if ((string1 == NULL) || (string2 == NULL))
136 {
137 return 1;
138 }
139
140 if (string1 == string2)
141 {
142 return 0;
143 }
144
145 for(; tolower(*string1) == tolower(*string2); (void)string1++, string2++)
146 {
147 if (*string1 == '\0')
148 {
149 return 0;
150 }
151 }
152
153 return tolower(*string1) - tolower(*string2);
154}
155
156typedef struct internal_hooks
157{
158 void *(CJSON_CDECL *allocate)(size_t size);
159 void (CJSON_CDECL *deallocate)(void *pointer);
160 void *(CJSON_CDECL *reallocate)(void *pointer, size_t size);
161} internal_hooks;
162
163#if defined(_MSC_VER)
164/* work around MSVC error C2322: '...' address of dllimport '...' is not static */
165static void * CJSON_CDECL internal_malloc(size_t size)
166{
167 return malloc(size);
168}
169static void CJSON_CDECL internal_free(void *pointer)
170{
171 free(pointer);
172}
173static void * CJSON_CDECL internal_realloc(void *pointer, size_t size)
174{
175 return realloc(pointer, size);
176}
177#else
178#define internal_malloc malloc
179#define internal_free free
180#define internal_realloc realloc
181#endif
182
183/* strlen of character literals resolved at compile time */
184#define static_strlen(string_literal) (sizeof(string_literal) - sizeof(""))
185
186static internal_hooks global_hooks = { internal_malloc, internal_free, internal_realloc };
187
188static unsigned char* cJSON_strdup(const unsigned char* string, const internal_hooks * const hooks)
189{
190 size_t length = 0;
191 unsigned char *copy = NULL;
192
193 if (string == NULL)
194 {
195 return NULL;
196 }
197
198 length = strlen((const char*)string) + sizeof("");
199 copy = (unsigned char*)hooks->allocate(length);
200 if (copy == NULL)
201 {
202 return NULL;
203 }
204 memcpy(copy, string, length);
205
206 return copy;
207}
208
209CJSON_PUBLIC(void) cJSON_InitHooks(cJSON_Hooks* hooks)
210{
211 if (hooks == NULL)
212 {
213 /* Reset hooks */
214 global_hooks.allocate = malloc;
215 global_hooks.deallocate = free;
216 global_hooks.reallocate = realloc;
217 return;
218 }
219
220 global_hooks.allocate = malloc;
221 if (hooks->malloc_fn != NULL)
222 {
223 global_hooks.allocate = hooks->malloc_fn;
224 }
225
226 global_hooks.deallocate = free;
227 if (hooks->free_fn != NULL)
228 {
229 global_hooks.deallocate = hooks->free_fn;
230 }
231
232 /* use realloc only if both free and malloc are used */
233 global_hooks.reallocate = NULL;
234 if ((global_hooks.allocate == malloc) && (global_hooks.deallocate == free))
235 {
236 global_hooks.reallocate = realloc;
237 }
238}
239
240/* Internal constructor. */
241static cJSON *cJSON_New_Item(const internal_hooks * const hooks)
242{
243 cJSON* node = (cJSON*)hooks->allocate(sizeof(cJSON));
244 if (node)
245 {
246 memset(node, '\0', sizeof(cJSON));
247 }
248
249 return node;
250}
251
252/* Delete a cJSON structure. */
253CJSON_PUBLIC(void) cJSON_Delete(cJSON *item)
254{
255 cJSON *next = NULL;
256 while (item != NULL)
257 {
258 next = item->next;
259 if (!(item->type & cJSON_IsReference) && (item->child != NULL))
260 {
261 cJSON_Delete(item->child);
262 }
263 if (!(item->type & cJSON_IsReference) && (item->valuestring != NULL))
264 {
265 global_hooks.deallocate(item->valuestring);
266 item->valuestring = NULL;
267 }
268 if (!(item->type & cJSON_StringIsConst) && (item->string != NULL))
269 {
270 global_hooks.deallocate(item->string);
271 item->string = NULL;
272 }
273 global_hooks.deallocate(item);
274 item = next;
275 }
276}
277
278/* get the decimal point character of the current locale */
279static unsigned char get_decimal_point(void)
280{
281#ifdef ENABLE_LOCALES
282 struct lconv *lconv = localeconv();
283 return (unsigned char) lconv->decimal_point[0];
284#else
285 return '.';
286#endif
287}
288
289typedef struct
290{
291 const unsigned char *content;
292 size_t length;
293 size_t offset;
294 size_t depth; /* How deeply nested (in arrays/objects) is the input at the current offset. */
295 internal_hooks hooks;
296} parse_buffer;
297
298/* check if the given size is left to read in a given parse buffer (starting with 1) */
299#define can_read(buffer, size) ((buffer != NULL) && (((buffer)->offset + size) <= (buffer)->length))
300/* check if the buffer can be accessed at the given index (starting with 0) */
301#define can_access_at_index(buffer, index) ((buffer != NULL) && (((buffer)->offset + index) < (buffer)->length))
302#define cannot_access_at_index(buffer, index) (!can_access_at_index(buffer, index))
303/* get a pointer to the buffer at the position */
304#define buffer_at_offset(buffer) ((buffer)->content + (buffer)->offset)
305
306/* Parse the input text to generate a number, and populate the result into item. */
307static cJSON_bool parse_number(cJSON * const item, parse_buffer * const input_buffer)
308{
309 double number = 0;
310 unsigned char *after_end = NULL;
311 unsigned char *number_c_string;
312 unsigned char decimal_point = get_decimal_point();
313 size_t i = 0;
314 size_t number_string_length = 0;
315 cJSON_bool has_decimal_point = false;
316
317 if ((input_buffer == NULL) || (input_buffer->content == NULL))
318 {
319 return false;
320 }
321
322 /* copy the number into a temporary buffer and replace '.' with the decimal point
323 * of the current locale (for strtod)
324 * This also takes care of '\0' not necessarily being available for marking the end of the input */
325 for (i = 0; can_access_at_index(input_buffer, i); i++)
326 {
327 switch (buffer_at_offset(input_buffer)[i])
328 {
329 case '0':
330 case '1':
331 case '2':
332 case '3':
333 case '4':
334 case '5':
335 case '6':
336 case '7':
337 case '8':
338 case '9':
339 case '+':
340 case '-':
341 case 'e':
342 case 'E':
343 number_string_length++;
344 break;
345
346 case '.':
347 number_string_length++;
348 has_decimal_point = true;
349 break;
350
351 default:
352 goto loop_end;
353 }
354 }
355loop_end:
356 /* malloc for temporary buffer, add 1 for '\0' */
357 number_c_string = (unsigned char *) input_buffer->hooks.allocate(number_string_length + 1);
358 if (number_c_string == NULL)
359 {
360 return false; /* allocation failure */
361 }
362
363 memcpy(number_c_string, buffer_at_offset(input_buffer), number_string_length);
364 number_c_string[number_string_length] = '\0';
365
366 if (has_decimal_point)
367 {
368 for (i = 0; i < number_string_length; i++)
369 {
370 if (number_c_string[i] == '.')
371 {
372 /* replace '.' with the decimal point of the current locale (for strtod) */
373 number_c_string[i] = decimal_point;
374 }
375 }
376 }
377
378 number = strtod((const char*)number_c_string, (char**)&after_end);
379 if (number_c_string == after_end)
380 {
381 /* free the temporary buffer */
382 input_buffer->hooks.deallocate(number_c_string);
383 return false; /* parse_error */
384 }
385
386 item->valuedouble = number;
387
388 /* use saturation in case of overflow */
389 if (number >= INT_MAX)
390 {
391 item->valueint = INT_MAX;
392 }
393 else if (number <= (double)INT_MIN)
394 {
395 item->valueint = INT_MIN;
396 }
397 else
398 {
399 item->valueint = (int)number;
400 }
401
402 item->type = cJSON_Number;
403
404 input_buffer->offset += (size_t)(after_end - number_c_string);
405 /* free the temporary buffer */
406 input_buffer->hooks.deallocate(number_c_string);
407 return true;
408}
409
410/* don't ask me, but the original cJSON_SetNumberValue returns an integer or double */
411CJSON_PUBLIC(double) cJSON_SetNumberHelper(cJSON *object, double number)
412{
413 if (number >= INT_MAX)
414 {
415 object->valueint = INT_MAX;
416 }
417 else if (number <= (double)INT_MIN)
418 {
419 object->valueint = INT_MIN;
420 }
421 else
422 {
423 object->valueint = (int)number;
424 }
425
426 return object->valuedouble = number;
427}
428
429/* Note: when passing a NULL valuestring, cJSON_SetValuestring treats this as an error and return NULL */
430CJSON_PUBLIC(char*) cJSON_SetValuestring(cJSON *object, const char *valuestring)
431{
432 char *copy = NULL;
433 size_t v1_len;
434 size_t v2_len;
435 /* if object's type is not cJSON_String or is cJSON_IsReference, it should not set valuestring */
436 if ((object == NULL) || !(object->type & cJSON_String) || (object->type & cJSON_IsReference))
437 {
438 return NULL;
439 }
440 /* return NULL if the object is corrupted or valuestring is NULL */
441 if (object->valuestring == NULL || valuestring == NULL)
442 {
443 return NULL;
444 }
445
446 v1_len = strlen(valuestring);
447 v2_len = strlen(object->valuestring);
448
449 if (v1_len <= v2_len)
450 {
451 /* strcpy does not handle overlapping string: [X1, X2] [Y1, Y2] => X2 < Y1 or Y2 < X1 */
452 if (!( valuestring + v1_len < object->valuestring || object->valuestring + v2_len < valuestring ))
453 {
454 return NULL;
455 }
456 strcpy(object->valuestring, valuestring);
457 return object->valuestring;
458 }
459 copy = (char*) cJSON_strdup((const unsigned char*)valuestring, &global_hooks);
460 if (copy == NULL)
461 {
462 return NULL;
463 }
464 if (object->valuestring != NULL)
465 {
466 cJSON_free(object->valuestring);
467 }
468 object->valuestring = copy;
469
470 return copy;
471}
472
473typedef struct
474{
475 unsigned char *buffer;
476 size_t length;
477 size_t offset;
478 size_t depth; /* current nesting depth (for formatted printing) */
479 cJSON_bool noalloc;
480 cJSON_bool format; /* is this print a formatted print */
481 internal_hooks hooks;
482} printbuffer;
483
484/* realloc printbuffer if necessary to have at least "needed" bytes more */
485static unsigned char* ensure(printbuffer * const p, size_t needed)
486{
487 unsigned char *newbuffer = NULL;
488 size_t newsize = 0;
489
490 if ((p == NULL) || (p->buffer == NULL))
491 {
492 return NULL;
493 }
494
495 if ((p->length > 0) && (p->offset >= p->length))
496 {
497 /* make sure that offset is valid */
498 return NULL;
499 }
500
501 if (needed > INT_MAX)
502 {
503 /* sizes bigger than INT_MAX are currently not supported */
504 return NULL;
505 }
506
507 needed += p->offset + 1;
508 if (needed <= p->length)
509 {
510 return p->buffer + p->offset;
511 }
512
513 if (p->noalloc) {
514 return NULL;
515 }
516
517 /* calculate new buffer size */
518 if (needed > (INT_MAX / 2))
519 {
520 /* overflow of int, use INT_MAX if possible */
521 if (needed <= INT_MAX)
522 {
523 newsize = INT_MAX;
524 }
525 else
526 {
527 return NULL;
528 }
529 }
530 else
531 {
532 newsize = needed * 2;
533 }
534
535 if (p->hooks.reallocate != NULL)
536 {
537 /* reallocate with realloc if available */
538 newbuffer = (unsigned char*)p->hooks.reallocate(p->buffer, newsize);
539 if (newbuffer == NULL)
540 {
541 p->hooks.deallocate(p->buffer);
542 p->length = 0;
543 p->buffer = NULL;
544
545 return NULL;
546 }
547 }
548 else
549 {
550 /* otherwise reallocate manually */
551 newbuffer = (unsigned char*)p->hooks.allocate(newsize);
552 if (!newbuffer)
553 {
554 p->hooks.deallocate(p->buffer);
555 p->length = 0;
556 p->buffer = NULL;
557
558 return NULL;
559 }
560
561 memcpy(newbuffer, p->buffer, p->offset + 1);
562 p->hooks.deallocate(p->buffer);
563 }
564 p->length = newsize;
565 p->buffer = newbuffer;
566
567 return newbuffer + p->offset;
568}
569
570/* calculate the new length of the string in a printbuffer and update the offset */
571static void update_offset(printbuffer * const buffer)
572{
573 const unsigned char *buffer_pointer = NULL;
574 if ((buffer == NULL) || (buffer->buffer == NULL))
575 {
576 return;
577 }
578 buffer_pointer = buffer->buffer + buffer->offset;
579
580 buffer->offset += strlen((const char*)buffer_pointer);
581}
582
583/* securely comparison of floating-point variables */
584static cJSON_bool compare_double(double a, double b)
585{
586 double maxVal = fabs(a) > fabs(b) ? fabs(a) : fabs(b);
587 return (fabs(a - b) <= maxVal * DBL_EPSILON);
588}
589
590/* Render the number nicely from the given item into a string. */
591static cJSON_bool print_number(const cJSON * const item, printbuffer * const output_buffer)
592{
593 unsigned char *output_pointer = NULL;
594 double d = item->valuedouble;
595 int length = 0;
596 size_t i = 0;
597 unsigned char number_buffer[26] = {0}; /* temporary buffer to print the number into */
598 unsigned char decimal_point = get_decimal_point();
599 double test = 0.0;
600
601 if (output_buffer == NULL)
602 {
603 return false;
604 }
605
606 /* This checks for NaN and Infinity */
607 if (isnan(d) || isinf(d))
608 {
609 length = sprintf((char*)number_buffer, "null");
610 }
611 else if(d == (double)item->valueint)
612 {
613 length = sprintf((char*)number_buffer, "%d", item->valueint);
614 }
615 else
616 {
617 /* Try 15 decimal places of precision to avoid nonsignificant nonzero digits */
618 length = sprintf((char*)number_buffer, "%1.15g", d);
619
620 /* Check whether the original double can be recovered */
621 if ((sscanf((char*)number_buffer, "%lg", &test) != 1) || !compare_double((double)test, d))
622 {
623 /* If not, print with 17 decimal places of precision */
624 length = sprintf((char*)number_buffer, "%1.17g", d);
625 }
626 }
627
628 /* sprintf failed or buffer overrun occurred */
629 if ((length < 0) || (length > (int)(sizeof(number_buffer) - 1)))
630 {
631 return false;
632 }
633
634 /* reserve appropriate space in the output */
635 output_pointer = ensure(output_buffer, (size_t)length + sizeof(""));
636 if (output_pointer == NULL)
637 {
638 return false;
639 }
640
641 /* copy the printed number to the output and replace locale
642 * dependent decimal point with '.' */
643 for (i = 0; i < ((size_t)length); i++)
644 {
645 if (number_buffer[i] == decimal_point)
646 {
647 output_pointer[i] = '.';
648 continue;
649 }
650
651 output_pointer[i] = number_buffer[i];
652 }
653 output_pointer[i] = '\0';
654
655 output_buffer->offset += (size_t)length;
656
657 return true;
658}
659
660/* parse 4 digit hexadecimal number */
661static unsigned parse_hex4(const unsigned char * const input)
662{
663 unsigned int h = 0;
664 size_t i = 0;
665
666 for (i = 0; i < 4; i++)
667 {
668 /* parse digit */
669 if ((input[i] >= '0') && (input[i] <= '9'))
670 {
671 h += (unsigned int) input[i] - '0';
672 }
673 else if ((input[i] >= 'A') && (input[i] <= 'F'))
674 {
675 h += (unsigned int) 10 + input[i] - 'A';
676 }
677 else if ((input[i] >= 'a') && (input[i] <= 'f'))
678 {
679 h += (unsigned int) 10 + input[i] - 'a';
680 }
681 else /* invalid */
682 {
683 return 0;
684 }
685
686 if (i < 3)
687 {
688 /* shift left to make place for the next nibble */
689 h = h << 4;
690 }
691 }
692
693 return h;
694}
695
696/* converts a UTF-16 literal to UTF-8
697 * A literal can be one or two sequences of the form \uXXXX */
698static unsigned char utf16_literal_to_utf8(const unsigned char * const input_pointer, const unsigned char * const input_end, unsigned char **output_pointer)
699{
700 long unsigned int codepoint = 0;
701 unsigned int first_code = 0;
702 const unsigned char *first_sequence = input_pointer;
703 unsigned char utf8_length = 0;
704 unsigned char utf8_position = 0;
705 unsigned char sequence_length = 0;
706 unsigned char first_byte_mark = 0;
707
708 if ((input_end - first_sequence) < 6)
709 {
710 /* input ends unexpectedly */
711 goto fail;
712 }
713
714 /* get the first utf16 sequence */
715 first_code = parse_hex4(first_sequence + 2);
716
717 /* check that the code is valid */
718 if (((first_code >= 0xDC00) && (first_code <= 0xDFFF)))
719 {
720 goto fail;
721 }
722
723 /* UTF16 surrogate pair */
724 if ((first_code >= 0xD800) && (first_code <= 0xDBFF))
725 {
726 const unsigned char *second_sequence = first_sequence + 6;
727 unsigned int second_code = 0;
728 sequence_length = 12; /* \uXXXX\uXXXX */
729
730 if ((input_end - second_sequence) < 6)
731 {
732 /* input ends unexpectedly */
733 goto fail;
734 }
735
736 if ((second_sequence[0] != '\\') || (second_sequence[1] != 'u'))
737 {
738 /* missing second half of the surrogate pair */
739 goto fail;
740 }
741
742 /* get the second utf16 sequence */
743 second_code = parse_hex4(second_sequence + 2);
744 /* check that the code is valid */
745 if ((second_code < 0xDC00) || (second_code > 0xDFFF))
746 {
747 /* invalid second half of the surrogate pair */
748 goto fail;
749 }
750
751
752 /* calculate the unicode codepoint from the surrogate pair */
753 codepoint = 0x10000 + (((first_code & 0x3FF) << 10) | (second_code & 0x3FF));
754 }
755 else
756 {
757 sequence_length = 6; /* \uXXXX */
758 codepoint = first_code;
759 }
760
761 /* encode as UTF-8
762 * takes at maximum 4 bytes to encode:
763 * 11110xxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx */
764 if (codepoint < 0x80)
765 {
766 /* normal ascii, encoding 0xxxxxxx */
767 utf8_length = 1;
768 }
769 else if (codepoint < 0x800)
770 {
771 /* two bytes, encoding 110xxxxx 10xxxxxx */
772 utf8_length = 2;
773 first_byte_mark = 0xC0; /* 11000000 */
774 }
775 else if (codepoint < 0x10000)
776 {
777 /* three bytes, encoding 1110xxxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx */
778 utf8_length = 3;
779 first_byte_mark = 0xE0; /* 11100000 */
780 }
781 else if (codepoint <= 0x10FFFF)
782 {
783 /* four bytes, encoding 1110xxxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx 10xxxxxx */
784 utf8_length = 4;
785 first_byte_mark = 0xF0; /* 11110000 */
786 }
787 else
788 {
789 /* invalid unicode codepoint */
790 goto fail;
791 }
792
793 /* encode as utf8 */
794 for (utf8_position = (unsigned char)(utf8_length - 1); utf8_position > 0; utf8_position--)
795 {
796 /* 10xxxxxx */
797 (*output_pointer)[utf8_position] = (unsigned char)((codepoint | 0x80) & 0xBF);
798 codepoint >>= 6;
799 }
800 /* encode first byte */
801 if (utf8_length > 1)
802 {
803 (*output_pointer)[0] = (unsigned char)((codepoint | first_byte_mark) & 0xFF);
804 }
805 else
806 {
807 (*output_pointer)[0] = (unsigned char)(codepoint & 0x7F);
808 }
809
810 *output_pointer += utf8_length;
811
812 return sequence_length;
813
814fail:
815 return 0;
816}
817
818/* Parse the input text into an unescaped cinput, and populate item. */
819static cJSON_bool parse_string(cJSON * const item, parse_buffer * const input_buffer)
820{
821 const unsigned char *input_pointer = buffer_at_offset(input_buffer) + 1;
822 const unsigned char *input_end = buffer_at_offset(input_buffer) + 1;
823 unsigned char *output_pointer = NULL;
824 unsigned char *output = NULL;
825
826 /* not a string */
827 if (buffer_at_offset(input_buffer)[0] != '\"')
828 {
829 goto fail;
830 }
831
832 {
833 /* calculate approximate size of the output (overestimate) */
834 size_t allocation_length = 0;
835 size_t skipped_bytes = 0;
836 while (((size_t)(input_end - input_buffer->content) < input_buffer->length) && (*input_end != '\"'))
837 {
838 /* is escape sequence */
839 if (input_end[0] == '\\')
840 {
841 if ((size_t)(input_end + 1 - input_buffer->content) >= input_buffer->length)
842 {
843 /* prevent buffer overflow when last input character is a backslash */
844 goto fail;
845 }
846 skipped_bytes++;
