4#include <unistd.h>
5#include <pthread.h>
6#include <time.h>
7#include <sys/time.h>
8#include <arpa/inet.h>
9#include <sys/socket.h>
10#include <stdio.h>
11#include <stdlib.h>
12#include <string.h>
13#include <math.h>
14#include "../inc/cJSON.h"
15#include "../inc/smart_protocol.h"
16
17// 服务器连接配置
18#define SERVER_IP "192.168.172.68"
19#define SERVER_PORT 8888
20
21// 全局变量定义
22int sockfd = -1; // 套接字
23int is_online = 0; // 在线状态标记 (1:在线, 0:离线)
24int auto_mode = 0; // AI 托管模式标记 (0:关, 1:开)
25
26int lock = 0; //用于禁止开发板跳转
27
28int air_list[10]; // 空调名单：最多能存10个空调
29int air_count = 0; // 计数器：当前记录了几个空调
30int current_air_ac = 0; // 当前正在操作哪个空调 (用于手机跳转页面)
31static int device_temps[256]; // 记录每台设备的温度
32static int device_modes[256]; // 记录每台设备的模式 (0:冷, 1:热)
33
34
35char *device_cmds[256]; //所有设备的cmd
36
37// AI 状态记忆 (防止重复发送指令)
38static int last_ai_fan = -1; // 记录上一次 AI 设置的风扇档位
39static int last_ai_humi = -1; // 记录上一次 AI 设置的加湿器开关
40
41// AI 自动托管的目标 ID
42// 默认 -1 表示没找到设备
43int target_fan_id = -1;
44int target_humi_id = -1;
45
46// 界面对象定义
47lv_obj_t *ui_login; // 登录界面容器
48lv_obj_t *ui_home; // 主界面容器
49lv_obj_t *ui_grid; // 动态设备卡片区域 (网格布局)
50lv_obj_t *txt_status; // 顶部状态栏文字 (Online/Offline)
51lv_obj_t *input_pwd; // 密码输入框
52lv_obj_t *keyboard; // 屏幕键盘
53lv_obj_t *sw_auto; // 底部 AI 自动模式开关
54
55// 天气显示
56lv_obj_t *txt_info_bar; // 信息栏容器
57lv_obj_t *lbl_time; // 时间
58lv_obj_t *lbl_city; // 城市
59lv_obj_t *lbl_temp; // 温度
60lv_obj_t *lbl_weather; // 天气
61
62//空调
63lv_obj_t *ui_air_screen; // 空调独立界面
64lv_obj_t *arc_temp; // 温度调节圆环
65lv_obj_t *lbl_temp_val; // 中间的大数字
66lv_obj_t *btn_mode_cold; // 制冷按钮
67lv_obj_t *btn_mode_heat; // 制热按钮
68static int current_temp = 26; // 默认温度
69
70// 样式对象定义
71static lv_style_t style_box; // 卡片背景样式
72static lv_style_t style_title; // 标题文字样式
73static lv_style_t style_val; // 数值文字样式
74
75// 函数声明
76void send_msg(int id, char* cmd, int val);
77int custom_tick_get(void);
78void update_ui_by_id(int id, int val);
79void init_air_view(void);
80void show_air_screen(void);
81
82// 聊天室变量
83lv_obj_t *ui_chat_screen; // 聊天界面
84lv_obj_t *ta_chat_history; // 历史消息显示框 (只读)
85lv_obj_t *ta_chat_input; // 输入框
86lv_obj_t *kb_chat; // 聊天专用键盘
87
88
89// ================== 贪吃蛇游戏全局变量(ai) ==================
90lv_obj_t *ui_game_screen; // 游戏独立界面
91lv_obj_t *game_area; // 蛇活动的区域 (黑色背景)
92lv_obj_t *lbl_score; // 分数显示
93lv_timer_t *game_timer; // 游戏的核心心跳 (定时器)
94
95#define GRID_W 20 // 地图宽度 (格子数)
96#define GRID_H 15 // 地图高度 (格子数)
97#define CELL_SIZE 30 // 每个格子的大小 (像素)
98
99// 蛇的节点结构体
100typedef struct Point
101{
102 int x;
103 int y;
104} Point;
105
106Point snake[100]; // 蛇身数组
107int snake_len = 3; // 当前长度
108int food_x, food_y; // 食物坐标
109int dir_x = 1, dir_y = 0; // 移动方向 (默认向右: x=1, y=0)
110int game_score = 0;
111int is_game_over = 0;
112
113// 游戏所用的方块控件池 (为了性能，我们不反复创建删除，而是移动这些小方块)
114lv_obj_t *snake_objs[100];
115lv_obj_t *food_obj;
116lv_obj_t *ui_game_over_panel; // 游戏结束弹窗
117lv_obj_t *btn_restart; // 弹窗里的重玩按钮
118
119// ================== 游戏核心逻辑 ==================
120
121// 生成新食物 (随机位置)
122void spawn_food()
123{
124 food_x = rand() % GRID_W;
125 food_y = rand() % GRID_H;
126
127 // 简单的防止生成在蛇身上
128 lv_obj_set_pos(food_obj, food_x * CELL_SIZE, food_y * CELL_SIZE);
129}
130
131// 游戏重置/初始化
132void game_reset()
133{
134 snake_len = 3;
135 snake[0].x = 2; snake[0].y = 0; // 头
136 snake[1].x = 1; snake[1].y = 0;
137 snake[2].x = 0; snake[2].y = 0; // 尾
138
139 dir_x = 1; dir_y = 0; // 向右
140 game_score = 0;
141 is_game_over = 0;
142
143 lv_label_set_text_fmt(lbl_score, "SCORE: %d", game_score);
144 spawn_food();
145
146 // 隐藏所有蛇身
147 for(int i=0; i<100; i++)
148 {
149 if(snake_objs[i]) lv_obj_add_flag(snake_objs[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
150 }
151
152 // 隐藏 Game Over 弹窗
153 if(ui_game_over_panel) lv_obj_add_flag(ui_game_over_panel, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
154
155 // 恢复定时器
156 if(game_timer) lv_timer_resume(game_timer);
157}
158
159// 游戏主循环
160static void game_loop_cb(lv_timer_t * t)
161{
162 if(is_game_over) return;
163
164 // --- A. 移动逻辑 ---
165 for(int i = snake_len - 1; i > 0; i--) {
166 snake[i] = snake[i-1];
167 }
168 snake[0].x += dir_x;
169 snake[0].y += dir_y;
170
171 // --- B. 碰撞检测 ---
172 int collision = 0;
173 // 撞墙
174 if(snake[0].x < 0 || snake[0].x >= GRID_W || snake[0].y < 0 || snake[0].y >= GRID_H)
175 {
176 collision = 1;
177 }
178 // 撞自己
179 for(int i=4; i<snake_len; i++)
180 {
181 if(snake[0].x == snake[i].x && snake[0].y == snake[i].y)
182 {
183 collision = 1;
184 break;
185 }
186 }
187 if(collision)
188 {
189 is_game_over = 1;
190 lv_timer_pause(game_timer); // 暂停游戏
191 // 显示 Game Over 弹窗
192 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_game_over_panel, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
193 return;
194 }
195
196 // --- C. 吃食物 ---
197 if(snake[0].x == food_x && snake[0].y == food_y) {
198
199 int old_tail_x = snake[snake_len-1].x;
200 int old_tail_y = snake[snake_len-1].y;
201
202 snake_len++;
203 if(snake_len >= 100) snake_len = 100;
204
205 snake[snake_len-1].x = old_tail_x;
206 snake[snake_len-1].y = old_tail_y;
207
208 game_score += 10;
209 lv_label_set_text_fmt(lbl_score, "SCORE: %d", game_score); // 更新分数
210 spawn_food();
211 }
212
213 // --- D. 渲染 UI ---
214 for(int i=0; i<snake_len; i++) {
215 if(snake_objs[i]) {
216 lv_obj_clear_flag(snake_objs[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
217 // 蛇头深绿，蛇身浅绿，圆角
218 if(i==0) lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(snake_objs[i], lv_color_hex(0x00FF00), 0);
219 else lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(snake_objs[i], lv_color_hex(0xCCFFCC), 0);
220
221 lv_obj_set_pos(snake_objs[i], snake[i].x * CELL_SIZE, snake[i].y * CELL_SIZE);
222 }
223 }
224}
225
226// 手势控制回调
227static void game_gesture(lv_event_t * e)
228{
229 lv_dir_t dir = lv_indev_get_gesture_dir(lv_indev_get_act());
230
231 // 根据滑动方向改变 dir_x, dir_y
232 if(dir == LV_DIR_LEFT && dir_x != 1)
233 {
234 dir_x = -1; dir_y = 0;
235 }
236 else if(dir == LV_DIR_RIGHT && dir_x != -1)
237 {
238 dir_x = 1; dir_y = 0;
239 }
240 else if(dir == LV_DIR_TOP && dir_y != 1)
241 {
242 dir_x = 0; dir_y = -1;
243 }
244 else if(dir == LV_DIR_BOTTOM && dir_y != -1)
245 {
246 dir_x = 0; dir_y = 1;
247 }
248}
249
250// 退出游戏回调
251static void game_back(lv_event_t * e)
252{
253 // 暂停定时器
254 if(game_timer) lv_timer_pause(game_timer);
255
256 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_game_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
257 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
258}
259
260// 方向键回调
261static void game_dpad(lv_event_t * e)
262{
263 int btn_dir = (int)(long)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
264
265 if(btn_dir == 1 && dir_y != 1) // 上
266 {
267 dir_x = 0;
268 dir_y = -1;
269 } else if(btn_dir == 2 && dir_y != -1) // 下
270 {
271 dir_x = 0;
272 dir_y = 1;
273 } else if(btn_dir == 3 && dir_x != 1) // 左
274 {
275 dir_x = -1;
276 dir_y = 0;
277 } else if(btn_dir == 4 && dir_x != -1) // 右
278 {
279 dir_x = 1;
280 dir_y = 0;
281 }
282}
283
284//游戏回调
285static void enter_game(lv_event_t * e)
286{
287 printf(" 启动贪吃蛇...\n");
288
289 // 切换界面
290 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
291 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_game_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
292
293 // 重置游戏数据
294 game_reset();
295
296 // 启动定时器 (开始动！)
297 if(game_timer) lv_timer_resume(game_timer);
298}
299
300//重玩回调
301static void restart_game(lv_event_t * e)
302{
303 game_reset(); // 点击重玩，复位游戏
304}
305
306//游戏界面
307void init_game_view()
308{
309 // 游戏全屏容器
310 ui_game_screen = lv_obj_create(lv_scr_act());
311 lv_obj_set_size(ui_game_screen, 800, 480);
312 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(ui_game_screen, lv_color_hex(0x2B2B2B), 0); // 深灰色
313 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_game_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
314 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_game_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
315
316 // ================= 左侧：游戏画面区 =================
317
318 game_area = lv_obj_create(ui_game_screen);
319 lv_obj_set_size(game_area, GRID_W * CELL_SIZE, GRID_H * CELL_SIZE); // 600x450
320 lv_obj_align(game_area, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0); // 靠左居中
321 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(game_area, lv_color_hex(0x000000), 0); // 纯黑屏幕
322 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(game_area, 4, 0); // 宽边框
323 lv_obj_set_style_border_color(game_area, lv_color_hex(0x666666), 0); // 灰色边框
324 lv_obj_set_style_radius(game_area, 8, 0); // 屏幕圆角
325 lv_obj_clear_flag(game_area, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
326 lv_obj_clear_flag(game_area, LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
327
328 // 分数显示 (放在游戏屏幕内部右上角)
329 lbl_score = lv_label_create(game_area);
330 lv_label_set_text(lbl_score, "SCORE: 0");
331 lv_obj_align(lbl_score, LV_ALIGN_TOP_RIGHT, -10, 10);
332 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_score, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
333 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_score, lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF), 0);
334
335 // ================= 右侧：控制台区 =================
336
337 // 创建一个右侧面板容器
338 lv_obj_t *ctrl_panel = lv_obj_create(ui_game_screen);
339 lv_obj_set_size(ctrl_panel, 180, 450);
340 lv_obj_align(ctrl_panel, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, 15, 0);
341 lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(ctrl_panel, 0, 0); // 透明
342 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(ctrl_panel, 0, 0); // 无边框
343 lv_obj_clear_flag(ctrl_panel, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
344
345 // 4. 返回按钮 (放在右侧上方)
346 lv_obj_t *btn_back = lv_btn_create(ctrl_panel);
347 lv_obj_set_size(btn_back, 80, 40);
348 lv_obj_align(btn_back, LV_ALIGN_TOP_RIGHT, -5, 5);
349 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_back, lv_color_hex(0xFF4444), 0); // 红色
350 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_back, game_back, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
351 lv_label_set_text(lv_label_create(btn_back), "EXIT");
352
353 // 5. 十字方向键
354 int btn_size = 45;
355 int gap = 5;
356
357 // 上
358 lv_obj_t *btn_up = lv_btn_create(ctrl_panel);
359 lv_obj_set_size(btn_up, btn_size, btn_size);
360 lv_obj_align(btn_up, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 20 - btn_size - gap);
361 lv_obj_set_style_radius(btn_up, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0); // 圆形
362 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_up, lv_color_hex(0x444444), 0);
363 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_up, game_dpad, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)1);
364 lv_label_set_text(lv_label_create(btn_up), LV_SYMBOL_UP);
365
366 // 下
367 lv_obj_t *btn_down = lv_btn_create(ctrl_panel);
368 lv_obj_set_size(btn_down, btn_size, btn_size);
369 lv_obj_align(btn_down, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 20 + btn_size + gap);
370 lv_obj_set_style_radius(btn_down, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
371 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_down, lv_color_hex(0x444444), 0);
372 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_down, game_dpad, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)2);
373 lv_label_set_text(lv_label_create(btn_down), LV_SYMBOL_DOWN);
374
375 // 左
376 lv_obj_t *btn_left = lv_btn_create(ctrl_panel);
377 lv_obj_set_size(btn_left, btn_size, btn_size);
378 lv_obj_align(btn_left, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, -btn_size - gap, 20);
379 lv_obj_set_style_radius(btn_left, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
380 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_left, lv_color_hex(0x444444), 0);
381 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_left, game_dpad, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)3);
382 lv_label_set_text(lv_label_create(btn_left), LV_SYMBOL_LEFT);
383
384 // 右
385 lv_obj_t *btn_right = lv_btn_create(ctrl_panel);
386 lv_obj_set_size(btn_right, btn_size, btn_size);
387 lv_obj_align(btn_right, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, btn_size + gap, 20);
388 lv_obj_set_style_radius(btn_right, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
389 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_right, lv_color_hex(0x444444), 0);
390 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_right, game_dpad, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)4);
391 lv_label_set_text(lv_label_create(btn_right), LV_SYMBOL_RIGHT);
392
393
394 // ================= 游戏元素池 =================
395 // 6. 创建蛇身池
396 for(int i=0; i<100; i++)
397 {
398 snake_objs[i] = lv_obj_create(game_area);
399 lv_obj_set_size(snake_objs[i], CELL_SIZE - 2, CELL_SIZE - 2);
400 lv_obj_set_style_radius(snake_objs[i], 6, 0); // 稍微圆一点
401 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(snake_objs[i], 0, 0);
402 lv_obj_add_flag(snake_objs[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
403 lv_obj_clear_flag(snake_objs[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
404 lv_obj_clear_flag(snake_objs[i], LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
405 }
406
407 // 7. 创建食物 (美化：完全圆形，红色)
408 food_obj = lv_obj_create(game_area);
409 lv_obj_set_size(food_obj, CELL_SIZE - 2, CELL_SIZE - 2);
410 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(food_obj, lv_color_hex(0xFF3333), 0);
411 lv_obj_set_style_radius(food_obj, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0); // 变圆
412 lv_obj_clear_flag(food_obj, LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
413
414 // ================= Game Over 弹窗 =================
415 // 8. 创建弹窗面板
416 ui_game_over_panel = lv_obj_create(ui_game_screen);
417 lv_obj_set_size(ui_game_over_panel, 400, 240);
418 lv_obj_center(ui_game_over_panel);
419 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(ui_game_over_panel, lv_color_hex(0x000000), 0);
420 lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(ui_game_over_panel, 220, 0); // 半透明黑
421 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(ui_game_over_panel, 2, 0);
422 lv_obj_set_style_border_color(ui_game_over_panel, lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF), 0);
423 lv_obj_set_style_radius(ui_game_over_panel, 12, 0);
424 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_game_over_panel, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); // 默认隐藏
425
426 lv_obj_t *lbl_over = lv_label_create(ui_game_over_panel);
427 lv_label_set_text(lbl_over, "GAME OVER");
428 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_over, &lv_font_montserrat_28, 0);
429 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_over, lv_color_hex(0xFF0000), 0);
430 lv_obj_align(lbl_over, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, -40);
431
432 // 重玩按钮
433 btn_restart = lv_btn_create(ui_game_over_panel);
434 lv_obj_set_size(btn_restart, 140, 50);
435 lv_obj_align(btn_restart, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 40);
436 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_restart, lv_color_hex(0x00AA00), 0);
437 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_restart, restart_game, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
438
439 lv_obj_t *l_res = lv_label_create(btn_restart);
440 lv_label_set_text(l_res, LV_SYMBOL_REFRESH" RESTART");
441 lv_obj_center(l_res);
442
443 // 9. 定时器
444 game_timer = lv_timer_create(game_loop_cb, 300, NULL);
445 lv_timer_pause(game_timer);
446}
447
448//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
449
450// 发送聊天消息 (开发板 -> 电脑)
451void send_chat_msg(void)
452{
453 //从 LVGL 的聊天输入文本框（ta_chat_input）中获取用户输入的文本内容
454 const char *text = lv_textarea_get_text(ta_chat_input);
455 if(strlen(text) == 0)
456 {
457 return;
458 }
459 // 发送给服务器 (JSON type 4)
460 char json[512];
461 sprintf(json, "{\"type\":4, \"msg\":\"%s\"}", text);
462
463 if(sockfd > 0)
464 {
465 send(sockfd, json, strlen(json), 0);
466 }
467
468 // 显示在自己的历史框里
469 if(ta_chat_history)
470 {
471 lv_textarea_add_text(ta_chat_history, "Me: ");
472 lv_textarea_add_text(ta_chat_history, text);
473 lv_textarea_add_text(ta_chat_history, "\n");
474 }
475
476 // 清空输入框
477 lv_textarea_set_text(ta_chat_input, "");
478}
479
480// 聊天界面返回回调
481static void chat_back(lv_event_t * e)
482{
483 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_chat_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
484 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
485}
486
487// 发送按钮回调
488static void chat_send(lv_event_t * e)
489 {
490 send_chat_msg();
491}
492
493// 键盘回调 (处理回车键发送)
494static void chat_kb(lv_event_t * e)
495{
496 int key = lv_keyboard_get_selected_btn(kb_chat);
497 if(key == LV_KEY_ENTER)
498 {
499 send_chat_msg();
500 }
501}
502
503// 初始化聊天界面
504void init_chat_view()
505{
506 // 背景
507 ui_chat_screen = lv_obj_create(lv_scr_act());
508 lv_obj_set_size(ui_chat_screen, 800, 480);
509 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(ui_chat_screen, lv_color_hex(0xEEEEEE), 0); // 浅灰背景
510 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_chat_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
511
512 // 顶部栏
513 lv_obj_t *top = lv_obj_create(ui_chat_screen);
514 lv_obj_set_size(top, 800, 50);
515 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top, lv_color_hex(0x333333), 0);
516 lv_obj_align(top, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
517 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top, 0, 0);
518
519 //返回按钮
520 lv_obj_t *btn_back = lv_btn_create(top);
521 lv_obj_set_size(btn_back, 60, 35);
522 lv_obj_align(btn_back, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, -10, 0);
523 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_back, chat_back, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
524 lv_obj_t*label_back = lv_label_create(btn_back);
525 lv_label_set_text(label_back, "Back");
526 lv_obj_set_align(label_back , LV_ALIGN_CENTER);
527
528 lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(top);
529 lv_label_set_text(title, "Chat Room");
530 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF), 0);
531 lv_obj_center(title);
532
533 // 历史消息框
534 ta_chat_history = lv_textarea_create(ui_chat_screen);
535 lv_obj_set_size(ta_chat_history, 780, 240);
536 lv_obj_align(ta_chat_history, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 60);
537 lv_textarea_set_text(ta_chat_history, "Welcome to Chat!\n");
538 // 禁止点击光标，变成只读展示
539 lv_obj_add_state(ta_chat_history, LV_STATE_DISABLED);
540 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(ta_chat_history, lv_color_hex(0x000000), LV_STATE_DISABLED);
541 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(ta_chat_history, lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF), 0);
542
543 // 4. 输入框
544 ta_chat_input = lv_textarea_create(ui_chat_screen);
545 lv_obj_set_size(ta_chat_input, 600, 50);
546 lv_obj_align(ta_chat_input, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, -80, 50);
547 lv_textarea_set_placeholder_text(ta_chat_input, "Type message...");
548 lv_textarea_set_one_line(ta_chat_input, true);
549
550 // 5. 发送按钮
551 lv_obj_t *btn_send = lv_btn_create(ui_chat_screen);
552 lv_obj_set_size(btn_send, 80, 40);
553 lv_obj_align(btn_send, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 300, 50);
554 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_send, lv_color_hex(0x00AA00), 0); // 绿色
555 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_send, chat_send, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
556 lv_obj_t *label_send = lv_label_create(btn_send);
557 lv_label_set_text(label_send, "SEND");
558 lv_obj_center(label_send);
559
560 // 6. 键盘 (放在最下面)
561 kb_chat = lv_keyboard_create(ui_chat_screen);
562 lv_obj_set_size(kb_chat, 800, 140);
563 lv_obj_align(kb_chat, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, 0);
564 lv_keyboard_set_textarea(kb_chat, ta_chat_input);
565 lv_obj_add_event_cb(kb_chat, chat_kb, LV_EVENT_READY, NULL);
566}
567
568// 聊天入口回调
569static void enter_chat(lv_event_t * e)
570{
571 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); //隐藏主界面
572 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_chat_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); //显示聊天界面
573}
574
575///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
576
577// 获取系统时间 (毫秒)
578// 用于 LVGL 心跳或自定义定时逻辑
579int custom_tick_get(void)
580{
581 static uint64_t start_ms = 0;
582 struct timeval tv;
583
584 gettimeofday(&tv, NULL);
585
586 // 计算当前的毫秒数
587 uint64_t now_ms = (tv.tv_sec * 1000000 + tv.tv_usec) / 1000;
588
589 if(start_ms == 0)
590 {
591 start_ms = now_ms;
592 }
593
594 return now_ms - start_ms;
595}
596
597// 获取本地实时时间回调
598static void update_time_cb(lv_timer_t * t)
599{
600 time_t now = time(NULL);
601 struct tm *tm_info = localtime(&now);
602 char buf[32];
603 strftime(buf, sizeof(buf), "%H:%M", tm_info); // 格式 12:30
604
605 if(lbl_time) lv_label_set_text(lbl_time, buf);
606}
607
608// 发送网络指令
609// 封装 JSON 打包和发送过程
610void send_msg(int id, char* cmd, int val)
611{
612 if(sockfd < 0)
613 {
614 return; // 未连接则直接返回
615 }
616
617 // 调用协议库打包 JSON
618 char *json = protocol_pack_control(id, cmd, val);
619
620 // 发送数据
621 send(sockfd, json, strlen(json), 0);
622
623 // 释放 JSON 字符串内存
624 free(json);
625}
626
627// 根据 ID 查找并更新 UI
628// 当收到服务器或 AI 指令时，更新界面上的开关状态
629void update_ui_by_id(int id, int val)
630{
631 if(ui_grid == NULL) return;
632
633 // 遍历网格里的所有卡片(获取子对象 -- > 设备卡片)
634 int card_cnt = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(ui_grid);
635
636 //遍历每一个卡片对象
637 for(int i = 0; i < card_cnt; i++)
638 {
639 lv_obj_t *card = lv_obj_get_child(ui_grid, i);
640
641 // 遍历卡片里的子控件(图标 名字 开关 滑块)
642 int item_cnt = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(card);
643
644 //遍历每一个零件
645 for(int j = 0; j < item_cnt; j++)
646 {
647 lv_obj_t *child = lv_obj_get_child(card, j);
648
649 // 获取控件绑定的 ID
650 int obj_id = (int)(long)lv_obj_get_user_data(child);
651
652 // 找到目标 ID 的控件
653 if (obj_id == id)
654 {
655 // 如果是开关类型
656 if(lv_obj_check_type(child, &lv_switch_class))
657 {
658 if (val > 0)//设置为"ON"
659 lv_obj_add_state(child, LV_STATE_CHECKED);
660 else //清除"ON" -->"OFF"
661 lv_obj_clear_state(child, LV_STATE_CHECKED);
662 }
663 // 如果是滑块类型
664 else if(lv_obj_check_type(child, &lv_slider_class))
665 {
666 // 直接设置滑块的数值，LV_ANIM_ON 表示带动画效果滑动过去
667 lv_slider_set_value(child, val, LV_ANIM_ON);
668 }
669 return;
670 }
671 }
672 }
673}
674
675// 空调返回主页回调
676static void air_back(lv_event_t * e)
677{
678 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_air_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); // 隐藏空调页
679 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); // 显示主页
680}
681
682// 温度调节回调 (圆环 + 加减号通用)
683static void air_temp_change(lv_event_t * e)
684{
685 lv_obj_t *obj = lv_event_get_target(e);
686
687 // 点击加减按钮
688 if(lv_obj_check_type(obj, &lv_btn_class))
689 {
690 // 区分是"+"按钮（diff=1）还是"-"按钮（diff=-1）
691 int diff = (int)(long)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
692 current_temp += diff;
693 if(current_temp < 16) current_temp = 16; //温度范围(16~30)
694 if(current_temp > 30) current_temp = 30;
695 lv_arc_set_value(arc_temp, current_temp); // 同步圆环
696 }
697 // 拖动圆环
698 else if(lv_obj_check_type(obj, &lv_arc_class))
699 {
700 current_temp = lv_arc_get_value(obj);
701 }
702
703 // 更新界面文字
704 lv_label_set_text_fmt(lbl_temp_val, "%d°C", current_temp);
705
706 // 发送指令给服务器
707 if (current_air_ac > 0)
708 {
709 device_temps[current_air_ac] = current_temp;
710 send_msg(current_air_ac , "temp" , current_temp);
711 }
712
713}
714
715// 模式切换回调
716static void air_mode(lv_event_t * e)
717{
718 int mode = (int)(long)lv_event_get_user_data(e); // 0:Cold, 1:Hot
719
720 if (current_air_ac > 0)
721 {
722 //保存到数组中
723 device_modes[current_air_ac] = mode;
724 }
725
726 // 改变圆环颜色
727 if(mode == 0)
728 {
729 lv_obj_set_style_arc_color(arc_temp, lv_color_hex(0x0088FF), LV_PART_INDICATOR); // 蓝
730 if (current_air_ac > 0)
731 {
732 send_msg(current_air_ac , "mode" , 0);
733 }
734
735 } else
736 {
737 lv_obj_set_style_arc_color(arc_temp, lv_color_hex(0xFF5500), LV_PART_INDICATOR); // 橙
738 if (current_air_ac > 0)
739 {
740 send_msg(current_air_ac , "mode" , 1);
741 }
742
743 }
744}
745
746// 刷新空调界面数据
747void refresh_air(int id)
748{
749 //锁定当前 ID
750 current_air_ac = id;
751
752 //从数组读取温度
753 int temp = device_temps[id];
754
755 if(temp < 16 || temp > 30)
756 {
757 temp = 26;
758 device_temps[id] = 26;
759 }
760 current_temp = temp; // 更新全局变量
761
762 // 刷新 UI 显示
763 if(arc_temp) lv_arc_set_value(arc_temp, current_temp);
764 if(lbl_temp_val) lv_label_set_text_fmt(lbl_temp_val, "%d°C", current_temp);
765
766 // 4. 恢复模式 (颜色)
767 int mode = device_modes[id];
768 if(mode == 0)
769 {
770 lv_obj_set_style_arc_color(arc_temp, lv_color_hex(0x0088FF), LV_PART_INDICATOR); // 蓝
771 }
772 else
773 {
774 lv_obj_set_style_arc_color(arc_temp, lv_color_hex(0xFF5500), LV_PART_INDICATOR); // 橙
775 }
776
777 printf("❄️ [UI刷新] ID:%d Temp:%d Mode:%d\n", id, temp, mode);
778}
779
780//空调界面
781void init_air_view()
782{
783 // 创建全屏容器
784 ui_air_screen = lv_obj_create(lv_scr_act());
785 lv_obj_set_size(ui_air_screen, 800, 480);
786 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(ui_air_screen, lv_color_hex(0x101010), 0);
787 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_air_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); // 默认隐藏
788
789 // 顶部返回栏
790 lv_obj_t *top = lv_obj_create(ui_air_screen);
791 lv_obj_set_size(top, 800, 60);
792 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top, lv_color_hex(0x181818), 0);
793 lv_obj_align(top, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
794 lv_obj_set_style_radius(top, 0, 0);
795 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top, 0, 0);
796
797 lv_obj_t *btn_back = lv_btn_create(top);
798 lv_obj_set_size(btn_back, 80, 40);
799 lv_obj_align(btn_back, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 10, 0);
800 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_back, lv_color_hex(0x333333), 0);
801 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_back, air_back, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
802 lv_obj_t *lbl_back = lv_label_create(btn_back);
803 lv_label_set_text(lbl_back, LV_SYMBOL_LEFT" Back");
804 lv_obj_center(lbl_back);
805
806 lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(top);
807 lv_label_set_text(title, "Air Conditioner Control");
808 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF), 0);
809 lv_obj_center(title);
810
811 // 核心控件：温度圆环 (Arc)
812 arc_temp = lv_arc_create(ui_air_screen);
813 lv_obj_set_size(arc_temp, 280, 280);
814 lv_arc_set_rotation(arc_temp, 135);
815 lv_arc_set_bg_angles(arc_temp, 0, 270);
816 lv_arc_set_range(arc_temp, 16, 30); // 温度范围 16-30度
817 lv_arc_set_value(arc_temp, 26);
818 lv_obj_align(arc_temp, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 20);
819 lv_obj_add_event_cb(arc_temp, air_temp_change, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, NULL);
820
821 // 显示温度数字
822 lbl_temp_val = lv_label_create(ui_air_screen);
823 lv_label_set_text(lbl_temp_val, "26°C");
824 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_temp_val, &lv_font_montserrat_28, 0);
825 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_temp_val, lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF), 0);
826 lv_obj_align(lbl_temp_val, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 20);
827
828 // 4. 加减按钮
829 lv_obj_t *btn_minus = lv_btn_create(ui_air_screen);
830 lv_obj_set_size(btn_minus, 60, 60);
831 lv_obj_set_style_radius(btn_minus, 30, 0); // 圆形按钮
832 lv_obj_align(btn_minus, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, -200, 20);
833 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_minus, air_temp_change, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)(long)-1);
834 lv_obj_t *l_m = lv_label_create(btn_minus);
835 lv_label_set_text(l_m, "-");
836 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(l_m, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
837 lv_obj_center(l_m);
838
839 lv_obj_t *btn_plus = lv_btn_create(ui_air_screen);
840 lv_obj_set_size(btn_plus, 60, 60);
841 lv_obj_set_style_radius(btn_plus, 30, 0);
842 lv_obj_align(btn_plus, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 200, 20);
843 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_plus, air_temp_change, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)(long)1);
844 lv_obj_t *l_p = lv_label_create(btn_plus);
845 lv_label_set_text(l_p, "+");
846 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(l_p, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
847 lv_obj_center(l_p);
848
849 // 5. 底部模式切换按钮
850 btn_mode_cold = lv_btn_create(ui_air_screen);
851 lv_obj_set_size(btn_mode_cold, 140, 50);
852 lv_obj_align(btn_mode_cold, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, -80, 0);
853 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_mode_cold, lv_color_hex(0x0088FF), 0);
854 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_mode_cold, air_mode, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)(long)0);
855 lv_obj_t *l_cold = lv_label_create(btn_mode_cold); lv_label_set_text(l_cold, "COLD");
856 lv_obj_center(l_cold);
857
858 btn_mode_heat = lv_btn_create(ui_air_screen);
859 lv_obj_set_size(btn_mode_heat, 140, 50);
860 lv_obj_align(btn_mode_heat, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 80, 0);
861 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_mode_heat, lv_color_hex(0xFF5500), 0);
862 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_mode_heat, air_mode, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)(long)1);
863 lv_obj_t *l_heat = lv_label_create(btn_mode_heat); lv_label_set_text(l_heat, "HOT");
864 lv_obj_center(l_heat);
865}
866
867// 通用空调跳转回调 (适用于所有 "airty" 类型的设备)
868static void air_entry(lv_event_t * e)
869{
870 if (lock == 1) //用于禁止离家后跳转空调界面
871 {
872 return ;
873 }
874 // 获取被点击的设备 ID
875 int id = (int)(long)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
876 lv_obj_t *obj = lv_event_get_target(e);
877
878 // 判断开关状态
879 if(lv_obj_has_state(obj, LV_STATE_CHECKED))
880 {
881
882 // 开机 -> 跳转详情页
883 printf("❄️ 进入空调控制页 (设备ID: %d)\n", id);
884
885 current_air_ac = id; //记录当前操作的空调id
886
887 refresh_air(id);
888
889 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); // 隐藏主页
890 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_air_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); // 显示空调页
891
892 // 发送开机指令 (使用动态获取的 ID)
893 send_msg(id, "power", 1);
894
895 }
896 else
897 {
898 // 关机 -> 仅发送指令，不跳转
899 printf("❄️ 空调关机 (设备ID: %d)\n", id);
900 send_msg(id, "power", 0);
901 }
902}
903
904// 通用全控函数：一键控制所有设备
905// 1 = 全部打开 / 0 = 全部关闭
906void ctrl_all_devices(int is_open)
907{
908 if(ui_grid == NULL) return;
909
910 printf(" 正在触发全屋设备控制 -> %s\n", is_open ? "全部开启" : "全部关闭");
911
912 // 获取网格里有多少个设备卡片
913 int count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(ui_grid);
914
915 // 循环遍历每一个卡片
916 for(int i = 0; i < count; i++)
917 {
918 lv_obj_t *card = lv_obj_get_child(ui_grid, i);
919
920 // 遍历卡片内部，寻找控制控件 (开关/滑块)
921 int inner_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(card);
922 for(int j = 0; j < inner_count; j++)
923 {
924 lv_obj_t *child = lv_obj_get_child(card, j);
925
926 // 取出之前藏在控件里的 ID
927 int id = (int)(long)lv_obj_get_user_data(child);
928
929 // 跳过无效 ID和开发板ID
930 if(id == 0) continue;
931
932 char * cmd = "power"; //默认值
933 if (id < 256 && device_cmds[id] != NULL)
934 {
935 cmd = device_cmds[id];
936 }
937
938 // 开关 (Switch)
939 if(lv_obj_check_type(child, &lv_switch_class))
940 {
941 // 发送指令
942 send_msg(id, cmd, is_open);
943
944 // 更新界面开关状态
945 if(is_open) lv_obj_add_state(child, LV_STATE_CHECKED);
946 else lv_obj_clear_state(child, LV_STATE_CHECKED);
947 }
948 // 滑块 (Slider)
949 else if(lv_obj_check_type(child, &lv_slider_class))
950 {
951 int val = 0;
952 // 如果是“全开”模式，给滑块一个合理的默认值
953 if(is_open)
954 {
955 if (strcmp(cmd , "speed") == 0)
956 {
957 val = 2; //风扇开2档
958 }
959 else if (strcmp(cmd , "pos") == 0)
960 {
961 val = 50; //窗帘开50%
962 }
963 }
964 //"全关 --> "0""
965 send_msg(id, cmd, val);
966 lv_slider_set_value(child, val, LV_ANIM_ON); // 带动画滑过去
967 }
968 usleep(50000);
969 }
970 }
971}
972
973// 通用控件事件回调 (手动操作)
974static void generic(lv_event_t * e)
975{
976 // 获取绑定的设备 ID
977 int id = (int)(long)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
978 lv_obj_t *obj = lv_event_get_target(e);
979
980 char *cmd = "power"; // 默认指令
981
982 // 只要 ID 存在且在数组中有记录，就用记录的指令(用于动态添加)
983 if (id < 256 && device_cmds[id] != NULL)
984 {
985 cmd = device_cmds[id];
986 }
987
988 int val = 0; //默认值初始化
989
990 // 获取当前控件的值
991 if(lv_obj_check_type(obj, &lv_switch_class))
992 {
993 val = lv_obj_has_state(obj, LV_STATE_CHECKED);
994 }
995 else if(lv_obj_check_type(obj, &lv_slider_class))
996 {
997 val = lv_slider_get_value(obj);
998 }
999
1000 // 发送指令给服务器
1001 send_msg(id, cmd, val);
1002}
1003
1004// 根据服务器下发的 JSON 配置生成 UI
1005/**
1006 * @brief 动态添加设备卡片
1007 * * @param id 设备id
1008 * @param name 设备名称
1009 * @param type 控件类型字符串("switch :画一个开关" "slider : 画一个滑块")
1010 * @param icon_id 图标编号(决定显示什么图标)
1011 * @param col 颜色
1012 * @param range 滑块范围(0 ~ 100)
1013 */
1014void add_UI(int id, char *name, char *type, int icon_id, int col, int range)
1015{
1016 // 创建卡片容器
1017 lv_obj_t *card = lv_obj_create(ui_grid);
1018 lv_obj_set_size(card, 230, 110);
1019 lv_obj_add_style(card, &style_box, 0); //灰黑色圆角背景
1020
1021 // 左侧彩色装饰条
1022 lv_obj_t *bar = lv_obj_create(card);
1023 lv_obj_set_size(bar, 4, 60); //细长条
1024 lv_obj_align(bar, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, -5, 0);
1025 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bar, lv_color_hex(col), 0); //使用传入的颜色参数
1026
1027 // 设置图标
1028 char *icon = LV_SYMBOL_SETTINGS; //默认图标
1029 if(icon_id == 1) icon = LV_SYMBOL_POWER;
1030 else if(icon_id == 2) icon = LV_SYMBOL_REFRESH;
1031 else if(icon_id == 3) icon = LV_SYMBOL_LIST;
1032 else if(icon_id == 6) icon = LV_SYMBOL_IMAGE;
1033
1034 lv_obj_t *ico = lv_label_create(card);
1035 lv_label_set_text(ico, icon); //设置图标文本
1036 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(ico, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0); //字体
1037 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(ico, lv_color_hex(col), 0); //图标颜色
1038 lv_obj_align(ico, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 10, 0);
1039
1040 // 4. 设置名称
1041 lv_obj_t *lbl = lv_label_create(card);
1042 lv_label_set_text(lbl, name); //使用传进来的名称
1043 lv_obj_add_style(lbl, &style_title, 0); //应用标题样式(灰色小字)
1044 lv_obj_align(lbl, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 40, 2);
1045
1046 //AI动态操作(只用于控制最后的一台风扇和加湿器)
1047 if (strstr( name , "Fan") != NULL)
1048 {
1049 target_fan_id = id;
1050 }
1051 if (strstr(name , "Humidifier") != NULL)
1052 {
1053 target_humi_id = id;
1054 }
1055 //用于一键控制
1056 if (id < 256)
1057 {
1058 if (strstr( name , "Fan") != NULL)
1059 {
1060 device_cmds[id] = "speed";
1061 }
1062 else if (strstr( name , "Curtain") != NULL)
1063 {
1064 device_cmds[id] = "pos";
1065 }
1066 else
1067 {
1068 device_cmds[id] = "power";
1069 }
1070 }
1071
1072 // 5. 根据类型创建控件 (开关或滑块)
1073 if (strcmp(type , "airty") == 0) //空调特殊对待
1074 {
1075 if (air_count < 10)
1076 {
1077 air_list[air_count] = id;
1078 air_count++;
1079 }
1080
1081 lv_obj_t *sw = lv_switch_create(card);
1082 lv_obj_align(sw , LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_RIGHT , 0 ,0);
1083 lv_obj_set_user_data(sw , (void *)(long)id);
1084
1085 //回调
1086 lv_obj_add_event_cb(sw , air_entry , LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED , (void *)(long)id);
1087 }
1088 else if(strcmp(type, "switch") == 0)
1089 {
1090 lv_obj_t *sw = lv_switch_create(card); //创建开关
1091 lv_obj_align(sw, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_RIGHT, 0, 0);
1092
1093 // 绑定 ID 到 user_data(方便回调函数取出ID --> 指定启动设备)
1094 lv_obj_set_user_data(sw, (void*)(long)id);
1095 lv_obj_add_event_cb(sw, generic, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, (void*)(long)id);
1096 }
1097 else if(strcmp(type, "slider") == 0) //滑块
1098 {
1099 lv_obj_t *sl = lv_slider_create(card);
1100 lv_obj_set_width(sl, 140);
1101 lv_slider_set_range(sl, 0, range); //设置传入的范围(用于风扇跟窗帘)
1102 lv_obj_align(sl, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_LEFT, 0, 0);
1103 // 绑定 ID 到 user_data
1104 lv_obj_set_user_data(sl, (void*)(long)id);
1105 lv_obj_add_event_cb(sl, generic, LV_EVENT_RELEASED, (void*)(long)id);
1106 }
1107}
1108
1109// 读取云数据（定时器回调），每 200ms 读取一次服务器数据
1110static void read_server(lv_timer_t * t)
1111{
1112 if(sockfd < 0) return;
1113
1114 char buf[4096];
1115 // 非阻塞读取数据(防止界面卡死)
1116 int len = recv(sockfd, buf, 4095, MSG_DONTWAIT);
1117
1118 //有数据
1119 if(len > 0)
1120 {
1121 //手动给字符串赋0
1122 buf[len] = 0;
1123
1124 // 解析 JSON(把一串文本变成程序可读的结构体对象root)
1125 cJSON *root = cJSON_Parse(buf);
1126
1127 if(!root) return;
1128
1129 //获取消息类型
1130 cJSON *type = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "type");
1131 if(!type)
1132 {
1133 cJSON_Delete(root);
1134 return;
1135 }
1136
1137 // 类型 3: 收到配置文件 (服务器下发设备列表)
1138 if(type->valueint == 3)
1139 {
1140 //获取"config"对象
1141 cJSON *wrap = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "config");
1142 if(wrap)
1143 {
1144 //获取里面的数组"list"
1145 cJSON *list = cJSON_GetObjectItem(wrap, "list");
1146 if(list)
1147 {
1148 air_count = 0; // 每次刷新UI前，清空空调名单
1149 printf(" UI 配置刷新...\n");
1150 lv_obj_clean(ui_grid); // 清空旧界面(网格界面)
1151
1152 //获取列表设备数
1153 int count = cJSON_GetArraySize(list);
1154 for(int i=0; i<count; i++)
1155 {
1156 cJSON *item = cJSON_GetArrayItem(list, i);
1157
1158 // 解析各项参数
1159 int id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "id")->valueint;
1160 char *name = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "name")->valuestring;
1161 char *typ = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "type")->valuestring;
1162 int icon = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "icon_id")->valueint;
1163 char *col = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "color")->valuestring;
1164 int rng = 100; //默认滑块为100
1165 if(cJSON_HasObjectItem(item, "range"))
1166 {
1167 rng = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "range")->valueint;
1168 }
1169 // 动态生成卡片(颜色需要转换)
1170 add_UI(id, name, typ, icon, strtol(col, NULL, 16), rng);
1171 }
1172 }
1173 }
1174 }
1175 // 温度/天气/城市 上报
1176 else if(type->valueint == MSG_REPORT)
1177 {
1178 cJSON *t_item = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "temp"); //温度
1179
1180 // 解析
1181 cJSON *city_item = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "city");
1182 cJSON *weather_item = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "weather");
1183
1184 if(t_item)
1185 {
1186 double temp_val = t_item->valuedouble;
1187
1188 // 手动拆分整数和小数，避免 %f 兼容性问题
1189 int t_int = (int)temp_val;
1190 int t_dec = (int)((temp_val - t_int) * 10);
1191
1192 // 更新温度显示
1193 if(lbl_temp)
1194 {
1195 lv_label_set_text_fmt(lbl_temp, "%d.%d°C", t_int, abs(t_dec));
1196 }
1197 // 更新城市
1198 if(city_item && lbl_city)
1199 {
1200 lv_label_set_text_fmt(lbl_city, LV_SYMBOL_GPS " %s", city_item->valuestring);
1201 }
1202 // 更新天气
1203 if(weather_item && lbl_weather)
1204 {
1205 lv_label_set_text(lbl_weather, weather_item->valuestring);
1206 }
1207
1208 // AI 托管
1209 if(auto_mode)
1210 {
1211 static int last_ts = 0; //用于记录上次AI动作的时间
1212 // 每 2 秒检查一次
1213 if(custom_tick_get() - last_ts > 2000)
1214 {
1215 last_ts = custom_tick_get();
1216 if (temp_val > 30)
1217 {
1218 if (target_fan_id != -1)
1219 {
1220 send_msg(target_fan_id , "speed" , 3);
1221 update_ui_by_id(target_fan_id , 3);
1222 }
1223 if (target_humi_id != -1)
1224 {
1225 send_msg(target_humi_id , "power" , 1);
1226 update_ui_by_id(target_humi_id , 1);
1227 }
1228 }
1229 else if (temp_val < 30)
1230 {
1231 if (target_fan_id != -1)
1232 {
1233 send_msg(target_fan_id , "speed" , 1);
1234 update_ui_by_id(target_fan_id , 1);
1235 }
1236 if (target_humi_id != -1)
1237 {
1238 send_msg(target_humi_id , "power" , 0);
1239 update_ui_by_id(target_humi_id , 0);
1240 }
1241 }
1242 }
1243 }
1244 }
1245 }
1246 // 类型 1: 远程控制同步
1247 else if(type->valueint == MSG_CONTROL)
1248 {
1249 //获取设备ID跟开关值
1250 cJSON *tgt = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "target_id");
1251 cJSON *val = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "val");
1252
1253 if(tgt && val)
1254 {
1255 // int target_id = tgt->valueint; // 把对象转成整数 ID
1256 // int target_val = val->valueint; // 把对象转成整数值
1257 printf(" UI同步状态: ID %d -> %d\n", tgt->valueint, val->valueint);
1258 update_ui_by_id(tgt->valueint, val->valueint);
1259
1260 //空调操作
1261 int is_ac = 0;//标志位(判断是不是空调设备)
1262 for( int k = 0; k < air_count ; k++)
1263 {
1264 if (tgt->valueint == air_list[k])
1265 {
1266 is_ac = 1;
1267 break;
1268 }
1269 }
1270 if (is_ac && val->valueint == 1)
1271 {
1272 current_air_ac = tgt->valueint;
1273 send_msg(tgt->valueint, "power", 1);
1274 if (lock == 1)
1275 {
1276 return ;
1277 }
1278
1279 refresh_air(tgt->valueint);
1280
1281 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1282 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_air_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1283
1284 }
1285 else if(is_ac && val->valueint == 0)
1286 {
1287 // 只有当关掉的是“当前显示的那个空调”时，才回主页(确保操作同一台空调)
1288 if(tgt->valueint == current_air_ac)
1289 {
1290 send_msg(tgt->valueint, "power", 0);
1291 if (lock == 1)
1292 {
1293 return ;
1294 }
1295 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_air_screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1296 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1297 }
1298 }
1299
1300 }
1301 }
1302 else if (type->valueint == 4) //处理聊天信息
1303 {
1304 cJSON*msg_item = cJSON_GetObjectItem( root , "msg");
1305 if (msg_item)
1306 {
1307 char *txt = msg_item->valuestring;
1308 printf("收到消息: %s\n" , txt);
1309
1310 if (ta_chat_history) //追加到聊天记录框
1311 {
1312 lv_textarea_add_text(ta_chat_history , "PC :");
1313 lv_textarea_add_text(ta_chat_history , txt);
1314 lv_textarea_add_text(ta_chat_history , "\n");
1315 }
1316 }
1317 }
1318
1319 cJSON_Delete(root); // 必须释放内存
1320 }
1321}
1322
1323// 登录界面回调
1324static void login(lv_event_t * e)
1325{
1326 const char *txt = lv_textarea_get_text(input_pwd);
1327
1328 // 密码校验
1329 if(strcmp(txt, "1234") == 0)
1330 {
1331 lock = 0;
1332 // 隐藏登录页，显示主页
1333 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_login, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1334 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1335
1336 // 清空密码框
1337 lv_textarea_set_text(input_pwd, "");
1338
1339 printf("欢迎欢迎 热烈欢迎！开灯！\n");
1340 //发送开灯消息
1341 send_msg(101, "power", 1);
1342 //同步UI
1343 update_ui_by_id(101, 1);
1344
1345 }
1346 else
1347 {
1348 // 密码错误，清空重输
1349 lv_textarea_set_text(input_pwd, "");
1350 }
1351}
1352
1353// AI 开关回调
1354static void auto_toggle(lv_event_t * e)
1355{
1356 auto_mode = lv_obj_has_state(lv_event_get_target(e), LV_STATE_CHECKED);
1357
1358 // 开启/关闭时重置记忆
1359 if(auto_mode)
1360 {
1361 last_ai_fan = -1;
1362 last_ai_humi = -1;
1363 }
1364 printf("AI 模式切换: %d\n", auto_mode);
1365}
1366
1367// 场景切换函数
1368static void scene(lv_event_t * e)
1369{
1370 int mode = (int)(long)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
1371
1372 if(mode == 0) // 离家模式
1373 {
1374 printf("👋 离家模式：关闭所有设备并退出\n");
1375
1376 // 关闭所有已知设备 (发送 0)
1377 ctrl_all_devices(0);
1378
1379 //切换回登录界面
1380 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1381 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_login, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1382 lock = 1;
1383
1384 //强制关闭 AI 托管
1385 auto_mode = 0;
1386 if(sw_auto) lv_obj_clear_state(sw_auto, LV_STATE_CHECKED);
1387
1388 //清除密码残留
1389 lv_textarea_set_text(input_pwd, "");
1390 }
1391 else if(mode == 1) // 睡眠模式(关闭所有灯跟TV)
1392 {
1393 printf("🌙 触发睡眠模式...\n");
1394
1395 if(ui_grid == NULL)
1396 {
1397 printf("❌ 错误:ui_grid 为空！\n");
1398 return;
1399 }
1400
1401 // 获取所有卡片
1402 int count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(ui_grid);
1403 printf("🔍 扫描到 %d 个设备卡片\n", count);
1404
1405 for(int i = 0; i < count; i++)
1406 {
1407 lv_obj_t *card = lv_obj_get_child(ui_grid, i);
1408
1409 // 遍历卡片内的零件
1410 int inner_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(card);
1411 for(int j = 0; j < inner_count; j++)
1412 {
1413 lv_obj_t *child = lv_obj_get_child(card, j);
1414
1415 // 只要是开关 (Switch) 控件
1416 if(lv_obj_check_type(child, &lv_switch_class))
1417 {
1418 int id = (int)(long)lv_obj_get_user_data(child);
1419
1420 if(id == 0) continue; // 跳过无效ID
1421
1422 // 4. 判断是否为空调
1423 int is_ac = 0;
1424 for(int k = 0; k < air_count; k++)
1425 {
1426 if(air_list[k] == id)
1427 {
1428 is_ac = 1;
1429 break;
1430 }
1431 }
1432
1433 if(is_ac)
1434 {
1435 printf("❄️ 保留空调 (ID:%d)\n", id);
1436 }
1437 else
1438 {
1439 // 5. 只有当开关是“开启”状态时，才去关它 (避免重复发送指令)
1440 if(lv_obj_has_state(child, LV_STATE_CHECKED))
1441 {
1442 printf("💡 关闭设备 (ID:%d)...\n", id);
1443
1444 // 发送关机指令
1445 send_msg(id, "power", 0);
1446
1447 // 立即把 UI 关掉
1448 lv_obj_clear_state(child, LV_STATE_CHECKED);
1449
1450 // 稍微延时防止网络堵塞 (改为 10ms，更丝滑)
1451 usleep(10000);
1452 }
1453 }
1454 }
1455 }
1456 }
1457 printf("✅ 睡眠模式执行完毕\n");
1458 }
1459}
1460
1461// 初始化 UI 界面
1462void init_ui()
1463{
1464 //初始化空调设备
1465 for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++)
1466 {
1467 device_temps[i] = 26;
1468 device_modes[i] = 0;
1469 }
1470
1471 // 样式初始化
1472 lv_style_init(&style_box);
1473 lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_box, lv_color_hex(0x1F1F1F));
1474 lv_style_set_radius(&style_box, 12);
1475
1476 lv_style_init(&style_title);
1477 lv_style_set_text_color(&style_title, lv_color_hex(0x888888));
1478 lv_style_set_text_font(&style_title, &lv_font_montserrat_14);
1479
1480 // 创建主屏幕
1481 ui_home = lv_obj_create(lv_scr_act());
1482 lv_obj_set_size(ui_home, 800, 480);
1483 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(ui_home, lv_color_hex(0x101010), 0);
1484 lv_obj_add_flag(ui_home, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN); // 初始隐藏
1485 lv_obj_clear_flag(ui_home , LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE); //锁死主背景
1486
1487 // 顶部栏 (改为纯黑背景，作为状态栏)
1488 lv_obj_t *top = lv_obj_create(ui_home);
1489 lv_obj_set_size(top, 800, 50);
1490 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top, lv_color_hex(0x000000), 0); // 纯黑
1491 lv_obj_align(top, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
1492 //隐藏顶部栏边框
1493 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top , 0 , 0);
1494 lv_obj_set_style_radius(top , 0 , 0);
1495
1496 // 创建一个透明容器来包裹 时间/城市/温度/天气
1497 txt_info_bar = lv_obj_create(top);
1498 lv_obj_set_size(txt_info_bar, 600, 50);
1499 lv_obj_align(txt_info_bar, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0); // 靠左
1500 lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(txt_info_bar, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // 透明
1501 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(txt_info_bar, 0, 0);
1502 lv_obj_set_flex_flow(txt_info_bar, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW); // 横向排列
1503 lv_obj_set_flex_align(txt_info_bar, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
1504 lv_obj_set_style_pad_column(txt_info_bar, 20, 0); // 每个元素间隔 20px
1505 lv_obj_clear_flag(txt_info_bar, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
1506
1507 // 1. 时间标签
1508 lbl_time = lv_label_create(txt_info_bar);
1509 lv_label_set_text(lbl_time, "00:00");
1510 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_time, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
1511 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_time, lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF), 0);
1512
1513 // 2. 城市标签
1514 lbl_city = lv_label_create(txt_info_bar);
1515 lv_label_set_text(lbl_city, LV_SYMBOL_GPS " Loading"); // 默认值
1516 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_city, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
1517 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_city, lv_color_hex(0xAAAAAA), 0);
1518
1519 // 3. 温度标签 (大字)
1520 lbl_temp = lv_label_create(txt_info_bar);
1521 lv_label_set_text(lbl_temp, "--°C");
1522 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_temp, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
1523 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_temp, lv_color_hex(0xFFA500), 0); // 橙色
1524
1525 // 4. 天气文字标签
1526 lbl_weather = lv_label_create(txt_info_bar);
1527 lv_label_set_text(lbl_weather, "Loading...");
1528 lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_weather, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
1529 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_weather, lv_color_hex(0x00BFFF), 0); // 天蓝色
1530
1531 // 右侧状态栏 (在线/离线)
1532 txt_status = lv_label_create(top);
1533 lv_label_set_text(txt_status, is_online ? LV_SYMBOL_WIFI : LV_SYMBOL_CLOSE);
1534 lv_obj_align(txt_status, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -20, 0);
1535
1536 // 5. 设备网格区
1537 ui_grid = lv_obj_create(ui_home);
1538 lv_obj_set_size(ui_grid, 800, 340);
1539 lv_obj_align(ui_grid, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 60); // 紧贴顶部栏下方
1540 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(ui_grid, lv_color_hex(0x101010), 0);
1541 lv_obj_set_flex_align(ui_grid, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START); //居中
1542 lv_obj_set_flex_flow(ui_grid, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW_WRAP); // 自动换行
1543 lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(ui_grid, LV_DIR_VER);//只能上下滑动
1544 lv_obj_set_style_pad_hor(ui_grid ,0 , 0);
1545 // 隐藏网格边框
1546 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(ui_grid, 0, 0);
1547
1548 // 6. 底部栏
1549 lv_obj_t *bot = lv_obj_create(ui_home);
1550 lv_obj_set_size(bot, 800, 70);
1551 lv_obj_align(bot, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, 10);
1552 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bot, lv_color_hex(0x202020), 0);
1553 lv_obj_set_flex_flow(bot, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
1554 lv_obj_set_flex_align(bot, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_AROUND, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
1555 //隐藏底部栏边框
1556 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(bot , 0 , 0);
1557 lv_obj_set_style_radius(bot , 0 , 0);
1558
1559
1560 // 离家
1561 lv_obj_t *b1 = lv_btn_create(bot);
1562 lv_obj_set_size(b1, 140, 50);
1563 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(b1, lv_color_hex(0xFF0000), 0); // 红色背景
1564 lv_obj_add_event_cb(b1, scene, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)0); // 模式 0
1565 lv_obj_center(lv_label_create(b1));
1566 lv_label_set_text(lv_obj_get_child(b1,0), LV_SYMBOL_POWER" Leave");
1567
1568 // 睡眠
1569 lv_obj_t *b2 = lv_btn_create(bot);
1570 lv_obj_set_size(b2, 140, 50);
1571 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(b2, lv_color_hex(0x6600FF), 0); // 紫色背景
1572 lv_obj_add_event_cb(b2, scene, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, (void*)1); // 模式 1
1573 lv_obj_center(lv_label_create(b2));
1574 lv_label_set_text(lv_obj_get_child(b2,0), LV_SYMBOL_MUTE" Sleep");
1575
1576 // AI 自动开关
1577 lv_obj_t *bx = lv_obj_create(bot);
1578 lv_obj_set_size(bx, 130, 50);
1579 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bx, lv_color_hex(0x330033), 0);
1580 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(bx, 0, 0); // 隐藏边框
1581
1582 lv_obj_t *l = lv_label_create(bx);
1583 lv_label_set_text(l, "AI");
1584 lv_obj_set_style_text_color(l, lv_color_hex(0xFF00FF), 0);
1585 lv_obj_align(l, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 5, 0);
1586
1587 sw_auto = lv_switch_create(bx);
1588 lv_obj_align(sw_auto, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, 0, 0);
1589 lv_obj_add_event_cb(sw_auto, auto_toggle, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, NULL);
1590
1591 // 游戏入口按钮
1592 lv_obj_t *btn_game = lv_btn_create(bot);
1593 lv_obj_set_size(btn_game, 100, 50);
1594 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_game, lv_color_hex(0xFFaa00), 0); // 金色
1595 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_game, enter_game, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL); // 设置回调
1596
1597 lv_obj_t *l_game = lv_label_create(btn_game);
1598 lv_label_set_text(l_game, LV_SYMBOL_PLAY" Game");
1599 lv_obj_center(l_game);
1600
1601 // 聊天按钮
1602 lv_obj_t *btn_chat = lv_btn_create(bot);
1603 lv_obj_set_size(btn_chat, 100, 50);
1604 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn_chat, lv_color_hex(0x0088AA), 0); // 青色
1605 lv_obj_set_style_border_width(btn_chat, 0, 0); // 无边框
1606 lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn_chat, enter_chat, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
1607
1608 lv_obj_t *l_chat = lv_label_create(btn_chat);
1609 lv_label_set_text(l_chat, " Chat");
1610 lv_obj_center(l_chat);
1611}
1612
1613// 主函数
1614int main(void)
1615{
1616 // 初始化 LVGL 驱动
1617 lv_init();
1618 fbdev_init();
1619 evdev_init();
1620
1621 // 注册显示驱动
1622 static lv_disp_draw_buf_t db;
1623 static lv_color_t buf[800*480];
1624 lv_disp_draw_buf_init(&db, buf, NULL, 800*480);
1625
1626 static lv_disp_drv_t dd;
1627 lv_disp_drv_init(&dd);
1628 dd.draw_buf = &db;
1629 dd.flush_cb = fbdev_flush;
1630 dd.hor_res = 800;
1631 dd.ver_res = 480;
1632 lv_disp_drv_register(&dd);
1633
1634 // 注册输入驱动
1635 static lv_indev_drv_t id;
1636 lv_indev_drv_init(&id);
1637 id.type = LV_INDEV_TYPE_POINTER;
1638 id.read_cb = evdev_read;
1639 lv_indev_drv_register(&id);
1640
1641 // 连接服务器
1642 sockfd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
1643 struct sockaddr_in a = {0};
1644 a.sin_family = AF_INET;
1645 a.sin_port = htons(SERVER_PORT);
1646 a.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr(SERVER_IP);
1647
1648 if(connect(sockfd, (struct sockaddr*)&a, sizeof(a)) == 0)
1649 {
1650 is_online = 1;
1651 printf("✅ 已连接服务器\n");
1652 // 注册设备 (身份: 0 = 手机/开发板)
1653 char *m = protocol_pack_register(0, 0);
1654 send(sockfd, m, strlen(m), 0);
1655 free(m);
1656 }
1657
1658 // 构建登录界面
1659 ui_login = lv_obj_create(lv_scr_act());
1660 lv_obj_set_size(ui_login, 800, 480);
1661 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(ui_login, lv_color_hex(0x000000), 0);
1662
1663 input_pwd = lv_textarea_create(ui_login);
1664 lv_textarea_set_password_mode(input_pwd, true);
1665 lv_obj_center(input_pwd);
1666
1667 keyboard = lv_keyboard_create(ui_login);
1668 lv_keyboard_set_textarea(keyboard, input_pwd);
1669 lv_obj_add_event_cb(keyboard, login, LV_EVENT_READY, NULL);
1670
1671 // 4. 构建主界面
1672 init_ui();
1673 init_air_view(); //空调界面
1674 init_game_view(); //贪吃蛇界面
1675 init_chat_view(); //聊天界面
1676
1677 // 5. 启动网络读取定时器 (200ms)
1678 lv_timer_create(read_server, 200, NULL);
1679
1680 // 6. 启动时间更新定时器 (1000ms = 1秒)
1681 lv_timer_create(update_time_cb, 1000, NULL);
1682
1683 // 7. 主循环
1684 while(1)
1685 {
1686 lv_timer_handler();
1687 usleep(5000);
1688 }
1689
1690 return 0;
1691}

server

1#include <stdio.h>
2#include <stdlib.h>
3#include <string.h>
4#include <unistd.h>
5#include <pthread.h>
6#include <arpa/inet.h>
7#include <sys/socket.h>
8#include <sys/time.h>
9#include <errno.h>
10#include <time.h>
11#include "../inc/cJSON.h"
12#include "../inc/smart_protocol.h"
13
14// 服务器端口
15#define SERVER_PORT 8888
16
17// 巴法云配置
18#define BEMFA_IP "119.91.109.180"
19#define BEMFA_PORT 8344
20
21#define BEMFA_UID "d3494acad6424a54bf8142d7a3e60cb9"
22
23// 互斥锁
24pthread_mutex_t bemfa_mutex = PTHREAD_MUTEX_INITIALIZER;
25pthread_mutex_t list_mutex = PTHREAD_MUTEX_INITIALIZER;
26pthread_mutex_t log_mutex = PTHREAD_MUTEX_INITIALIZER;
27
28// 全局变量
29int cloudfd = -1; // 云端连接套接字
30char *read_json = NULL; // 缓存读取到的 JSON 内容(用于发给客户端)
31
32// 动态设备配置结构体
33typedef struct
34{
35 int id;
36 char name[64];
37 char topic[64];
38 char cmd[32]; // 例如 "power", "speed", "pos"
39 char type[16]; // 例如 "switch", "slider"
40 int state; // 当前状态 (用于防重复和日志记录)
41} Device;
42
43#define MAX_DEVICES 20
44Device devices[MAX_DEVICES]; // 设备数组
45int device_count = 0; // 设备数量
46
47// 客户端连接链表节点
48typedef struct DeviceNode
49{
50 int fd;
51 int id;
52 struct DeviceNode *next;
53} DeviceNode;
54
55DeviceNode *head = NULL; // 链表头
56
57// 函数声明
58int find_fd_by_id(int id);
59void add_device(int fd, int id);
60void remove_device(int fd);
61void write_log(int target_id, int val);
62
63/**
64 * @brief 从devices.json读取设备消息，然后将内容复制到设备（结构体数组）
65 */
66void load_device_config()
67{
68 FILE *f = fopen("devices.json", "rb");
69 if(!f)
70 {
71 printf("❌ 无法打开 devices.json! 请确保文件存在。\n");
72 return;
73 }
74
75 // 获取文件大小(这是C语言获取文件大小的标准"连招")
76 fseek(f, 0, SEEK_END);
77 long len = ftell(f);
78 fseek(f, 0, SEEK_SET);
79
80 // 读取内容到内存
81 char *data = (char*)malloc(len + 1);
82 if (!data) return;
83 fread(data, 1, len, f);
84 data[len] = '\0';
85 fclose(f);
86
87 // 缓存原始字符串用于发给客户端
88 if(read_json) free(read_json);
89 read_json = strdup(data);
90
91 // 解析 JSON --> 对象data
92 cJSON *root = cJSON_Parse(data);
93 if (!root)
94 {
95 free(data);
96 return;
97 }
98 //从data对象找到"list"数组
99 cJSON *list = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "list");
100 if(list)
101 {
102 device_count = 0;
103 int count = cJSON_GetArraySize(list);
104 for(int i=0; i<count && i<MAX_DEVICES; i++) //遍历每一个设备对象
105 {
106 cJSON *item = cJSON_GetArrayItem(list, i);
107
108 // 读取各个字段(获取"id"字段 , 视为整数valueint读取) 然后复制到结构体中
109 devices[i].id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "id")->valueint;
110 strcpy(devices[i].name, cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "name")->valuestring);
111 strcpy(devices[i].topic, cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "topic")->valuestring);
112 strcpy(devices[i].cmd, cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "cmd")->valuestring);
113 strcpy(devices[i].type, cJSON_GetObjectItem(item, "type")->valuestring);
114 devices[i].state = 0; // 初始化状态为0
115
116 printf("📋 加载设备: %s (ID:%d Topic:%s)\n", devices[i].name, devices[i].id, devices[i].topic);
117 device_count++;
118 }
119 }
120 cJSON_Delete(root);
121 free(data);
122}
123
124// 写日志函数 (记录到文件)
125void write_log(int target_id, int val)
126{
127 pthread_mutex_lock(&log_mutex);
128
129 // 1. 获取当前时间
130 time_t now;
131 struct tm tm_info;
132 time(&now);
133 localtime_r(&now, &tm_info);
134
135 char time_str[64];
136 strftime(time_str, sizeof(time_str), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", &tm_info);
137
138 // 2. 查找设备名称和类型
139 char *name = "未知设备";
140 char *type_str = "switch";
141
142 for(int i=0; i<device_count; i++)
143 {
144 if(devices[i].id == target_id)
145 {
146 name = devices[i].name;
147 type_str = devices[i].type;
148 break;
149 }
150 }
151
152 if(target_id == 0) name = "手机端";
153
154 // 3. 格式化状态描述
155 char state[64];
156 if(strcmp(type_str, "slider") == 0)
157 {
158 if(val == 0)
159 {
160 sprintf(state, "关闭/停止");
161 }
162 else if(val == 100)
163 {
164 sprintf(state, "全开/最大");
165 }
166 else {
167 sprintf(state, "开启至 %d", val);
168 }
169 }
170 else if(strcmp(type_str, "lock") == 0)
171 {
172 sprintf(state, "执行开锁");
173 }
174 else
175 {
176 sprintf(state, "%s", val ? "开启ON" : "关闭OFF");
177 }
178
179 // 4. 写入文件 增加了 [ID:%d] --> 动态添加设备
180 FILE *fp = fopen("smart_log.txt", "a+");
181 if (fp != NULL)
182 {
183 // 格式: [2026-01-23 10:00:00] [ID:101] Smart Light -> 开启ON
184 fprintf(fp, "[%s] [ID:%d] %s -> %s\n", time_str, target_id, name, state);
185 fclose(fp);
186
187 //printf("📝 日志: [%s] [ID:%d] %s -> %s\n", time_str, target_id, name, state);
188 }
189
190 pthread_mutex_unlock(&log_mutex);
191}
192
193// 发送数据("cmd=2&uid=%s&topic=%s&msg=%s\r\n")给巴法云
194void send_cloud(const char *msg)
195{
196 pthread_mutex_lock(&bemfa_mutex);
197 if (cloudfd > 0)
198 {
199 if (send(cloudfd, msg, strlen(msg), 0) < 0)
200 {
201 printf("☁️ [巴法云] 发送失败，连接可能断开\n");
202 close(cloudfd);
203 cloudfd = -1;
204 }
205 }
206 pthread_mutex_unlock(&bemfa_mutex);
207}
208
209/**
210 * @brief 本地设备状态变更 -> 格式化消息 -> 上传到云。
211 * @param target_id 目标设备ID
212 * @param val 开关值
213 */
214void sync_to_cloud(int target_id, int val)
215{
216 for(int i=0; i<device_count; i++)
217 {
218 if(devices[i].id == target_id)
219 {
220 // 更新本地状态
221 devices[i].state = val;
222
223 char msg[32];
224
225 // 如果是开关或者门锁，就直接发on/off
226 if(strcmp(devices[i].type, "switch") == 0 || strcmp(devices[i].type, "lock") == 0)
227 {
228 // 如果是 1 就翻译成 "on"，如果是 0 就翻译成 "off"
229 sprintf(msg, "%s", val ? "on" : "off");
230 }
231 else // 其它类型(风扇，窗帘 ,空调)
232 {
233 if(val == 0)
234 {
235 sprintf(msg, "off");
236 }
237 else if(val > 0 && strcmp(devices[i].cmd, "pos")==0 || strcmp(devices[i].cmd , "speed") == 0 || strcmp(devices[i].type , "airty") == 0)
238 {
239 sprintf(msg, "on");
240 }
241 else
242 {
243 sprintf(msg, "%d", val);
244 }
245 }
246
247 char buffer[256];
248 snprintf(buffer, sizeof(buffer), "cmd=2&uid=%s&topic=%s&msg=%s\r\n",
249 BEMFA_UID, devices[i].topic, msg);
250
251 printf(" [上传] %s (Val:%d) -> Msg:%s\n", devices[i].name, val, msg);
252 send_cloud(buffer);
253 return;
254 }
255 }
256}
257
258/**
259 * @brief 格式转化，实现云控制开发板
260 * @param recv_str "cmd=2&uid=%s&topic=%s&msg=%s\r\n"
261 */
262void parse_cloud_cmd(char *recv_str)
263{
264 //"cmd=2&uid=%s&topic=%s&msg=%s\r\n"
265 char *p_topic = strstr(recv_str, "&topic=");
266 char *p_msg = strstr(recv_str, "&msg=");
267
268 if (p_topic && p_msg)
269 {
270 //跳过格式头
271 p_topic += 7;
272 p_msg += 5;
273
274 char topic[64] = {0};
275 int i=0;
276 while(p_topic[i]!='&' && p_topic[i]!='\0' && i<63) //过滤消息并复制内容
277 {
278 topic[i]=p_topic[i];
279 i++;
280 }
281
282 char msg[64] = {0};
283 i=0;
284 while(p_msg[i]!='\r' && p_msg[i]!='\n' && p_msg[i]!='\0' && i<63)
285 {
286 msg[i]=p_msg[i];
287 i++;
288 }
289
290 printf("云端收到指令 Topic:%s Msg:%s\n", topic, msg);
291
292 // 遍历查找对应设备
293 for(int k=0; k<device_count; k++)
294 {
295 if(strcmp(devices[k].topic, topic) == 0)
296 {
297 int val = 0;
298 int update = 1; // 是否需要更新(标记)
299
300 // 解析 on/off/数值
301 if(strcmp(msg, "on") == 0)
302 {
303 // 防重复：如果是滑块类且已经开启，则不重复刷新
304 if(devices[k].state > 0)
305 {
306 update = 0;
307 }
308 else
309 {
310 if(strcmp(devices[k].type, "switch")==0)
311 {
312 val = 1; //开关
313 }
314 else if(strcmp(devices[k].cmd, "pos")==0)
315 {
316 val = 100;// 窗帘全开
317 }
318 else
319 {
320 val = 1; // (默认)风扇1档
321 }
322 }
323 }
324 else if(strcmp(msg, "off") == 0)
325 {
326 val = 0;
327 }
328 else
329 {
330 val = atoi(msg);
331 }
332
333 if(val == devices[k].state) update = 0; // 保持原来的状态
334
335 if(update) //需要更新
336 {
337 devices[k].state = val; // 更新状态
338
339 // 1. 发给模拟器
340 int sim_fd = find_fd_by_id(devices[k].id);
341 if(sim_fd > 0)
342 {
343 char *json = protocol_pack_control(devices[k].id, devices[k].cmd, val);
344 send(sim_fd, json, strlen(json), 0);
345 free(json);
346
347 // 日志记录
348 write_log(devices[k].id, val);
349 }
350
351 // 发给开发板 UI (更新)
352 int board_fd = find_fd_by_id(0);
353 if(board_fd > 0)
354 {
355 char *json = protocol_pack_control(devices[k].id, "sync", val);
356 send(board_fd, json, strlen(json), 0);
357 free(json);
358 printf("🔄 同步给UI: ID=%d Val=%d\n", devices[k].id, val);
359 }
360 }
361 return;
362 }
363 }
364 }
365}
366
367/**
368 * @brief 连接巴法云并订阅设备处理指令（云发来的消息）
369 * @param arg
370 * @return void*
371 */
372void *cloud_thread_func(void *arg)
373{
374 while (1)
375 {
376 printf(" [巴法云] 连接中 %s:%d ...\n", BEMFA_IP, BEMFA_PORT);
377 int sockfd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
378
379 struct sockaddr_in addr;
380 addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
381 addr.sin_port = htons( BEMFA_PORT);
382 addr.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr( BEMFA_IP);
383
384 if (connect(sockfd, (struct sockaddr *)&addr, sizeof(addr)) < 0)
385 {
386 close(sockfd);
387 sleep(5);
388 continue;
389 }
390
391 pthread_mutex_lock(&bemfa_mutex);
392 cloudfd = sockfd;
393 pthread_mutex_unlock(&bemfa_mutex);
394 printf(" [巴法云] 连接成功! 动态订阅设备...\n");
395
396 // 动态订阅所有设备 Topic
397 char msg[256];
398 for(int i=0; i<device_count; i++)
399 {
400 snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "cmd=1&uid=%s&topic=%s\r\n", BEMFA_UID, devices[i].topic);
401 send_cloud(msg);
402 usleep(50000);
403 }
404
405 //发送心跳包
406 struct timeval tv = {30, 0};
407 setsockopt(sockfd, SOL_SOCKET, SO_RCVTIMEO, (const char*)&tv, sizeof tv);
408 char buf[1024]; //接收云发来的消息
409
410 //接收云消息"cmd=2&uid=%s&topic=%s&msg=%s\r\n"
411 while (cloudfd > 0)
412 {
413 int len = recv(sockfd, buf, sizeof(buf)-1, 0);
414 if (len > 0)
415 {
416 buf[len] = 0;
417 parse_cloud_cmd(buf);
418 }
419 else if (len == 0) break;
420 else if (errno == EAGAIN || errno == EWOULDBLOCK)
421 send_cloud("cmd=0&msg=ping\r\n"); // 心跳
422 else break;
423 }
424
425 close(sockfd);
426 pthread_mutex_lock(&bemfa_mutex);
427 cloudfd = -1;
428 pthread_mutex_unlock(&bemfa_mutex);
429 sleep(5);
430 }
431 return NULL;
432}
433
434// 添加设备(头插)
435void add_device(int fd, int id)
436{
437 pthread_mutex_lock(&list_mutex);
438 DeviceNode *node = (DeviceNode *)malloc(sizeof(DeviceNode));
439 node->fd = fd;
440 node->id = id;
441 node->next = head;
442 head = node;
443 pthread_mutex_unlock(&list_mutex);
444 printf(">>> ✅ 设备上线: ID %d\n", id);
445}
446
447// id查找
448int find_fd_by_id(int id)
449{
450 pthread_mutex_lock(&list_mutex);
451 DeviceNode *p = head;
452 while(p)
453 {
454 if(p->id == id)
455 {
456 int fd = p->fd;
457 pthread_mutex_unlock(&list_mutex);
458 return fd;
459 }
460 p = p->next;
461 }
462 pthread_mutex_unlock(&list_mutex);
463 return -1;
464}
465
466// 删除设备
467void remove_device(int fd)
468{
469 pthread_mutex_lock(&list_mutex);
470 DeviceNode *p = head; DeviceNode *prev = NULL;
471 while (p != NULL)
472 {
473 if (p->fd == fd)
474 {
475 if (prev == NULL)
476 {
477 head = p->next; //删除头节点
478 }
479 else
480 {
481 prev->next = p->next;
482 }
483 printf("<<< ❌ 设备下线: ID %d\n", p->id);
484 free(p);
485 break;
486 }
487 prev = p;
488 p = p->next;
489 }
490 pthread_mutex_unlock(&list_mutex);
491}
492
493/**
494 * @brief 接收客户端发来的json数据，解析json数据，转发数据到开发板(温湿度跟动态生成UI)
495 * @param arg
496 * @return void*
497 */
498void *handle_client(void *arg)
499{
500 int connfd = (int)(long)arg;
501 char buffer[4096]; //存储json数据缓存区
502 int len; //实际字节数
503
504 while ((len = recv(connfd, buffer, sizeof(buffer)-1, 0)) > 0)
505 {
506 //手动添加结束符
507 buffer[len] = '\0';
508
509 //解析json数据
510 cJSON *root = cJSON_Parse(buffer);
511 if (!root)
512 {
513 continue;
514 }
515
516 cJSON *type = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "type");
517 if (!type)
518 {
519 cJSON_Delete(root);
520 continue;
521 }
522
523 switch (type->valueint)
524 {
525 case MSG_REGISTER: // 注册
526 {
527 cJSON *id = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "id");
528 if(id)
529 {
530 add_device(connfd, id->valueint);
531
532 // 如果是开发板 (ID=0)，发送缓存的配置列表
533 if(id->valueint == 0 && read_json)
534 {
535 char *json_out = (char*)malloc(strlen(read_json) + 64);
536 if(json_out)
537 {
538 //动态生成UI所需(把devices.json的数据拼接后发给客户端)
539 sprintf(json_out, "{\"type\":3,\"config\":%s}", read_json);
540 send(connfd, json_out, strlen(json_out), 0);
541 free(json_out);
542 printf("发送配置列表给客户端\n");
543 }
544 }
545 }
546 break;
547 }
548 case MSG_CONTROL: // 控制
549 {
550 cJSON *target = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "target_id");
551 cJSON *val = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root, "val");
552 if (target && val)
553 {
554 // 1. 转发给模拟器
555 int target_fd = find_fd_by_id(target->valueint);
556 if (target_fd > 0)
557 {
558 send(target_fd, buffer, len, 0);
559 }
560
561 // 2. 上传到云端
562 sync_to_cloud(target->valueint, val->valueint);
563
564 // 3. 记录日志
565 write_log(target->valueint, val->valueint);
566 }
567 break;
568 }
569 case MSG_REPORT: // 温度上报
570 {
571 int phone_fd = find_fd_by_id(0); // 转发给开发板
572 if (phone_fd > 0)
573 {
574 send(phone_fd, buffer, len, 0);
575 }
576 break;
577 }
578 case 4: //终端聊天显示
579 {
580 cJSON *msg_item = cJSON_GetObjectItem(root , "msg");
581 if (msg_item)
582 {
583 printf("\n Board : %s\n" , msg_item->valuestring);
584 }
585 break;
586 }
587 }
588 cJSON_Delete(root);
589 }
590 close(connfd);
591 remove_device(connfd);
592 return NULL;
593}
594
595//服务器输入
596void *server_input(void *arg)
597{
598 char input[256];
599 while (1)
600 {
601 //获取电脑终端输入(非阻塞)·
602 memset(input , 0 , 256);
603 fgets( input , sizeof(input) , stdin);
604 input[strcspn(input , "\n")] = 0; //去掉末尾换行符
605
606 if (strlen(input) > 0)
607 {
608 int board_fd = find_fd_by_id(0);
609 if (board_fd > 0)
610 {
611 //封装JSON并发送
612 char json[512];
613 sprintf(json , "{\"type\":4, \"msg\":\"%s\"}",input);
614
615 send(board_fd , json , strlen(json) , 0);
616 printf("Server : %s\n" , input);
617 }
618 else
619 {
620 printf("开发板未连接，消息无法发送\n");
621 }
622 }
623 }
624 return NULL;
625}
626
627
628int main()
629{
630 // 1. 读取配置文件
631 load_device_config();
632
633 // 2. 创建 Socket
634 int tcp_socket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
635 if (tcp_socket == -1)
636 {
637 perror("socket");
638 return -1;
639 }
640
641 int opt = 1;
642 setsockopt(tcp_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_REUSEADDR, &opt, sizeof(opt));
643
644 struct sockaddr_in saddr;
645 saddr.sin_family = AF_INET;
646 saddr.sin_port = htons(SERVER_PORT);
647 saddr.sin_addr.s_addr = htonl(INADDR_ANY);
648
649 //绑定
650 if (bind(tcp_socket, (struct sockaddr *)&saddr, sizeof(saddr)) == -1)
651 {
652 perror("bind");
653 return -1;
654 }
655 //监听
656 if (listen(tcp_socket, 10) == -1)
657 {
658 perror("listen");
659 return -1;
660 }
661
662 printf("=== 🏠 全屋智能动态网关 (Port: %d) ===\n", SERVER_PORT);
663
664 // 3. 启动云端线程
665 pthread_t bemfa_tid;
666 pthread_create(&bemfa_tid, NULL, cloud_thread_func, NULL);
667 pthread_detach(bemfa_tid);
668
669 //启动服务器线程(用于聊天)
670 pthread_t input_tid;
671 pthread_create( &input_tid , NULL , server_input , NULL);
672 pthread_detach(input_tid);
673
674 // 4. 等待客户端连接
675 while (1)
676 {
677 struct sockaddr_in caddr;
678 socklen_t len = sizeof(caddr);
679 int cfd = accept(tcp_socket, (struct sockaddr *)&caddr, &len);
680 if (cfd != -1)
681 {
682 pthread_t tid;
683 pthread_create(&tid, NULL, handle_client, (void *)(long)cfd);
684 pthread_detach(tid);
685 }
686 }
687 return 0;
688}

1#include <stdio.h>
2#include <stdlib.h>
3#include <string.h>
4#include "../inc/smart_protocol.h"
5
6//创建一个带有 type 的基础对象
7static cJSON* create_base_json(int type)
8{
9 cJSON *root = cJSON_CreateObject();
10
11 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "type", type);
12 return root;
13}
14
15// 注册消息 type:0 c语言数据 id = 101 , role = 1
16// 格式: {"type": 0, "id": 101, "role": 1}
17char* protocol_pack_register(int id, int role)
18{
19 cJSON *root = create_base_json(MSG_REGISTER);
20
21 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "id", id);
22 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "role", role);
23
24 // 生成字符串(不换行)
25 char *json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);
26
27 cJSON_Delete(root);
28 return json_str; // 返回字符串
29}
30
31// 控制 type :1 目标设备id：target_id cmd(命令)：power"ui开关" "val" : 1开 0关
32// 格式: {"type": 1, "target_id": 101, "cmd": "power", "val": 1}
33char* protocol_pack_control(int target_id, char* cmd, int val)
34{
35 cJSON *root = create_base_json(MSG_CONTROL);
36
37 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "target_id", target_id);
38 cJSON_AddStringToObject(root, "cmd", cmd);
39 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "val", val);
40
41 char *json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);
42
43 cJSON_Delete(root);
44 return json_str;
45}
46
47// 上报消息 type :2 id(设备id) 专门用来汇报温湿度的
48// 格式: {"type": 2, "id": 102, "temp": 26.5, "humi": 60}
49char* protocol_pack_report(int id, double temp, int humi)
50{
51 cJSON *root = create_base_json(MSG_REPORT);
52
53 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "id", id);
54 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "temp", temp);
55 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(root, "humi", humi);
56
57 char *json_str = cJSON_PrintUnformatted(root);
58
59 cJSON_Delete(root);
60 return json_str;
61}
1#ifndef _SMART_PROTOCOL_H
2#define _SMART_PROTOCOL_H
3
4#include "cJSON.h"
5
6// 消息类型
7typedef enum {
8 MSG_REGISTER = 0, // 注册
9 MSG_CONTROL, // 控制
10 MSG_REPORT // 上报
11} MsgType;
12
13// 设备定义
14typedef enum {
15 ROLE_PHONE = 0, // 开发板
16 ROLE_LAMP = 101, // 灯
17 ROLE_SENSOR = 102, // 传感器
18 ROLE_CURTAIN = 103, // 窗帘
19 ROLE_AIRCON = 104, // 空调
20 ROLE_FAN = 105, // 风扇
21 ROLE_SCENE = 106, // 场景
22 ROLE_HUMIDIFIER = 107, // 加湿器 (映射热水器)
23 ROLE_TV = 108, // 电视
24 ROLE_LOCK = 109 // 智能锁
25} DeviceType;
26
27// 函数声明
28char* protocol_pack_register(int id, int role);
29char* protocol_pack_control(int target_id, char* cmd, int val);
30char* protocol_pack_report(int id, double temp, int humi);
31
32#endif
← 返回项目列表

智能门锁

项目描述

以STM32F407为核心板，用FreeRTOS操作系统实现多模态智能门锁系统

项目文件 34 个文件

📝FM225.cc
📁FM225.hc
📝beep.cc
📁beep.hc
📝bt_hc05.cc
📁bt_hc05.hc
📝esp8266.cc
📁esp8266.hc
📝exti.cc
📁exti.hc
📝i2c_ee.cc
📁i2c_ee.hc
📝iwdg.cc
📁iwdg.hc
📝key4X4.cc
📁key4X4.hc
📝led.cc
📁led.hc
📝main.cc
📝oled.cc
📁oled.hc
📁oledfont.hc
📝pwm.cc
📁pwm.hc
📝rc522.cc
📁rc522.hc
📝ssd1306.cc
📁ssd1306.hc
📝ssd1306_fonts.cc
📁ssd1306_fonts.hc
📝tim.cc
📁tim.hc
📝zhi.cc
📁zhi.hc

1#include "stm32f4xx.h"
2#include "delay.h"
3#include "usart.h"
4#include "fm225.h"
5#include "beep.h"
6#include "led.h"
7#include "sys.h"
8#include <string.h>
9#include <stdio.h>
10
11// 新增：外部函数声明（适配跨文件调用）
12extern void Lock_Set_Relay(uint8_t sta);
13extern void SmartLock_ShowScanning(void);
14extern void SmartLock_ShowWelcome(void);
15extern void SmartLock_ShowBootScreen(void);
16// 补充delay_s实现（如果原有代码无此函数，用delay_ms替代）
17#ifndef delay_s
18#define delay_s(x) delay_ms(x * 1000)
19#endif
20
21static NVIC_InitTypeDef NVIC_InitStructure;
22static TIM_TimeBaseInitTypeDef TIM_TimeBaseStructure;
23
24#define FR_PACKET_HEAD_0 0xEF
25#define FR_PACKET_HEAD_1 0xAA
26#define FR_PACKET_MIN_LEN 6
27#define FR_MAX_PACKET_LEN 128
28#define FR_REG_TIMEOUT_CNT 15000
29#define FR_MATCH_TIMEOUT_CNT 10000
30
31static uint8_t last_note = 0xFF;
32volatile uint8_t g_rx_lock = 0;
33
34static void fr_printf_recv(uint8_t *packet_buf, uint32_t packet_len)
35{
36#if FR_DEBUG_EN
37 uint32_t i;
38 if(packet_len < FR_PACKET_MIN_LEN || packet_buf[0] != FR_PACKET_HEAD_0 || packet_buf[1] != FR_PACKET_HEAD_1)
39 {
40 return;
41 }
42 printf("fr valid packet:");
43 for(i=0; i<packet_len; i++)
44 {
45 printf("%02X ", packet_buf[i]);
46 }
47 printf("\r\n");
48#else
49 (void)packet_buf;
50 (void)packet_len;
51#endif
52}
53
54// 【修复】增加缓冲区强制清空，防止数据溢出卡死
55static uint32_t fr_parse_packet(uint8_t *out_buf, uint32_t max_len)
56{
57 uint32_t i = 0;
58 uint32_t data_len = 0;
59 uint32_t total_len = 0;
60 g_rx_lock = 1;
61
62 // 溢出强制清空
63 if(g_usart6_rx_cnt >= sizeof(g_usart6_rx_buf))
64 {
65 g_usart6_rx_cnt = 0;
66 g_usart6_rx_end = 0;
67 memset((void*)g_usart6_rx_buf, 0, sizeof(g_usart6_rx_buf));
68 g_rx_lock = 0;
69 return 0;
70 }
71
72 for(i=0; i < g_usart6_rx_cnt - 1; i++)
73 {
74 if(g_usart6_rx_buf[i] == FR_PACKET_HEAD_0 && g_usart6_rx_buf[i+1] == FR_PACKET_HEAD_1)
75 {
76 break;
77 }
78 }
79 if(i >= g_usart6_rx_cnt - 1)
80 {
81 g_usart6_rx_cnt = 0;
82 g_usart6_rx_end = 0;
83 memset((void*)g_usart6_rx_buf, 0, sizeof(g_usart6_rx_buf));
84 g_rx_lock = 0;
85 return 0;
86 }
87 if(g_usart6_rx_cnt < i + FR_PACKET_MIN_LEN)
88 {
89 g_rx_lock = 0;
90 return 0;
91 }
92 data_len = (g_usart6_rx_buf[i+3] << 8) | g_usart6_rx_buf[i+4];
93 total_len = 6 + data_len;
94 if(total_len > FR_MAX_PACKET_LEN || total_len < FR_PACKET_MIN_LEN)
95 {
96 g_usart6_rx_cnt = 0;
97 g_usart6_rx_end = 0;
98 memset((void*)g_usart6_rx_buf, 0, sizeof(g_usart6_rx_buf));
99 g_rx_lock = 0;
100 return 0;
101 }
102 if(g_usart6_rx_cnt < i + total_len)
103 {
104 g_rx_lock = 0;
105 return 0;
106 }
107 if(total_len > max_len) total_len = max_len;
108 memcpy(out_buf, (uint8_t*)&g_usart6_rx_buf[i], total_len);
109 memmove((uint8_t*)&g_usart6_rx_buf[0], (uint8_t*)&g_usart6_rx_buf[i+total_len], g_usart6_rx_cnt - i - total_len);
110 g_usart6_rx_cnt -= (i + total_len);
111 g_usart6_rx_end = 0;
112 g_rx_lock = 0;
113 return total_len;
114}
115
116static uint8_t bcc_check(uint8_t *buf, uint32_t len)
117{
118 uint8_t check_sum = 0;
119 uint32_t i;
120 for(i=0; i<len; i++)
121 check_sum ^= buf[i];
122 return check_sum;
123}
124
125static void tim3_init(void)
126{
127 RCC_APB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB1Periph_TIM3, ENABLE);
128 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_Period = 10000/100-1;
129 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_Prescaler = 8400-1;
130 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_ClockDivision = 0;
131 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_CounterMode = TIM_CounterMode_Up;
132 TIM_TimeBaseInit(TIM3, &TIM_TimeBaseStructure);
133 TIM_ITConfig(TIM3,TIM_IT_Update,ENABLE);
134 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannel = TIM3_IRQn;
135 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelPreemptionPriority = 1;
136 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelSubPriority = 1;
137 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelCmd=ENABLE;
138 NVIC_Init(&NVIC_InitStructure);
139 TIM_Cmd(TIM3, DISABLE);
140}
141
142static void fr_reply_info(uint8_t reply)
143{
144#if FR_DEBUG_EN
145 if(reply==0)printf("[模块反馈] 操作成功\r\n");
146 if(reply==1)printf("[模块反馈] 模组拒绝该命令\r\n");
147 if(reply==2)printf("[模块反馈] 录入/匹配已终止\r\n");
148 if(reply==3)printf("[模块反馈] 发送消息错误\r\n");
149 if(reply==4)printf("[模块反馈] 相机打开失败\r\n");
150 if(reply==5)printf("[模块反馈] 未知错误\r\n");
151 if(reply==6)printf("[模块反馈] 无效的参数\r\n");
152 if(reply==7)printf("[模块反馈] 内存不足\r\n");
153 if(reply==8)printf("[模块反馈] 没有已录入的用户\r\n");
154 if(reply==9)printf("[模块反馈] 录入超过最大用户数量\r\n");
155 if(reply==10)printf("[模块反馈] 人脸已录入\r\n");
156 if(reply==12)printf("[模块反馈] 活体检测失败\r\n");
157 if(reply==13)printf("[模块反馈] 录入或解锁超时\r\n");
158 if(reply==14)printf("[模块反馈] 加密芯片授权失败\r\n");
159#else
160 (void)reply;
161#endif
162}
163
164static void fr_note_info(uint8_t note)
165{
166 if(note == last_note) return;
167 last_note = note;
168#if FR_DEBUG_EN
169 if(note==0)printf("[录入提示] 人脸正常，正在采集...\r\n");
170 if(note==1)printf("[录入提示] 未检测到人脸，请正对摄像头\r\n");
171 if(note==2)printf("[录入提示] 人脸太靠上，请下移\r\n");
172 if(note==3)printf("[录入提示] 人脸太靠下，请上移\r\n");
173 if(note==4)printf("[录入提示] 人脸太靠左，请右移\r\n");
174 if(note==5)printf("[录入提示] 人脸太靠右，请左移\r\n");
175 if(note==6)printf("[录入提示] 人脸太远，请靠近（0.4-1米）\r\n");
176 if(note==7)printf("[录入提示] 人脸太近，请后退\r\n");
177 if(note==8)printf("[录入提示] 眉毛被遮挡，请露出眉毛\r\n");
178 if(note==9)printf("[录入提示] 眼睛被遮挡，请露出眼睛\r\n");
179 if(note==10)printf("[录入提示] 脸部被遮挡，请露出完整脸部\r\n");
180 if(note==11)printf("[录入提示] 请正对摄像头，不要侧脸\r\n");
181#else
182 (void)note;
183#endif
184}
185
186void fr_send(uint8_t *buf, uint32_t len)
187{
188 uint8_t *p = buf;
189 g_rx_lock = 1;
190 g_usart6_rx_end = 0;
191 g_usart6_rx_cnt = 0;
192 last_note = 0xFF;
193 memset((void *)g_usart6_rx_buf, 0, sizeof(g_usart6_rx_buf));
194 g_rx_lock = 0;
195 while(len--)
196 {
197 USART_SendData(USART6, *p++);
198 while(!USART_GetFlagStatus(USART6, USART_FLAG_TXE));
199 USART_ClearFlag(USART6, USART_FLAG_TXE);
200 }
201}
202
203// 【修复】增加强制退出机制，杜绝死循环卡死
204int32_t fr_reg_user(const char *name, uint8_t is_admin)
205{
206 uint8_t buf_tx[64] = {0};
207 uint8_t packet_buf[FR_MAX_PACKET_LEN] = {0};
208 uint32_t packet_len = 0;
209 uint32_t timeout = 0;
210 uint32_t retry_cnt = 0;
211
212 printf("\r\n==================== 人脸录入开始 ====================\r\n");
213 printf("请将人脸正对摄像头，保持0.4-1米距离，超时时间15秒\r\n");
214
215 buf_tx[0] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_0;
216 buf_tx[1] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_1;
217 buf_tx[2] = 0x1D;
218 buf_tx[3] = 0x00;
219 buf_tx[4] = 0x23;
220 buf_tx[5] = is_admin;
221 if(name != NULL)
222 memcpy(&buf_tx[6], name, strlen(name));
223 buf_tx[38] = 0x00;
224 buf_tx[39] = 0x0A;
225 buf_tx[40] = bcc_check(&buf_tx[2], 38);
226 fr_send(buf_tx, 41);
227
228 while(1)
229 {
230 if(retry_cnt >= FR_REG_TIMEOUT_CNT)
231 {
232 printf("[人脸录入] 15秒超时，录入终止！\r\n");
233 beep_on();delay_ms(200);beep_off();delay_ms(100);beep_on();delay_ms(200);beep_off();
234 return -1;
235 }
236 retry_cnt++;
237 delay_ms(1);
238
239 timeout = 3000;
240 while(!g_usart6_rx_end && (--timeout)) delay_ms(1);
241 if(timeout == 0) continue;
242
243 packet_len = fr_parse_packet(packet_buf, sizeof(packet_buf));
244 if(packet_len == 0) continue;
245 fr_printf_recv(packet_buf, packet_len);
246
247 if(packet_buf[2] == 0)
248 {
249 uint8_t reply = packet_buf[6];
250 fr_reply_info(reply);
251 if(reply == 0)
252 {
253 printf("[人脸录入] 注册用户成功！\r\n");
254 beep_on();delay_ms(500);beep_off();
255 }
256 else
257 {
258 printf("[人脸录入] 注册用户失败！\r\n");
259 beep_on();delay_ms(200);beep_off();delay_ms(100);beep_on();delay_ms(200);beep_off();
260 }
261 return reply;
262 }
263 else if(packet_buf[2] == 1)
264 {
265 fr_note_info(packet_buf[6]);
266 continue;
267 }
268 }
269 return -1;
270}
271
272int32_t fr_match(uint8_t *buf)
273{
274 uint8_t buf_tx[8] = {0};
275 uint8_t packet_buf[FR_MAX_PACKET_LEN] = {0};
276 uint32_t packet_len = 0;
277 uint32_t timeout = 0;
278 uint32_t retry_cnt = 0;
279
280 printf("\r\n==================== 人脸匹配开始 ====================\r\n");
281 printf("请将人脸正对摄像头\r\n");
282
283 buf_tx[0] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_0;
284 buf_tx[1] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_1;
285 buf_tx[2] = 0x12;
286 buf_tx[3] = 0x00;
287 buf_tx[4] = 0x02;
288 buf_tx[5] = 0x01;
289 buf_tx[6] = 0x0A;
290 buf_tx[7] = bcc_check(&buf_tx[2], 5);
291 fr_send(buf_tx, 8);
292
293 while(1)
294 {
295 if(retry_cnt >= FR_MATCH_TIMEOUT_CNT)
296 {
297 return -1;
298 }
299 retry_cnt++;
300 delay_ms(1);
301
302 timeout = 3000;
303 while(!g_usart6_rx_end && (--timeout)) delay_ms(1);
304 if(timeout == 0) continue;
305
306 packet_len = fr_parse_packet(packet_buf, sizeof(packet_buf));
307 if(packet_len == 0) continue;
308 fr_printf_recv(packet_buf, packet_len);
309
310 if(packet_buf[2] == 1)
311 {
312 uint8_t note = packet_buf[6];
313 if(note == 1) printf("[匹配提示] 未检测到人脸\r\n");
314 else fr_note_info(note);
315 continue;
316 }
317 else if(packet_buf[2] == 0)
318 {
319 uint8_t reply = packet_buf[6];
320 fr_reply_info(reply);
321 if(reply != 0)
322 {
323 printf("[人脸匹配] 匹配失败！\r\n");
324 return reply;
325 }
326 if(buf != NULL) memcpy(buf, &packet_buf[7], 36);
327 printf("[人脸匹配] 匹配成功！\r\n");
328 return 0;
329 }
330 }
331 return -1;
332}
333
334int32_t fr_del_user_all(void)
335{
336 uint8_t buf_tx[8] = {0};
337 uint8_t packet_buf[FR_MAX_PACKET_LEN] = {0};
338 uint32_t packet_len = 0;
339 uint32_t timeout = 3000;
340
341 buf_tx[0] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_0;
342 buf_tx[1] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_1;
343 buf_tx[2] = 0x21;
344 buf_tx[3] = 0x00;
345 buf_tx[4] = 0x00;
346 buf_tx[5] = 0x21;
347 fr_send(buf_tx, 6);
348
349 while(!g_usart6_rx_end && (--timeout)) delay_ms(1);
350 if(timeout == 0) return -1;
351 packet_len = fr_parse_packet(packet_buf, sizeof(packet_buf));
352 if(packet_len == 0) return -1;
353 fr_printf_recv(packet_buf, packet_len);
354 if(packet_buf[5] == 0x21)
355 {
356 if(packet_buf[2]==0) fr_reply_info(packet_buf[6]);
357 return packet_buf[6];
358 }
359 return -1;
360}
361
362int32_t fr_get_user_total(void)
363{
364 int32_t user_total = 0;
365 uint8_t packet_buf[FR_MAX_PACKET_LEN] = {0};
366 uint32_t packet_len = 0;
367 uint32_t timeout = 4000;
368 uint8_t buf_tx[6] = {0};
369
370 buf_tx[0] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_0;
371 buf_tx[1] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_1;
372 buf_tx[2] = 0x24;
373 buf_tx[3] = 0x00;
374 buf_tx[4] = 0x00;
375 buf_tx[5] = 0x24;
376 fr_send(buf_tx, 6);
377
378 while(!g_usart6_rx_end && (--timeout)) delay_ms(1);
379 if(timeout == 0) return -1;
380 packet_len = fr_parse_packet(packet_buf, sizeof(packet_buf));
381 if(packet_len == 0) return -1;
382 fr_printf_recv(packet_buf, packet_len);
383 if((packet_buf[2]==0) && (packet_buf[5]==0x24) && (packet_buf[6]==0))
384 {
385 user_total = packet_buf[7];
386 return user_total;
387 }
388 return 0;
389}
390
391int32_t fr_reset(void)
392{
393 uint8_t buf_tx[6] = {0};
394 uint8_t packet_buf[FR_MAX_PACKET_LEN] = {0};
395 uint32_t packet_len = 0;
396 uint32_t timeout = 4000;
397
398 buf_tx[0] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_0;
399 buf_tx[1] = FR_PACKET_HEAD_1;
400 buf_tx[2] = 0x10;
401 buf_tx[3] = 0x00;
402 buf_tx[4] = 0x00;
403 buf_tx[5] = 0x10;
404 fr_send(buf_tx, 6);
405
406 while(!g_usart6_rx_end && (--timeout)) delay_ms(1);
407 if(timeout == 0) return -1;
408 packet_len = fr_parse_packet(packet_buf, sizeof(packet_buf));
409 if(packet_len == 0) return -1;
410 fr_printf_recv(packet_buf, packet_len);
411 if((packet_buf[2]==0) && (packet_buf[5]==0x10) && (packet_buf[6]==0x00))
412 {
413 return 0;
414 }
415 return -1;
416}
417
418int32_t fr_init(uint32_t baud)
419{
420 tim3_init();
421 usart6_init(baud);
422 delay_ms(500);
423 return fr_reset();
424}
425
426void TIM3_IRQHandler(void)
427{
428 if(TIM_GetITStatus(TIM3, TIM_IT_Update) == SET)
429 {
430 if(g_rx_lock == 0)
431 {
432 g_usart6_rx_end = 1;
433 }
434 TIM_Cmd(TIM3, DISABLE);
435 TIM_ClearITPendingBit(TIM3, TIM_IT_Update);
436 }
437}
438
439int32_t fr_entry_standby(void) { return 0; }
440int32_t fr_state_get(void) { return 0; }
441int32_t fr_power_down(void) { return 0; }
442
443// 新增：人脸按键处理函数（迁移自main.c的while(1)）
444int32_t fr_process_face_key(uint8_t *face_key_sta, uint8_t *buf)
445{
446 if(face_key_sta == NULL || buf == NULL)
447 {
448 printf("[人脸识别模块] 参数错误！\r\n");
449 return -1;
450 }
451
452 /* 添加人脸 */
453 if((*face_key_sta) & 0x01)
454 {
455 __set_PRIMASK(1); // 关中断，保护标志位
456 (*face_key_sta) &= ~0x01;
457 __set_PRIMASK(0); // 开中断
458
459 printf("\r\n\r\n=====================================\r\n\r\n");
460 printf("[人脸识别模块] 执行人脸添加操作,请将脸部对准摄像头区，距离 0.4m ~ 1m \r\n");
461
462 if(0 == fr_reg_user(NULL,0))
463 {
464 printf("[人脸识别模块] 注册用户成功!\r\n");
465 beep_on();delay_ms(100);beep_off();
466 }
467 else
468 {
469 printf("[人脸识别模块] 注册用户失败!\r\n");
470 }
471 (*face_key_sta) = 0;
472 }
473
474 /* 刷人脸 */
475 if((*face_key_sta) & 0x02)
476 {
477 __set_PRIMASK(1);
478 (*face_key_sta) &= ~0x02;
479 __set_PRIMASK(0);
480
481 printf("\r\n\r\n=====================================\r\n\r\n");
482 printf("执行人脸匹配操作,请将脸部对准摄像头区，距离 0.4m ~ 1m \r\n");
483
484 if(0 == fr_match(buf))
485 {
486 printf("[人脸识别模块] 人脸匹配成功!\r\n");
487 SmartLock_ShowScanning();
488 SmartLock_ShowWelcome();
489 Lock_Set_Relay(1);
490 beep_on();
491 delay_s(1);
492 beep_off();
493 delay_s(2);
494 Lock_Set_Relay(0);
495 SmartLock_ShowBootScreen();
496 }
497 else
498 {
499 printf("[人脸识别模块] 人脸匹配失败!\r\n");
500 }
501 (*face_key_sta) = 0;
502 }
503
504 /* 删除所有用户 */
505 if((*face_key_sta) & 0x08)
506 {
507 __set_PRIMASK(1);
508 (*face_key_sta) &= ~0x08;
509 __set_PRIMASK(0);
510
511 printf("\r\n\r\n=====================================\r\n\r\n");
512 if(0 == fr_del_user_all())
513 {
514 printf("[人脸识别模块] 删除所有用户成功!\r\n");
515 beep_on();delay_ms(100);beep_off();
516 }
517 else
518 {
519 printf("[人脸识别模块] 删除所有用户失败!\r\n");
520 }
521 (*face_key_sta) = 0;
522 }
523
524 return 0;
525}

2#define __FM225_H__

9extern int32_t fr_entry_standby(void);
10extern int32_t fr_del_user_all(void);
11extern int32_t fr_get_user_total(void);
12extern int32_t fr_match(uint8_t *buf);
13extern int32_t fr_power_down(void);
14extern int32_t fr_reg_user(const char *name,uint8_t is_admin);
