101
1#include "pwm.h"
2
3/************************************
4引脚连接说明
5LED0连接在PF9,低电平灯亮；高电平，灯灭
6TIM14_CH1(TIM14 -- APB1 16位 84MHZ)
7*************************************/
8void Pwm_PF9_Init(void)
9{
10 TIM_TimeBaseInitTypeDef TIM_TimeBaseStructure;
11 TIM_OCInitTypeDef TIM_OCInitStructure;
12 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
13
14
15 //使能定时器14
16 RCC_APB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB1Periph_TIM14, ENABLE);
17
18 //使能GPIOF组时钟
19 RCC_AHB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_AHB1Periph_GPIOF, ENABLE);
20
21
22 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_9;
23 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_AF; //复用模式
24 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_25MHz;
25 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_OType = GPIO_OType_PP;
26 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_PuPd = GPIO_PuPd_UP ;
27 GPIO_Init(GPIOF, &GPIO_InitStructure);
28
29 //引脚映射 选定引脚与外设关系
30 GPIO_PinAFConfig(GPIOF, GPIO_PinSource9, GPIO_AF_TIM14);
31
32
33
34 /* Time base configuration */
35 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_Period = (1000-1); //Period(ARR)
36 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_Prescaler = 83; //84分频 1MHZ
37 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_ClockDivision = 0;
38 TIM_TimeBaseStructure.TIM_CounterMode = TIM_CounterMode_Up;
39
40 TIM_TimeBaseInit(TIM14, &TIM_TimeBaseStructure);
41
42 /* PWM1 Mode configuration: Channel1 */
43 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OCMode = TIM_OCMode_PWM1; //模式1
44 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OutputState = TIM_OutputState_Enable;
45 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_Pulse = 0; //捕获/比较器的初始值
46 TIM_OCInitStructure.TIM_OCPolarity = TIM_OCPolarity_Low;//输出极性，这里设置为低
47 //通道1对应的是OC1
48 TIM_OC1Init(TIM14, &TIM_OCInitStructure);
49
50 //使能预装载寄存器：
51 TIM_OC1PreloadConfig(TIM14, TIM_OCPreload_Enable);
52
53 //使能自动重装载的预装载寄存器允许位
54 TIM_ARRPreloadConfig(TIM14, ENABLE);
55
56 /* TIM3 enable counter */
57 TIM_Cmd(TIM14, ENABLE);
58
59
60}
61
62/************************************
63引脚连接说明
64开锁控制：
65PA8: 继电器控制引脚，默认输出低电平(0)，开锁时输出高电平(1)
66*************************************/
67void Lock_Relay_Init(void)
68{
69 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
70
71 // 使能 GPIOA 组时钟
72 RCC_AHB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_AHB1Periph_GPIOA, ENABLE);
73
74 // 初始化 PA8 为普通推挽输出 (常态低电平)
75 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_8;
76 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_OUT;
77 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
78 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_OType = GPIO_OType_PP;
79 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_PuPd = GPIO_PuPd_DOWN; // 下拉，确保上电瞬间为低
80 GPIO_Init(GPIOA, &GPIO_InitStructure);
81
82 // 默认初始值为 0 (关锁)
83 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOA, GPIO_Pin_8);
84}
85
86// 设置继电器状态 (1: 高电平开锁, 0: 低电平关锁)
87void Lock_Set_Relay(uint8_t state)
88{
89 if(state == 1)
90 {
91 GPIO_SetBits(GPIOA, GPIO_Pin_8); // 输出高电平
92 }
93 else
94 {
95 GPIO_ResetBits(GPIOA, GPIO_Pin_8); // 输出低电平
96 }
97}
1#ifndef __PWM_H
2#define __PWM_H
3
4#include "stm32f4xx.h"
5
6void Pwm_PF9_Init(void);
7void Lock_Relay_Init(void); // 初始化 PA8 继电器控制引脚
8void Lock_Set_Relay(uint8_t state); // 设置继电器状态 (1:开锁, 0:关锁)
9
10
11#endif
12
1#include "rc522.h"
2#include "delay.h"
3#include "zhi.h"
4#include "led.h"
5#include "bt_hc05.h"
6#include "stdio.h"
7
8// 外部函数声明（复用开锁/显示）
9extern void SmartLock_ShowWelcome(void);
10extern void SmartLock_ShowDenied(void);
11extern void SmartLock_ShowBootScreen(void);
12extern void Lock_Set_Relay(uint8_t sta);
13
14// ==================== 门卡存储（FLASH永久保存） ====================
15uint8_t g_enroll_card_mode = 0; // 录入模式
16uint8_t Auto_Card_Flag = 1; // 开机默认启动自动寻卡
17static uint8_t card_list[MAX_CARD_NUM][CARD_LEN]; // 卡号数组
18static uint8_t card_cnt = 0; // 已录入数量
19
20// SPI底层（不变）
21static uint8_t RC522_SPI_RW(uint8_t byte)
22{
23 uint8_t i, res = 0;
24 for(i=0; i<8; i++)
25 {
26 GPIO_ResetBits(RC522_SCK_PORT, RC522_SCK_PIN);
27 delay_us(5);
28
29 if(byte & 0x80)
30 {
31 GPIO_SetBits(RC522_MOSI_PORT, RC522_MOSI_PIN);
32 }
33 else
34 {
35 GPIO_ResetBits(RC522_MOSI_PORT, RC522_MOSI_PIN);
36 }
37
38 byte <<= 1;
39 delay_us(5);
40 GPIO_SetBits(RC522_SCK_PORT, RC522_SCK_PIN);
41 delay_us(5);
42 res <<= 1;
43 if(GPIO_ReadInputDataBit(RC522_MISO_PORT, RC522_MISO_PIN))
44 {
45 res |= 1;
46 }
47 delay_us(5);
48 }
49 return res;
50}
51
52void RC522_WriteReg(uint8_t addr, uint8_t data)
53{
54 RC522_CS_LOW();
55 RC522_SPI_RW((addr << 1) & 0x7E);
56 RC522_SPI_RW(data);
57 RC522_CS_HIGH();
58}
59
60uint8_t RC522_ReadReg(uint8_t addr)
61{
62 uint8_t data;
63 RC522_CS_LOW();
64 RC522_SPI_RW(((addr << 1) & 0x7E) | 0x80);
65 data = RC522_SPI_RW(0xFF);
66 RC522_CS_HIGH();
67 return data;
68}
69
70static void RC522_SetBit(uint8_t addr, uint8_t mask)
71{
72 RC522_WriteReg(addr, RC522_ReadReg(addr) | mask);
73}
74
75static void RC522_ClearBit(uint8_t addr, uint8_t mask)
76{
77 RC522_WriteReg(addr, RC522_ReadReg(addr) & ~mask);
78}
79
80void RC522_Hard_Reset(void)
81{
82 RC522_RST_LOW();
83 delay_ms(10);
84 RC522_RST_HIGH();
85 delay_ms(10);
86}
87
88void RC522_AntennaOn(void)
89{
90 uint8_t temp=RC522_ReadReg(0x14);
91 if((temp&3)!=3)
92 {
93 RC522_WriteReg(0x14,temp|3);
94 }
95}
96
97void RC522_AntennaOff(void)
98{
99 uint8_t temp=RC522_ReadReg(0x14);
100 RC522_WriteReg(0x14,temp&~3);
101}
102
103// RC522初始化（不变）
104void RC522_Init(void)
105{
106 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
107 RCC_AHB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_AHB1Periph_GPIOB|RCC_AHB1Periph_GPIOG, ENABLE);
108
109 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode=GPIO_Mode_OUT;
110 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_OType=GPIO_OType_PP;
111 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed=GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
112 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_PuPd=GPIO_PuPd_NOPULL;
113 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin=RC522_SCK_PIN|RC522_MOSI_PIN;
114 GPIO_Init(RC522_SCK_PORT,&GPIO_InitStructure);
115
116 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin=RC522_CS_PIN|RC522_RST_PIN;
117 GPIO_Init(RC522_CS_PORT,&GPIO_InitStructure);
118
119 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode=GPIO_Mode_IN;
120 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_PuPd=GPIO_PuPd_UP;
121 GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin=RC522_MISO_PIN;
122 GPIO_Init(RC522_MISO_PORT,&GPIO_InitStructure);
123
124 RC522_CS_HIGH();
125 RC522_RST_HIGH();
126 delay_ms(10);
127
128 RC522_Hard_Reset();
129 RC522_WriteReg(0x01,PCD_RESETPHASE);
130 delay_ms(10);
131
132 RC522_WriteReg(0x2A,0x80);
133 RC522_WriteReg(0x2B,0xA9);
134 RC522_WriteReg(0x2C,0x00);
135 RC522_WriteReg(0x2D,0x30);
136 RC522_WriteReg(0x15,0x40);
137 RC522_WriteReg(0x11,0x3D);
138 RC522_WriteReg(0x14,0x83);
139 RC522_WriteReg(0x26,0x7F);
140 RC522_WriteReg(0x12,0x00);
141 RC522_WriteReg(0x13,0x00);
142 RC522_AntennaOn();
143 delay_ms(10);
144
145 RC522_Flash_LoadCard(); // 开机自动加载FLASH里的卡号
146 printf("已加载%d张门卡\r\n", card_cnt);
147}
148
149// 通信底层（不变）
150static uint8_t RC522_Transceive(uint8_t *sendData,uint8_t sendLen,uint8_t *recvData,uint16_t *recvBits)
151{
152 uint8_t status=1,n;
153 uint32_t timeout=100000;
154
155 RC522_WriteReg(0x02,0x77|0x80);
156 RC522_WriteReg(0x04,0x7F);
157 RC522_SetBit(0x0A,0x80);
158 RC522_WriteReg(0x01,PCD_IDLE);
159
160 for(n=0;n<sendLen;n++)
161 {
162 RC522_WriteReg(0x09,sendData[n]);
163 }
164
165 RC522_WriteReg(0x01,PCD_TRANSCEIVE);
166 RC522_SetBit(0x0D,0x80);
167
168 while(timeout--)
169 {
170 n=RC522_ReadReg(0x04);
171 if(n&0x30)
172 {
173 status=0;
174 break;
175 }
176 if(n&1)
177 {
178 break;
179 }
180 }
181 RC522_ClearBit(0x0D,0x80);
182 if(status==0)
183 {
184 n=RC522_ReadReg(0x06);
185 if(n&0x1B)
186 {
187 status=2;
188 }
189 else
190 {
191 n=RC522_ReadReg(0x0A);
192 uint8_t lb=RC522_ReadReg(0x0C)&7;
193 *recvBits=lb?(n-1)*8+lb:n*8;
194
195 if(n==0)
196 {
197 n=1;
198 }
199 if(n>16)
200 {
201 n=16;
202 }
203
204 for(uint8_t i=0;i<n;i++)
205 {
206 recvData[i]=RC522_ReadReg(0x09);
207 }
208 }
209 }
210 return status;
211}
212
213uint8_t RC522_Request(uint8_t reqCode,uint8_t *cardType)
214{
215 uint8_t status;
216 uint16_t rb;
217 uint8_t sb[2],rbuff[2];
218 RC522_WriteReg(0x0D,0x07);
219 sb[0]=reqCode;
220
221 status=RC522_Transceive(sb,1,rbuff,&rb);
222
223 if(status==0&&rb==16)
224 {
225 cardType[0]=rbuff[0];
226 cardType[1]=rbuff[1];
227 }
228 else
229 {
230 status=1;
231 }
232 RC522_WriteReg(0x0D,0x00);
233 return status;
234}
235
236uint8_t RC522_Anticoll(uint8_t *sn)
237{
238 uint8_t status,i,chk=0;
239 uint16_t rb;
240 uint8_t sb[7],rbuff[7];
241 sb[0]=PICC_ANTICOLL;
242 sb[1]=0x20;
243 status=RC522_Transceive(sb,2,rbuff,&rb);
244
245 if(status||rb!=40)
246 {
247 return 1;
248 }
249
250 for(i=0;i<4;i++)
251 {
252 sn[i]=rbuff[i];
253 chk^=rbuff[i];
254 }
255 return chk!=rbuff[4]?3:0;
256}
257
258// ==================== FLASH读写（掉电保存） ====================
259// 从FLASH加载卡号
260void RC522_Flash_LoadCard(void)
261{
262 uint8_t *p = (uint8_t*)FLASH_SAVE_ADDR;
263 card_cnt = p[0];
264 if(card_cnt > MAX_CARD_NUM)
265 {
266 card_cnt = 0;
267 }
268 for(uint8_t i=0; i<card_cnt; i++)
269 {
270 memcpy(card_list[i], p+1+i*CARD_LEN, CARD_LEN);
271 }
272}
273
274// 保存卡号到FLASH
275void RC522_Flash_SaveCard(void)
276{
277 FLASH_Unlock();
278 FLASH_ClearFlag(FLASH_FLAG_EOP|FLASH_FLAG_OPERR|FLASH_FLAG_WRPERR);
279 FLASH_EraseSector(FLASH_Sector_11, VoltageRange_3); // 擦除扇区
280
281 uint8_t buf[1+MAX_CARD_NUM*CARD_LEN] = {0};
282 buf[0] = card_cnt;
283 for(uint8_t i=0; i<card_cnt; i++)
284 {
285 memcpy(buf+1+i*CARD_LEN, card_list[i], CARD_LEN);
286 }
287
288 for(uint32_t i=0; i<sizeof(buf); i++)
289 {
290 FLASH_ProgramByte(FLASH_SAVE_ADDR+i, buf[i]);
291 }
292 FLASH_Lock();
293}
294
295// 检查卡号是否已存在
296static uint8_t RC522_CheckExist(uint8_t *sn)
297{
298 for(uint8_t i=0; i<card_cnt; i++)
299 {
300 if(memcmp(card_list[i], sn, CARD_LEN)==0)
301 {
302 return 1;
303 }
304 }
305 return 0;
306}
307
308// 录入卡号
309static uint8_t RC522_AddCard(uint8_t *sn)
310{
311 if(card_cnt >= MAX_CARD_NUM)
312 {
313 return 2;
314 }
315 if(RC522_CheckExist(sn))
316 {
317 return 1;
318 }
319 memcpy(card_list[card_cnt], sn, CARD_LEN);
320 card_cnt++;
321 RC522_Flash_SaveCard(); // 写入FLASH永久保存
322 return 0;
323}
324
325// 新增：删除所有门卡
326void RC522_DeleteAllCard(void)
327{
328 card_cnt = 0; // 清空卡计数
329 memset(card_list, 0, sizeof(card_list)); // 清空卡号列表
330 RC522_Flash_SaveCard(); // 同步到FLASH
331 printf("=== 【提示】所有门卡已删除！ ===\r\n");
332}
333
334// ==================== 核心：卡处理逻辑 ====================
335void RC522_Card_Process(void)
336{
337 uint8_t cardSN[4], cardType[2];
338 static uint32_t delay_cnt = 0;
339 if(++delay_cnt < 10)
340 {
341 return; // 10ms轮询，防卡死
342 }
343 delay_cnt = 0;
344
345 // 1. 按键27录入模式
346 if(g_enroll_card_mode)
347 {
348 if(RC522_Request(PICC_REQIDL, cardType)==0 && RC522_Anticoll(cardSN)==0)
349 {
350 printf("录入卡号：%02X%02X%02X%02X\r\n",cardSN[0],cardSN[1],cardSN[2],cardSN[3]);
351 uint8_t res = RC522_AddCard(cardSN);
352 if(res==0)
353 {
354 printf("录入成功！共%d张\r\n",card_cnt);
355 Finger_Led(2);
356 Auto_Card_Flag = 1; // 录入成功后切回自动寻卡模式
357 printf("自动寻卡模式已恢复\r\n");
358 }
359 else if(res==1)
360 {
361 printf("卡号已存在\r\n");
362 Finger_Led(1);
363 }
364 else if(res==2)
365 {
366 printf("卡数量已满\r\n");
367 Finger_Led(1);
368 }
369 g_enroll_card_mode = 0;
370 delay_ms(1000);
371 Finger_Led(4);
372 }
373 }
374 // 2. 自动寻卡验证模式（开机默认启动）
375 else if(Auto_Card_Flag)
376 {
377 if(RC522_Request(PICC_REQIDL, cardType)==0 && RC522_Anticoll(cardSN)==0)
378 {
379 printf("验证卡号：%02X%02X%02X%02X\r\n",cardSN[0],cardSN[1],cardSN[2],cardSN[3]);
380 if(RC522_CheckExist(cardSN))
381 {
382 printf("验证通过，开锁！\r\n");
383 SmartLock_ShowWelcome();
384 Finger_Led(2);
385 Lock_Set_Relay(1);
386 delay_s(3);
387 Lock_Set_Relay(0);
388 SmartLock_ShowBootScreen();
389 }
390 else
391 {
392 printf("未录入，拒绝开锁\r\n");
393 SmartLock_ShowDenied();
394 Finger_Led(1);
395 delay_ms(2000);
396 SmartLock_ShowBootScreen();
397 }
398 Finger_Led(4);
399 delay_ms(1000);
400 }
401 }
402}
1#ifndef __RC522_H
2#define __RC522_H
3#include "stm32f4xx.h"
4#include "string.h"
5
6// RC522���Ŷ��壨���䣩
7#define RC522_SCK_PORT GPIOB
8#define RC522_SCK_PIN GPIO_Pin_3
9#define RC522_MOSI_PORT GPIOB
10#define RC522_MOSI_PIN GPIO_Pin_5
11#define RC522_MISO_PORT GPIOB
12#define RC522_MISO_PIN GPIO_Pin_4
13#define RC522_CS_PORT GPIOG
14#define RC522_CS_PIN GPIO_Pin_7
15#define RC522_RST_PORT GPIOG
16#define RC522_RST_PIN GPIO_Pin_6
17
18#define RC522_CS_LOW() GPIO_ResetBits(RC522_CS_PORT, RC522_CS_PIN)
19#define RC522_CS_HIGH() GPIO_SetBits(RC522_CS_PORT, RC522_CS_PIN)
20#define RC522_RST_LOW() GPIO_ResetBits(RC522_RST_PORT, RC522_RST_PIN)
21#define RC522_RST_HIGH() GPIO_SetBits(RC522_RST_PORT, RC522_RST_PIN)
22
23// ָ��壨���䣩
24#define PCD_IDLE 0x00
25#define PCD_AUTHENT 0x0E
26#define PCD_RECEIVE 0x08
27#define PCD_TRANSMIT 0x04
28#define PCD_TRANSCEIVE 0x0C
29#define PCD_RESETPHASE 0x0F
30#define PCD_CALCCRC 0x03
31#define PICC_REQIDL 0x26
32#define PICC_REQALL 0x52
33#define PICC_ANTICOLL 0x93
34#define PICC_SELECTTAG 0x93
35#define PICC_AUTHENT1A 0x60
36#define PICC_READ 0x30
37#define PICC_WRITE 0xA0
38#define S50_BLOCK_ADDR 4
39
40// �ſ��洢+FLASH���ã����䣩
41#define MAX_CARD_NUM 10 // ���10�ſ�
42#define CARD_LEN 4 // ÿ�ſ�4�ֽ�
43#define FLASH_SAVE_ADDR 0x080E0000 // F407 FLASH�洢��ַ
44
45// ȫ�ֱ�־��main/key���ã�
46extern uint8_t g_enroll_card_mode; // ¼��ģʽ��־
47extern uint8_t Auto_Card_Flag; // PE4��֤ģʽ��־
48
49// ��������������ɾ�����п�������
50void RC522_Init(void);
51void RC522_Hard_Reset(void);
52uint8_t RC522_Request(uint8_t reqCode, uint8_t *cardType);
53uint8_t RC522_Anticoll(uint8_t *sn);
54void RC522_Card_Process(void);
55void RC522_Flash_LoadCard(void);
56void RC522_Flash_SaveCard(void);
57void RC522_DeleteAllCard(void); // ������ɾ�������ſ�
58
59#endif
1#include "ssd1306.h"
2#include <math.h>
3#include <stdlib.h>
4#include <string.h> // For memcpy
5
6#if defined(SSD1306_USE_I2C)
7
8void ssd1306_Reset(void) {
9 /* for I2C - do nothing */
10}
11
12// Send a byte to the command register
13void ssd1306_WriteCommand(uint8_t byte) {
14 HAL_I2C_Mem_Write(&SSD1306_I2C_PORT, SSD1306_I2C_ADDR, 0x00, 1, &byte, 1, HAL_MAX_DELAY);
15}
16
17// Send data
18void ssd1306_WriteData(uint8_t* buffer, size_t buff_size) {
19 HAL_I2C_Mem_Write(&SSD1306_I2C_PORT, SSD1306_I2C_ADDR, 0x40, 1, buffer, buff_size, HAL_MAX_DELAY);
20}
21
22#elif defined(SSD1306_USE_SPI)
23
24void ssd1306_Reset(void) {
25 // CS = High (not selected)
26 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_CS_Port, SSD1306_CS_Pin, GPIO_PIN_SET);
27
28 // Reset the OLED
29 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_Reset_Port, SSD1306_Reset_Pin, GPIO_PIN_RESET);
30 HAL_Delay(10);
31 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_Reset_Port, SSD1306_Reset_Pin, GPIO_PIN_SET);
32 HAL_Delay(10);
33}
34
35// Send a byte to the command register
36void ssd1306_WriteCommand(uint8_t byte) {
37 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_CS_Port, SSD1306_CS_Pin, GPIO_PIN_RESET); // select OLED
38 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_DC_Port, SSD1306_DC_Pin, GPIO_PIN_RESET); // command
39 HAL_SPI_Transmit(&SSD1306_SPI_PORT, (uint8_t *) &byte, 1, HAL_MAX_DELAY);
40 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_CS_Port, SSD1306_CS_Pin, GPIO_PIN_SET); // un-select OLED
41}
42
43// Send data
44void ssd1306_WriteData(uint8_t* buffer, size_t buff_size) {
45 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_CS_Port, SSD1306_CS_Pin, GPIO_PIN_RESET); // select OLED
46 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_DC_Port, SSD1306_DC_Pin, GPIO_PIN_SET); // data
47 HAL_SPI_Transmit(&SSD1306_SPI_PORT, buffer, buff_size, HAL_MAX_DELAY);
48 HAL_GPIO_WritePin(SSD1306_CS_Port, SSD1306_CS_Pin, GPIO_PIN_SET); // un-select OLED
49}
50
51#else
52#error "You should define SSD1306_USE_SPI or SSD1306_USE_I2C macro"
53#endif
54
55
56// Screenbuffer
57static uint8_t SSD1306_Buffer[SSD1306_BUFFER_SIZE];
58
59// Screen object
60static SSD1306_t SSD1306;
61
62/* Fills the Screenbuffer with values from a given buffer of a fixed length */
63SSD1306_Error_t ssd1306_FillBuffer(uint8_t* buf, uint32_t len) {
64 SSD1306_Error_t ret = SSD1306_ERR;
65 if (len <= SSD1306_BUFFER_SIZE) {
66 memcpy(SSD1306_Buffer,buf,len);
67 ret = SSD1306_OK;
68 }
69 return ret;
70}
71
72/* Initialize the oled screen */
73void ssd1306_Init(void) {
74 // Reset OLED
75 ssd1306_Reset();
76
77 // Wait for the screen to boot
78 HAL_Delay(100);
79
80 // Init OLED
81 ssd1306_SetDisplayOn(0); //display off
82
83 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x20); //Set Memory Addressing Mode
84 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x00); // 00b,Horizontal Addressing Mode; 01b,Vertical Addressing Mode;
85 // 10b,Page Addressing Mode (RESET); 11b,Invalid
86
87 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xB0); //Set Page Start Address for Page Addressing Mode,0-7
88
89#ifdef SSD1306_MIRROR_VERT
90 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xC0); // Mirror vertically
91#else
92 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xC8); //Set COM Output Scan Direction
93#endif
94
95 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x00); //---set low column address
96 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x10); //---set high column address
97
98 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x40); //--set start line address - CHECK
99
100 ssd1306_SetContrast(0xFF);
101
102#ifdef SSD1306_MIRROR_HORIZ
103 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xA0); // Mirror horizontally
104#else
105 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xA1); //--set segment re-map 0 to 127 - CHECK
106#endif
107
108#ifdef SSD1306_INVERSE_COLOR
109 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xA7); //--set inverse color
110#else
111 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xA6); //--set normal color
112#endif
113
114// Set multiplex ratio.
115#if (SSD1306_HEIGHT == 128)
116 // Found in the Luma Python lib for SH1106.
117 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xFF);
118#else
119 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xA8); //--set multiplex ratio(1 to 64) - CHECK
120#endif
121
122#if (SSD1306_HEIGHT == 32)
123 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x1F); //
124#elif (SSD1306_HEIGHT == 64)
125 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x3F); //
126#elif (SSD1306_HEIGHT == 128)
127 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x3F); // Seems to work for 128px high displays too.
128#else
129#error "Only 32, 64, or 128 lines of height are supported!"
130#endif
131
132 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xA4); //0xa4,Output follows RAM content;0xa5,Output ignores RAM content
133
134 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xD3); //-set display offset - CHECK
135 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x00); //-not offset
136
137 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xD5); //--set display clock divide ratio/oscillator frequency
138 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xF0); //--set divide ratio
139
140 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xD9); //--set pre-charge period
141 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x22); //
142
143 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xDA); //--set com pins hardware configuration - CHECK
144#if (SSD1306_HEIGHT == 32)
145 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x02);
146#elif (SSD1306_HEIGHT == 64)
147 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x12);
148#elif (SSD1306_HEIGHT == 128)
149 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x12);
150#else
151#error "Only 32, 64, or 128 lines of height are supported!"
152#endif
153
154 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xDB); //--set vcomh
155 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x20); //0x20,0.77xVcc
156
157 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x8D); //--set DC-DC enable
158 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x14); //
159 ssd1306_SetDisplayOn(1); //--turn on SSD1306 panel
160
161 // Clear screen
162 ssd1306_Fill(Black);
163
164 // Flush buffer to screen
165 ssd1306_UpdateScreen();
166
167 // Set default values for screen object
168 SSD1306.CurrentX = 0;
169 SSD1306.CurrentY = 0;
170
171 SSD1306.Initialized = 1;
172}
173
174/* Fill the whole screen with the given color */
175void ssd1306_Fill(SSD1306_COLOR color) {
176 memset(SSD1306_Buffer, (color == Black) ? 0x00 : 0xFF, sizeof(SSD1306_Buffer));
177}
178
179/* Write the screenbuffer with changed to the screen */
180void ssd1306_UpdateScreen(void) {
181 // Write data to each page of RAM. Number of pages
182 // depends on the screen height:
183 //
184 // * 32px == 4 pages
185 // * 64px == 8 pages
186 // * 128px == 16 pages
187 for(uint8_t i = 0; i < SSD1306_HEIGHT/8; i++) {
188 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0xB0 + i); // Set the current RAM page address.
189 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x00 + SSD1306_X_OFFSET_LOWER);
190 ssd1306_WriteCommand(0x10 + SSD1306_X_OFFSET_UPPER);
191 ssd1306_WriteData(&SSD1306_Buffer[SSD1306_WIDTH*i],SSD1306_WIDTH);
192 }
193}
194
195/*
196 * Draw one pixel in the screenbuffer
197 * X => X Coordinate
198 * Y => Y Coordinate
199 * color => Pixel color
200 */
201void ssd1306_DrawPixel(uint8_t x, uint8_t y, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
202 if(x >= SSD1306_WIDTH || y >= SSD1306_HEIGHT) {
203 // Don't write outside the buffer
204 return;
205 }
206
207 // Draw in the right color
208 if(color == White) {
209 SSD1306_Buffer[x + (y / 8) * SSD1306_WIDTH] |= 1 << (y % 8);
210 } else {
211 SSD1306_Buffer[x + (y / 8) * SSD1306_WIDTH] &= ~(1 << (y % 8));
212 }
213}
214
215/*
216 * Draw 1 char to the screen buffer
217 * ch => char om weg te schrijven
218 * Font => Font waarmee we gaan schrijven
219 * color => Black or White
220 */
221char ssd1306_WriteChar(char ch, SSD1306_Font_t Font, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
222 uint32_t i, b, j;
223
224 // Check if character is valid
225 if (ch < 32 || ch > 126)
226 return 0;
227
228 // Char width is not equal to font width for proportional font
229 const uint8_t char_width = Font.char_width ? Font.char_width[ch-32] : Font.width;
230 // Check remaining space on current line
231 if (SSD1306_WIDTH < (SSD1306.CurrentX + char_width) ||
232 SSD1306_HEIGHT < (SSD1306.CurrentY + Font.height))
233 {
234 // Not enough space on current line
235 return 0;
236 }
237
238 // Use the font to write
239 for(i = 0; i < Font.height; i++) {
240 b = Font.data[(ch - 32) * Font.height + i];
241 for(j = 0; j < char_width; j++) {
242 if((b << j) & 0x8000) {
243 ssd1306_DrawPixel(SSD1306.CurrentX + j, (SSD1306.CurrentY + i), (SSD1306_COLOR) color);
244 } else {
245 ssd1306_DrawPixel(SSD1306.CurrentX + j, (SSD1306.CurrentY + i), (SSD1306_COLOR)!color);
246 }
247 }
248 }
249
250 // The current space is now taken
251 SSD1306.CurrentX += char_width;
252
253 // Return written char for validation
254 return ch;
255}
256
257/* Write full string to screenbuffer */
258char ssd1306_WriteString(char* str, SSD1306_Font_t Font, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
259 while (*str) {
260 if (ssd1306_WriteChar(*str, Font, color) != *str) {
261 // Char could not be written
262 return *str;
263 }
264 str++;
265 }
266
267 // Everything ok
268 return *str;
269}
270
271/* Position the cursor */
272void ssd1306_SetCursor(uint8_t x, uint8_t y) {
273 SSD1306.CurrentX = x;
274 SSD1306.CurrentY = y;
275}
276
277/* Draw line by Bresenhem's algorithm */
278void ssd1306_Line(uint8_t x1, uint8_t y1, uint8_t x2, uint8_t y2, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
279 int32_t deltaX = abs(x2 - x1);
280 int32_t deltaY = abs(y2 - y1);
281 int32_t signX = ((x1 < x2) ? 1 : -1);
282 int32_t signY = ((y1 < y2) ? 1 : -1);
283 int32_t error = deltaX - deltaY;
284 int32_t error2;
285
286 ssd1306_DrawPixel(x2, y2, color);
287
288 while((x1 != x2) || (y1 != y2)) {
289 ssd1306_DrawPixel(x1, y1, color);
290 error2 = error * 2;
291 if(error2 > -deltaY) {
292 error -= deltaY;
293 x1 += signX;
294 }
295
296 if(error2 < deltaX) {
297 error += deltaX;
298 y1 += signY;
299 }
300 }
301 return;
302}
303
304/* Draw polyline */
305void ssd1306_Polyline(const SSD1306_VERTEX *par_vertex, uint16_t par_size, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
306 uint16_t i;
307 if(par_vertex == NULL) {
308 return;
309 }
310
311 for(i = 1; i < par_size; i++) {
312 ssd1306_Line(par_vertex[i - 1].x, par_vertex[i - 1].y, par_vertex[i].x, par_vertex[i].y, color);
313 }
314
315 return;
316}
317
318/* Convert Degrees to Radians */
319static float ssd1306_DegToRad(float par_deg) {
320 return par_deg * (3.14f / 180.0f);
321}
322
323/* Normalize degree to [0;360] */
324static uint16_t ssd1306_NormalizeTo0_360(uint16_t par_deg) {
325 uint16_t loc_angle;
326 if(par_deg <= 360) {
327 loc_angle = par_deg;
328 } else {
329 loc_angle = par_deg % 360;
330 loc_angle = (loc_angle ? loc_angle : 360);
331 }
332 return loc_angle;
333}
334
335/*
336 * DrawArc. Draw angle is beginning from 4 quart of trigonometric circle (3pi/2)
337 * start_angle in degree
338 * sweep in degree
339 */
340void ssd1306_DrawArc(uint8_t x, uint8_t y, uint8_t radius, uint16_t start_angle, uint16_t sweep, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
341 static const uint8_t CIRCLE_APPROXIMATION_SEGMENTS = 36;
342 float approx_degree;
343 uint32_t approx_segments;
344 uint8_t xp1,xp2;
345 uint8_t yp1,yp2;
346 uint32_t count;
347 uint32_t loc_sweep;
348 float rad;
349
350 loc_sweep = ssd1306_NormalizeTo0_360(sweep);
351
352 count = (ssd1306_NormalizeTo0_360(start_angle) * CIRCLE_APPROXIMATION_SEGMENTS) / 360;
353 approx_segments = (loc_sweep * CIRCLE_APPROXIMATION_SEGMENTS) / 360;
354 approx_degree = loc_sweep / (float)approx_segments;
355 while(count < approx_segments)
356 {
357 rad = ssd1306_DegToRad(count*approx_degree);
358 xp1 = x + (int8_t)(sinf(rad)*radius);
359 yp1 = y + (int8_t)(cosf(rad)*radius);
360 count++;
361 if(count != approx_segments) {
362 rad = ssd1306_DegToRad(count*approx_degree);
363 } else {
364 rad = ssd1306_DegToRad(loc_sweep);
365 }
366 xp2 = x + (int8_t)(sinf(rad)*radius);
367 yp2 = y + (int8_t)(cosf(rad)*radius);
368 ssd1306_Line(xp1,yp1,xp2,yp2,color);
369 }
370
371 return;
372}
373
374/*
375 * Draw arc with radius line
376 * Angle is beginning from 4 quart of trigonometric circle (3pi/2)
377 * start_angle: start angle in degree
378 * sweep: finish angle in degree
379 */
380void ssd1306_DrawArcWithRadiusLine(uint8_t x, uint8_t y, uint8_t radius, uint16_t start_angle, uint16_t sweep, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
381 const uint32_t CIRCLE_APPROXIMATION_SEGMENTS = 36;
382 float approx_degree;
383 uint32_t approx_segments;
384 uint8_t xp1;
385 uint8_t xp2 = 0;
386 uint8_t yp1;
387 uint8_t yp2 = 0;
388 uint32_t count;
389 uint32_t loc_sweep;
390 float rad;
391
392 loc_sweep = ssd1306_NormalizeTo0_360(sweep);
393
394 count = (ssd1306_NormalizeTo0_360(start_angle) * CIRCLE_APPROXIMATION_SEGMENTS) / 360;
395 approx_segments = (loc_sweep * CIRCLE_APPROXIMATION_SEGMENTS) / 360;
396 approx_degree = loc_sweep / (float)approx_segments;
397
398 rad = ssd1306_DegToRad(count*approx_degree);
399 uint8_t first_point_x = x + (int8_t)(sinf(rad)*radius);
400 uint8_t first_point_y = y + (int8_t)(cosf(rad)*radius);
401 while (count < approx_segments) {
402 rad = ssd1306_DegToRad(count*approx_degree);
403 xp1 = x + (int8_t)(sinf(rad)*radius);
404 yp1 = y + (int8_t)(cosf(rad)*radius);
405 count++;
406 if (count != approx_segments) {
407 rad = ssd1306_DegToRad(count*approx_degree);
408 } else {
409 rad = ssd1306_DegToRad(loc_sweep);
410 }
411 xp2 = x + (int8_t)(sinf(rad)*radius);
412 yp2 = y + (int8_t)(cosf(rad)*radius);
413 ssd1306_Line(xp1,yp1,xp2,yp2,color);
414 }
415
416 // Radius line
417 ssd1306_Line(x,y,first_point_x,first_point_y,color);
418 ssd1306_Line(x,y,xp2,yp2,color);
419 return;
420}
421
422/* Draw circle by Bresenhem's algorithm */
423void ssd1306_DrawCircle(uint8_t par_x,uint8_t par_y,uint8_t par_r,SSD1306_COLOR par_color) {
424 int32_t x = -par_r;
425 int32_t y = 0;
426 int32_t err = 2 - 2 * par_r;
427 int32_t e2;
428
429 if (par_x >= SSD1306_WIDTH || par_y >= SSD1306_HEIGHT) {
430 return;
431 }
432
433 do {
434 ssd1306_DrawPixel(par_x - x, par_y + y, par_color);
435 ssd1306_DrawPixel(par_x + x, par_y + y, par_color);
436 ssd1306_DrawPixel(par_x + x, par_y - y, par_color);
437 ssd1306_DrawPixel(par_x - x, par_y - y, par_color);
438 e2 = err;
439
440 if (e2 <= y) {
441 y++;
442 err = err + (y * 2 + 1);
443 if(-x == y && e2 <= x) {
444 e2 = 0;
445 }
446 }
447
448 if (e2 > x) {
449 x++;
450 err = err + (x * 2 + 1);
451 }
452 } while (x <= 0);
453
454 return;
455}
456
457/* Draw filled circle. Pixel positions calculated using Bresenham's algorithm */
458void ssd1306_FillCircle(uint8_t par_x,uint8_t par_y,uint8_t par_r,SSD1306_COLOR par_color) {
459 int32_t x = -par_r;
460 int32_t y = 0;
461 int32_t err = 2 - 2 * par_r;
462 int32_t e2;
463
464 if (par_x >= SSD1306_WIDTH || par_y >= SSD1306_HEIGHT) {
465 return;
466 }
467
468 do {
469 for (uint8_t _y = (par_y + y); _y >= (par_y - y); _y--) {
470 for (uint8_t _x = (par_x - x); _x >= (par_x + x); _x--) {
471 ssd1306_DrawPixel(_x, _y, par_color);
472 }
473 }
474
475 e2 = err;
476 if (e2 <= y) {
477 y++;
478 err = err + (y * 2 + 1);
479 if (-x == y && e2 <= x) {
480 e2 = 0;
481 }
482 }
483
484 if (e2 > x) {
485 x++;
486 err = err + (x * 2 + 1);
487 }
488 } while (x <= 0);
489
490 return;
491}
492
493/* Draw a rectangle */
494void ssd1306_DrawRectangle(uint8_t x1, uint8_t y1, uint8_t x2, uint8_t y2, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
495 ssd1306_Line(x1,y1,x2,y1,color);
496 ssd1306_Line(x2,y1,x2,y2,color);
497 ssd1306_Line(x2,y2,x1,y2,color);
498 ssd1306_Line(x1,y2,x1,y1,color);
499
500 return;
501}
502
503/* Draw a filled rectangle */
504void ssd1306_FillRectangle(uint8_t x1, uint8_t y1, uint8_t x2, uint8_t y2, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
505 uint8_t x_start = ((x1<=x2) ? x1 : x2);
506 uint8_t x_end = ((x1<=x2) ? x2 : x1);
507 uint8_t y_start = ((y1<=y2) ? y1 : y2);
508 uint8_t y_end = ((y1<=y2) ? y2 : y1);
509
510 for (uint8_t y= y_start; (y<= y_end)&&(y<SSD1306_HEIGHT); y++) {
511 for (uint8_t x= x_start; (x<= x_end)&&(x<SSD1306_WIDTH); x++) {
512 ssd1306_DrawPixel(x, y, color);
513 }
514 }
515 return;
516}
517
518SSD1306_Error_t ssd1306_InvertRectangle(uint8_t x1, uint8_t y1, uint8_t x2, uint8_t y2) {
519 if ((x2 >= SSD1306_WIDTH) || (y2 >= SSD1306_HEIGHT)) {
520 return SSD1306_ERR;
521 }
522 if ((x1 > x2) || (y1 > y2)) {
523 return SSD1306_ERR;
524 }
525 uint32_t i;
526 if ((y1 / 8) != (y2 / 8)) {
527 /* if rectangle doesn't lie on one 8px row */
528 for (uint32_t x = x1; x <= x2; x++) {
529 i = x + (y1 / 8) * SSD1306_WIDTH;
530 SSD1306_Buffer[i] ^= 0xFF << (y1 % 8);
531 i += SSD1306_WIDTH;
532 for (; i < x + (y2 / 8) * SSD1306_WIDTH; i += SSD1306_WIDTH) {
533 SSD1306_Buffer[i] ^= 0xFF;
534 }
535 SSD1306_Buffer[i] ^= 0xFF >> (7 - (y2 % 8));
536 }
537 } else {
538 /* if rectangle lies on one 8px row */
539 const uint8_t mask = (0xFF << (y1 % 8)) & (0xFF >> (7 - (y2 % 8)));
540 for (i = x1 + (y1 / 8) * SSD1306_WIDTH;
541 i <= (uint32_t)x2 + (y2 / 8) * SSD1306_WIDTH; i++) {
542 SSD1306_Buffer[i] ^= mask;
543 }
544 }
545 return SSD1306_OK;
546}
547
548/* Draw a bitmap */
549void ssd1306_DrawBitmap(uint8_t x, uint8_t y, const unsigned char* bitmap, uint8_t w, uint8_t h, SSD1306_COLOR color) {
550 int16_t byteWidth = (w + 7) / 8; // Bitmap scanline pad = whole byte
551 uint8_t byte = 0;
552
553 if (x >= SSD1306_WIDTH || y >= SSD1306_HEIGHT) {
554 return;
555 }
556
557 for (uint8_t j = 0; j < h; j++, y++) {
558 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < w; i++) {
559 if (i & 7) {
560 byte <<= 1;
561 } else {
562 byte = (*(const unsigned char *)(&bitmap[j * byteWidth + i / 8]));
563 }
564
565 if (byte & 0x80) {
566 ssd1306_DrawPixel(x + i, y, color);
567 }
568 }
569 }
570 return;
571}
572
573void ssd1306_SetContrast(const uint8_t value) {
574 const uint8_t kSetContrastControlRegister = 0x81;
575 ssd1306_WriteCommand(kSetContrastControlRegister);
576 ssd1306_WriteCommand(value);
577}
578
579void ssd1306_SetDisplayOn(const uint8_t on) {
580 uint8_t value;
581 if (on) {
582 value = 0xAF; // Display on
583 SSD1306.DisplayOn = 1;
584 } else {
585 value = 0xAE; // Display off
586 SSD1306.DisplayOn = 0;
587 }
588 ssd1306_WriteCommand(value);
589}
590
591uint8_t ssd1306_GetDisplayOn() {
592 return SSD1306.DisplayOn;
593}
594
1/**
2 * This Library was originally written by Olivier Van den Eede (4ilo) in 2016.
3 * Some refactoring was done and SPI support was added by Aleksander Alekseev (afiskon) in 2018.
4 *
5 * https://github.com/afiskon/stm32-ssd1306
6 */
7
8#ifndef __SSD1306_H__
9#define __SSD1306_H__
10
11#include <stddef.h>
12#include <stdint.h>
13#include <_ansi.h>
14
15_BEGIN_STD_C
16
17#include "ssd1306_conf.h"
18
19
20#if defined(STM32WB)
21#include "stm32wbxx_hal.h"
22#elif defined(STM32F0)
23#include "stm32f0xx_hal.h"
24#elif defined(STM32F1)
25#include "stm32f1xx_hal.h"
26#elif defined(STM32F4)
27#include "stm32f4xx_hal.h"
28#include "stm32f4xx_hal_gpio.h"
29#elif defined(STM32L0)
30#include "stm32l0xx_hal.h"
31#elif defined(STM32L1)
32#include "stm32l1xx_hal.h"
33#elif defined(STM32L4)
34#include "stm32l4xx_hal.h"
35#elif defined(STM32L5)
36#include "stm32l5xx_hal.h"
37#elif defined(STM32F3)
38#include "stm32f3xx_hal.h"
39#elif defined(STM32H7)
40#include "stm32h7xx_hal.h"
41#elif defined(STM32F7)
42#include "stm32f7xx_hal.h"
43#elif defined(STM32G0)
44#include "stm32g0xx_hal.h"
45#elif defined(STM32G4)
46#include "stm32g4xx_hal.h"
47#elif defined(STM32C0)
48#include "stm32c0xx_hal.h"
49#elif defined(STM32U5)
50#include "stm32u5xx_hal.h"
51#else
52#error "SSD1306 library was tested only on STM32F0, STM32F1, STM32F3, STM32F4, STM32F7, STM32L0, STM32L1, STM32L4, STM32H7, STM32G0, STM32G4, STM32WB, STM32C0, STM32U5 MCU families. Please modify ssd1306.h if you know what you are doing. Also please send a pull request if it turns out the library works on other MCU's as well!"
53#endif
54
55
56#ifdef SSD1306_X_OFFSET
57#define SSD1306_X_OFFSET_LOWER (SSD1306_X_OFFSET & 0x0F)
58#define SSD1306_X_OFFSET_UPPER ((SSD1306_X_OFFSET >> 4) & 0x07)
59#else
60#define SSD1306_X_OFFSET_LOWER 0
61#define SSD1306_X_OFFSET_UPPER 0
62#endif
63
64/* vvv I2C config vvv */
65
66#ifndef SSD1306_I2C_PORT
67#define SSD1306_I2C_PORT hi2c1
68#endif
69
70#ifndef SSD1306_I2C_ADDR
71#define SSD1306_I2C_ADDR (0x3C << 1)
72#endif
73
74/* ^^^ I2C config ^^^ */
75
76/* vvv SPI config vvv */
77
78#ifndef SSD1306_SPI_PORT
79#define SSD1306_SPI_PORT hspi2
80#endif
81
82#ifndef SSD1306_CS_Port
83#define SSD1306_CS_Port GPIOB
84#endif
85#ifndef SSD1306_CS_Pin
86#define SSD1306_CS_Pin GPIO_PIN_12
87#endif
88
89#ifndef SSD1306_DC_Port
90#define SSD1306_DC_Port GPIOB
91#endif
92#ifndef SSD1306_DC_Pin
93#define SSD1306_DC_Pin GPIO_PIN_14
94#endif
95
96#ifndef SSD1306_Reset_Port
97#define SSD1306_Reset_Port GPIOA
98#endif
99#ifndef SSD1306_Reset_Pin
100#define SSD1306_Reset_Pin GPIO_PIN_8
101#endif
102
103/* ^^^ SPI config ^^^ */
104
105#if defined(SSD1306_USE_I2C)
106extern I2C_HandleTypeDef SSD1306_I2C_PORT;
107#elif defined(SSD1306_USE_SPI)
108extern SPI_HandleTypeDef SSD1306_SPI_PORT;
109#else
110#error "You should define SSD1306_USE_SPI or SSD1306_USE_I2C macro!"
111#endif
112
113// SSD1306 OLED height in pixels
114#ifndef SSD1306_HEIGHT
115#define SSD1306_HEIGHT 64
116#endif
117
118// SSD1306 width in pixels
119#ifndef SSD1306_WIDTH
120#define SSD1306_WIDTH 128
121#endif
122
123#ifndef SSD1306_BUFFER_SIZE
124#define SSD1306_BUFFER_SIZE SSD1306_WIDTH * SSD1306_HEIGHT / 8
125#endif
126
127// Enumeration for screen colors
128typedef enum {
129 Black = 0x00, // Black color, no pixel
130 White = 0x01 // Pixel is set. Color depends on OLED
131} SSD1306_COLOR;
132
133typedef enum {
134 SSD1306_OK = 0x00,
135 SSD1306_ERR = 0x01 // Generic error.
136} SSD1306_Error_t;
137
138// Struct to store transformations
139typedef struct {
140 uint16_t CurrentX;
141 uint16_t CurrentY;
142 uint8_t Initialized;
143 uint8_t DisplayOn;
144} SSD1306_t;
145
146typedef struct {
147 uint8_t x;
148 uint8_t y;
149} SSD1306_VERTEX;
150
151/** Font */
152typedef struct {
153 const uint8_t width; /**< Font width in pixels */
154 const uint8_t height; /**< Font height in pixels */
155 const uint16_t *const data; /**< Pointer to font data array */
156 const uint8_t *const char_width; /**< Proportional character width in pixels (NULL for monospaced) */
157} SSD1306_Font_t;
158
159// Procedure definitions
160void ssd1306_Init(void);
161void ssd1306_Fill(SSD1306_COLOR color);
162void ssd1306_UpdateScreen(void);
163void ssd1306_DrawPixel(uint8_t x, uint8_t y, SSD1306_COLOR color);
164char ssd1306_WriteChar(char ch, SSD1306_Font_t Font, SSD1306_COLOR color);
165char ssd1306_WriteString(char* str, SSD1306_Font_t Font, SSD1306_COLOR color);
166void ssd1306_SetCursor(uint8_t x, uint8_t y);
167void ssd1306_Line(uint8_t x1, uint8_t y1, uint8_t x2, uint8_t y2, SSD1306_COLOR color);
168void ssd1306_DrawArc(uint8_t x, uint8_t y, uint8_t radius, uint16_t start_angle, uint16_t sweep, SSD1306_COLOR color);
169void ssd1306_DrawArcWithRadiusLine(uint8_t x, uint8_t y, uint8_t radius, uint16_t start_angle, uint16_t sweep, SSD1306_COLOR color);
170void ssd1306_DrawCircle(uint8_t par_x, uint8_t par_y, uint8_t par_r, SSD1306_COLOR color);
171void ssd1306_FillCircle(uint8_t par_x,uint8_t par_y,uint8_t par_r,SSD1306_COLOR par_color);
172void ssd1306_Polyline(const SSD1306_VERTEX *par_vertex, uint16_t par_size, SSD1306_COLOR color);
173void ssd1306_DrawRectangle(uint8_t x1, uint8_t y1, uint8_t x2, uint8_t y2, SSD1306_COLOR color);
174void ssd1306_FillRectangle(uint8_t x1, uint8_t y1, uint8_t x2, uint8_t y2, SSD1306_COLOR color);
175
176/**
177 * @brief Invert color of pixels in rectangle (include border)
178 *
179 * @param x1 X Coordinate of top left corner
180 * @param y1 Y Coordinate of top left corner
181 * @param x2 X Coordinate of bottom right corner
182 * @param y2 Y Coordinate of bottom right corner
183 * @return SSD1306_Error_t status
184 */
185SSD1306_Error_t ssd1306_InvertRectangle(uint8_t x1, uint8_t y1, uint8_t x2, uint8_t y2);
186
187void ssd1306_DrawBitmap(uint8_t x, uint8_t y, const unsigned char* bitmap, uint8_t w, uint8_t h, SSD1306_COLOR color);
188
189/**
190 * @brief Sets the contrast of the display.
191 * @param[in] value contrast to set.
192 * @note Contrast increases as the value increases.
193 * @note RESET = 7Fh.
194 */
195void ssd1306_SetContrast(const uint8_t value);
196
197/**
198 * @brief Set Display ON/OFF.
199 * @param[in] on 0 for OFF, any for ON.
200 */
201void ssd1306_SetDisplayOn(const uint8_t on);
202
203/**
204 * @brief Reads DisplayOn state.
205 * @return 0: OFF.
206 * 1: ON.
207 */
208uint8_t ssd1306_GetDisplayOn();
209
210// Low-level procedures
211void ssd1306_Reset(void);
212void ssd1306_WriteCommand(uint8_t byte);
213void ssd1306_WriteData(uint8_t* buffer, size_t buff_size);
214SSD1306_Error_t ssd1306_FillBuffer(uint8_t* buf, uint32_t len);
215
216_END_STD_C
217
218#endif // __SSD1306_H__
219
1
2#include "ssd1306_fonts.h"
3

7150x0000,0x2020,0x2040,0x1040,0x1080,0x1080,0x0880,0x0900,0x0900,0x0500,0x0600,0x0600,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
716/** W **/
7170x0000,0x1082,0x10C2,0x1142,0x1144,0x1124,0x0924,0x0A24,0x0A28,0x0A18,0x0408,0x0408,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
718/** X **/
7190x0000,0x2040,0x1080,0x0880,0x0900,0x0600,0x0200,0x0500,0x0900,0x0880,0x1040,0x2060,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
720/** Y **/
7210x0000,0x2060,0x1040,0x1080,0x0880,0x0900,0x0600,0x0200,0x0200,0x0200,0x0200,0x0200,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
722/** Z **/
7230x0000,0x1FC0,0x0080,0x0080,0x0100,0x0200,0x0200,0x0400,0x0800,0x1000,0x1000,0x1FC0,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
724/** [ **/
7250x1800,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1800,0x0000,
726/** \ **/
7270x0000,0x2000,0x2000,0x1000,0x1000,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0400,0x0400,0x0400,0x0200,0x0200,0x0000,0x0000,
728/** ] **/
7290x6000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x6000,0x0000,
730/** ^ **/
7310x0000,0x0800,0x0C00,0x1400,0x1200,0x1200,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
732/** _ **/
7330x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x7E00,0x0000,0x0000,
734/** ` **/
7350x0000,0x1000,0x0800,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
736/** a **/
7370x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0F00,0x1080,0x0080,0x0F80,0x1080,0x1080,0x1180,0x0E80,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
738/** b **/
7390x0000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1F00,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1F00,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
740/** c **/
7410x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0F00,0x1080,0x1080,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1080,0x0F00,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
742/** d **/
7430x0000,0x0080,0x0080,0x0080,0x0F80,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x0F80,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
744/** e **/
7450x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0F00,0x1080,0x1080,0x1F80,0x1000,0x1000,0x0800,0x0780,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
746/** f **/
7470x0600,0x0800,0x1000,0x1000,0x1C00,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
748/** g **/
7490x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0F80,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x0F80,0x0080,0x1100,0x0F00,
750/** h **/
7510x0000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1700,0x1880,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
752/** i **/
7530x0000,0x1000,0x0000,0x0000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
754/** j **/
7550x0000,0x2000,0x0000,0x0000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0x2000,0xC000,
756/** k **/
7570x0000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1180,0x1200,0x1400,0x1800,0x1400,0x1200,0x1100,0x1080,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
758/** l **/
7590x0000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
760/** m **/
7610x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x1738,0x18C4,0x1084,0x1084,0x1084,0x1084,0x1084,0x1084,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
762/** n **/
7630x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x1700,0x1880,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
764/** o **/
7650x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0F00,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x0F00,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
766/** p **/
7670x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x1F00,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1F00,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,
768/** q **/
7690x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0F80,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x0F80,0x0080,0x0080,0x0080,
770/** r **/
7710x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x1600,0x1800,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
772/** s **/
7730x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0E00,0x1100,0x1000,0x0C00,0x0300,0x0100,0x1100,0x0E00,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
774/** t **/
7750x0000,0x0000,0x1000,0x1000,0x3C00,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x0C00,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
776/** u **/
7770x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x1080,0x0F80,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
778/** v **/
7790x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x2080,0x2100,0x1100,0x1200,0x1200,0x0A00,0x0C00,0x0400,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
780/** w **/
7810x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x2118,0x2310,0x1310,0x12A0,0x14A0,0x14A0,0x0C60,0x0840,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
782/** x **/
7830x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x2180,0x1200,0x0A00,0x0C00,0x0C00,0x0A00,0x1100,0x2180,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
784/** y **/
7850x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x2080,0x2100,0x1100,0x1200,0x1200,0x0A00,0x0C00,0x0400,0x0400,0x0800,0x1800,
786/** z **/
7870x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x1F00,0x0100,0x0200,0x0400,0x0800,0x1000,0x1000,0x1F80,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
788/** { **/
7890x0600,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x1000,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0600,
790/** | **/
7910x0000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x1000,0x0000,
792/** } **/
7930x2000,0x1000,0x1000,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0400,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x0800,0x1000,0x1000,0x2000,
794/** ~ **/
7950x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0C20,0x1320,0x11C0,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,0x0000,
796};
797

30
1#include "tim.h"
2
3
4
5/*********************************
6定时器说明
7
8TIM3--APB1
9频率：84MHZ
1016位定时器
11
12*********************************/
13void Tim3_Init(void)
14{
15 NVIC_InitTypeDef NVIC_InitStructure;
16 TIM_TimeBaseInitTypeDef TIM_TimeStructure;
17
18 /* TIM3 clock enable */
19 //使能定时器3
20 RCC_APB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB1Periph_TIM3, ENABLE);
21
22
23
24
25 /* Time base configuration */
26 TIM_TimeStructure.TIM_Prescaler = (84-1); //84分频 84MHZ/84 = 1MHZ
27 TIM_TimeStructure.TIM_Period = (1000-1); //重载值为1000，在1MHZ，计1000个数，用时1ms
28 TIM_TimeStructure.TIM_CounterMode = TIM_CounterMode_Up; //向上计数
29 TIM_TimeStructure.TIM_ClockDivision = 0; //分频因子
30 TIM_TimeBaseInit(TIM3, &TIM_TimeStructure);
31
32
33 /* Enable the TIM3 gloabal Interrupt */
34 //配置定时器NVIC
35 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannel = TIM3_IRQn;
36 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelPreemptionPriority = 0;
37 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelSubPriority = 1;
38 NVIC_InitStructure.NVIC_IRQChannelCmd = ENABLE;
39 NVIC_Init(&NVIC_InitStructure);
40
41
42 /* TIM Interrupts enable */
43 //配置为更新中断
44 TIM_ITConfig(TIM3, TIM_IT_Update, ENABLE);
45
46 /* TIM3 enable counter */
47 //使能定时器 开启定时器
48 TIM_Cmd(TIM3, ENABLE);
49
50}
51
1#ifndef __TIM_H
2#define __TIM_H
3
4#include "stm32f4xx.h"
5
6void Tim3_Init(void);
7
8
9#endif
10
1#include "zhi.h"
2#include "sys.h"
3#include "delay.h"
4#include "led.h" // 按需引入依赖头文件
5#include "exti.h"
6#include "i2c_ee.h" // OLED相关
7
8// 引用main.c中的全局变量
9extern volatile uint8_t g_buffer[8];
10extern volatile uint8_t g_rx_buffer[32];
11extern volatile uint8_t g_cout;
12extern volatile uint8_t g_flag;
13extern volatile uint8_t g_enroll_flag;
14extern volatile uint8_t g_enroll_step;
15extern volatile uint8_t g_unlock_flag;
16extern volatile uint8_t g_unlock_mode;
17extern volatile uint8_t g_delete_all_flag;
18extern uint16_t user_id;
19
20// 指纹相关宏定义（与main.c保持一致）
21#define ACK_SUCCESS 0x00
22#define ACK_FAIL 0x01
23#define ACK_FULL 0x04
24#define ACK_NOUSER 0x05
25#define ACK_USER_EXIST 0x07
26#define ACK_TIMEOUT 0x08
27
28// 原有函数保持不变
29void zhi_init(void)
30{
31 GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStruct;
32 RCC_AHB1PeriphClockCmd(RCC_AHB1Periph_GPIOG, ENABLE);
33 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_Pin = GPIO_Pin_15;
34 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_IN;
35 GPIO_InitStruct.GPIO_PuPd = GPIO_PuPd_UP;
36 GPIO_Init(GPIOG, &GPIO_InitStruct);
37}
38
39uint8_t Finger_CalChk(uint8_t *data)
40{
41 uint8_t chk = 0;
42 for(uint8_t i=0; i<5; i++) chk ^= data[i];
43 return chk;
44}
45
46void Finger_SendCmd(uint8_t type, uint8_t p1, uint8_t p2, uint8_t p3)
47{
48 uint8_t cmd[8] = {0xF5, type, p1, p2, p3, 0x00, 0, 0xF5};
49 cmd[6] = Finger_CalChk(&cmd[1]);
50
51 __disable_irq();
52 g_flag = 0;
53 g_cout = 0;
54 memset((uint8_t*)g_buffer, 0, 8);
55 memset((uint8_t*)g_rx_buffer, 0, 8);
56 __enable_irq();
57
58 for(uint8_t i=0; i<8; i++)
59 {
60 while(USART_GetFlagStatus(USART1, USART_FLAG_TXE) == RESET);
61 USART_SendData(USART1, cmd[i]);
62 }
63 while(USART_GetFlagStatus(USART1, USART_FLAG_TC) == RESET);
64 delay_ms(20);
65}
66
67void Finger_Led(uint8_t mode)
68{
69 if(mode == 1) Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x03, 0x07, 0x96); // 红灯闪烁
70 else if(mode == 2) Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x05, 0x05, 0x96); // 绿灯常亮
71 else if(mode == 3) Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x06, 0x07, 0x96); // 蓝灯闪烁
72 else if(mode == 4) Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x07, 0x07, 0x96); // 全灭
73}
74
75void Finger_Verify_1N(void)
76{
77 Finger_SendCmd(0x0C, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00);
78}
79
80// 新增：指纹录入处理函数（抽离自main.c）
81void Finger_Enroll_Process(void)
82{
83 if(g_enroll_flag == 1)
84 {
85 g_enroll_flag = 0;
86 delay_ms(15);
87 if(PAin(0) == 0)
88 {
89 while(PAin(0) == 0);
90 if(g_enroll_step == 0 && g_unlock_mode == 1) // 修改：解锁模式默认是1
91 {
92 g_enroll_step = 1;
93 printf("=== 录入第一步：请按手指 ===\r\n");
94 Finger_Led(1);
95 Finger_SendCmd(0x01, (user_id>>8)&0xFF, user_id&0xFF, 0x01);
96 }
97 }
98 }
99
100 // 录入第一步
101 if(g_enroll_step == 1)
102 {
103 uint32_t timeout = 0;
104 while(g_flag == 0 && timeout < 8000) { delay_ms(1); timeout++; }
105
106 if(g_flag == 1)
107 {
108 g_flag = 0;
109 if(g_rx_buffer[1] == 0x01)
110 {
111 if(g_rx_buffer[4] == ACK_SUCCESS)
112 {
113 printf("第一步成功！请抬手指，1秒后按第二次\r\n");
114 Finger_Led(2); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
115 g_enroll_step = 2;
116 printf("=== 录入第二步：请按手指 ===\r\n");
117 Finger_Led(1);
118 Finger_SendCmd(0x02, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00);
119 }
120 else if(g_rx_buffer[4] == ACK_USER_EXIST)
121 {
122 printf("=== 该ID已录入！请换一个ID ===\r\n");
123 user_id++;
124 Finger_Led(3); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
125 g_enroll_step = 0; // 录入结束，恢复解锁
126 }
127 else
128 {
129 printf("第一步失败！错误码：%02X\r\n", g_rx_buffer[4]);
130 Finger_Led(3); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
131 g_enroll_step = 0; // 录入结束，恢复解锁
132 }
133 }
134 }
135 else
136 {
137 printf("第一步超时！\r\n");
138 Finger_Led(3); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
139 g_enroll_step = 0; // 录入结束，恢复解锁
140 }
141 }
142
143 // 录入第二步
144 if(g_enroll_step == 2)
145 {
146 uint32_t timeout = 0;
147 while(g_flag == 0 && timeout < 8000) { delay_ms(1); timeout++; }
148
149 if(g_flag == 1)
150 {
151 g_flag = 0;
152 if(g_rx_buffer[1] == 0x02 && g_rx_buffer[4] == ACK_SUCCESS)
153 {
154 printf("第二步成功！请抬手指，1秒后按第三次\r\n");
155 Finger_Led(2); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
156 g_enroll_step = 3;
157 printf("=== 录入第三步：请按手指 ===\r\n");
158 Finger_Led(1);
159 Finger_SendCmd(0x03, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00);
160 }
161 else
162 {
163 printf("第二步失败！错误码：%02X\r\n", g_rx_buffer[4]);
164 Finger_Led(3); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
165 g_enroll_step = 0; // 录入结束，恢复解锁
166 }
167 }
168 else
169 {
170 printf("第二步超时！\r\n");
171 Finger_Led(3); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
172 g_enroll_step = 0; // 录入结束，恢复解锁
173 }
174 }
175
176 // 录入第三步
177 if(g_enroll_step == 3)
178 {
179 uint32_t timeout = 0;
180 while(g_flag == 0 && timeout < 8000)
181 {
182 delay_ms(1);
183 timeout++;
184 if(timeout % 1000 == 0) printf("等待模块应答...%d秒\r\n", timeout/1000);
185 }
186
187 if(g_flag == 1)
188 {
189 g_flag = 0;
190 if(g_rx_buffer[1] == 0x03 && g_rx_buffer[4] == ACK_SUCCESS)
191 {
192 uint16_t final_id = (g_rx_buffer[2] << 8) | g_rx_buffer[3];
193 printf("=== 录入成功！最终用户ID：%d ===\r\n", final_id);
194 user_id++;
195 Finger_Led(2); delay_ms(3000); Finger_Led(4);
196 }
197 else
198 {
199 printf("第三步失败！错误码：%02X\r\n", g_rx_buffer[4]);
200 Finger_Led(3); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
201 }
202 }
203 else
204 {
205 printf("第三步超时！模块未应答\r\n");
206 Finger_Led(3); delay_ms(1000); Finger_Led(4);
207 }
208 g_enroll_step = 0; // 录入结束，恢复解锁
209 }
210}
211
212// 移除解锁模式触发逻辑（解锁默认一直开启）
213void Finger_Unlock_Trigger_Process(void)
214{
215 // 清空原有触发逻辑，解锁模式默认开启
216}
217
218// 新增：开锁模式核心逻辑（抽离自main.c）
219void Finger_Unlock_Mode_Process(void)
220{
221 // 指纹录入阶段，关闭解锁功能
222 if(g_enroll_step != 0)
223 {
224 return;
225 }
226
227 // 解锁模式始终开启（g_unlock_mode默认=1）
228 if(g_unlock_mode == 1)
229 {
230 // 检测PG15触摸触发比对
231 if(PGin(15) == 1)
232 {
233 printf("检测到手指，开始比对...\r\n");
234 Finger_Verify_1N();
235
236 uint32_t timeout = 0;
237 while(g_flag == 0 && timeout < 8000) { delay_ms(1); timeout++; }
238
239 if(g_flag == 1)
240 {
241 g_flag = 0;
242 if(g_rx_buffer[1] == 0x0C)
243 {
244 uint16_t verify_id = (g_rx_buffer[2] << 8) | g_rx_buffer[3];
245 uint8_t verify_role = g_rx_buffer[4];
246
247 if(verify_id != 0)
248 {
249 printf("=== 开锁成功！用户ID：%d，权限：%d ===\r\n", verify_id, verify_role);
250 Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x05, 0x05, 0x96); // 绿灯常亮
251 SmartLock_ShowScanning();
252 SmartLock_ShowWelcome();
253 Lock_Set_Relay(1);
254 delay_s(3);
255 Lock_Set_Relay(0);
256 SmartLock_ShowBootScreen();
257
258 Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x06, 0x07, 0x96); // 恢复蓝灯闪烁
259 // 不再退出解锁模式，保持开启
260 printf("=== 指纹解锁成功，继续等待指纹验证 ===\r\n");
261 Finger_Led(3); // 蓝灯闪烁，提示继续等待
262 }
263 else
264 {
265 printf("=== 开锁失败：未找到匹配指纹 ===\r\n");
266 Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x03, 0x07, 0x96); // 红灯闪烁
267 delay_ms(1000);
268 Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x06, 0x07, 0x96); // 恢复蓝灯闪烁
269 }
270 }
271 }
272 else
273 {
274 printf("=== 开锁超时：未检测到指纹 ===\r\n");
275 }
276
277 while(PGin(15) == 1); // 等待手指抬开
278 delay_ms(100);
279 }
280
281 // 移除PE2退出解锁模式的逻辑，解锁功能一直开启
282 }
283}
284
285// 新增：删除所有指纹处理（抽离自main.c）
286void Finger_DeleteAll_Process(void)
287{
288 if(g_delete_all_flag == 1)
289 {
290 g_delete_all_flag = 0;
291 delay_ms(15);
292 if(PEin(3) == 0)
293 {
294 while(PEin(3) == 0);
295 if(g_enroll_step == 0 && g_unlock_mode == 1) // 修改：解锁模式默认是1
296 {
297 printf("=== 开始删除所有指纹 ===\r\n");
298 Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x02, 0x07, 0x96); // 红蓝闪烁
299
300 Finger_SendCmd(0x05, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00); // 删除所有指令
301
302 uint32_t timeout = 0;
303 while(g_flag == 0 && timeout < 2000)
304 {
305 delay_ms(1);
306 timeout++;
307 }
308
309 if(g_flag == 1)
310 {
311 g_flag = 0;
312 if(g_rx_buffer[1] == 0x05 && g_rx_buffer[4] == 0x00)
313 {
314 printf("=== 所有指纹删除成功！===\r\n");
315 user_id = 1;
316 Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x05, 0x05, 0x96); // 绿灯常亮
317 delay_ms(2000);
318 }
319 else
320 {
321 printf("=== 删除失败！错误码：%02X ===\r\n", g_rx_buffer[4]);
322 Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x03, 0x07, 0x96); // 红灯闪烁
323 delay_ms(1000);
324 }
325 }
326 else
327 {
328 printf("=== 删除超时！模块无应答 ===\r\n");
329 Finger_SendCmd(0xC3, 0x03, 0x07, 0x96);
330 delay_ms(1000);
331 }
332 Finger_Led(4);
333 }
334 }
335 }
336}
1#ifndef __ZHI_H
2#define __ZHI_H
3
4#include "stm32f4xx.h"
5
6void zhi_init(void);
7void Finger_SendCmd(u8 type, u8 p1, u8 p2, u8 p3);
8void Finger_Led(u8 mode);
9u8 Finger_CalChk(u8 *data);
10extern void Finger_Verify_1N(void);
11
12

15void Finger_Unlock_Trigger_Process(void); // ����ģʽ����

20#endif
